name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Record Crowds to Stop Vaccine Mandates
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=record_crowds_stop_vaccine&n=1)
---
Peter \-- Political movements like what we're seeing right now come very few times...maybe once a decade at best. **Last week, our team went all across Minnesota participating in rallies for health freedom because we are motivated to Stop Vaccine Mandates. If you can't decide what to put in your own body, then we've lost everything!** [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQqT7PJtggsLHnSqspTZ3Rg_nuW1uZwFQyRWe1nT_dXc7YX8loz6Llhs3AoPMY4qG2o&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=record_crowds_stop_vaccine&n=2) This issue is so important to our team, that I just instructed our staff to attend all of the rallies and lend support to the patriots who are organizing them. In fact, I'll personally be up in **Hibbing on Wednesday at 4 pm** for a rally at Bennet Park. Hope to see you Iron Rangers there. I'm sure Con Artists Julie Sandstede and Dave Lislegard will be happy about that. You remember them? They are two Iron Range legislators who reversed their vote to End Walz' Emergency Powers back in January when it finally mattered. **Speaking of those Con Artists, It was only a month and half ago that you helped us achieve something monumental. 40,000 doors knocked and 55,000 phone calls put REAL PRESSURE on politicians in St Paul.** That led to success! We were the first divided legislature in the country to remove a Governor's Emergency Powers, despite the Democrat Machine trying to stop us. At the time, it seemed like a minor victory. Walz had basically let all restrictions expire. People weren't wearing masks anymore. And the masses still had a choice about getting the vaccine. Fast forward to today, and it's extremely obvious that Walz would've reinstated a mask mandate, placed restrictions on our businesses and possibly even instituted a vaccine passport program. **We ended his****current Emergency Powers, but he could do this all over again. That's why we MUST pass Rep Erik Mortensen's Never Again Bill. And we need to sign a Stop Vaccine Mandate provision into law!** So we're taking our message to the 2 million Minnesotans who attend the State Fair. We know Governor Walz will have a booth there talking about "One Minnesota". Action 4 Liberty will set the record straight! Walz wants Two Minnesotas...The vaccinated with approved rights and the unvaccinated, with very limited rights and no jobs.
# NOT GOING TO HAPPEN WALZ!
We are going to fight this tooth and nail. We WILL NOT COMPLY! People need to see others who are willing to stand up and challenge the authoritarians. And that's us! **I don't care if Action 4 Liberty is the only booth at the State Fair that doesn't conform to their demands. We will STAND UP for what we believe in!** We are putting the finishing touches on the Never Again Booth. Hope you like it! [](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_donation?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=record_crowds_stop_vaccine&n=3) If you want to join our team and grow the list of Minnesotans who want to stand up for health freedom and make sure Unilateral Emergency Powers NEVER HAPPEN AGAIN, then volunteer at our booth. **All participants get a free ticket to the fairgrounds and an Action 4 Liberty t-shirt. Please join us between August 26th and September 6th by registering here.** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/volunteer_state_fair?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=record_crowds_stop_vaccine&n=4 "Volunteer") [Volunteer](https://www.action4liberty.com/volunteer_state_fair?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=record_crowds_stop_vaccine&n=4)
---
If you can't make it, don't worry, there are other ways to help. The State Fair is costly and we could use [**your help**](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_donation?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=record_crowds_stop_vaccine&n=5) to get our message out to the 2 million fair-goers.
[](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_donation?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=record_crowds_stop_vaccine&n=6 "Donate") [Donate](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_donation?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=record_crowds_stop_vaccine&n=6)
---
The authoritarians in our government and corporations are trying to turn you and me into second class citizens. If you are unvaccinated, you have less rights in their world.
## We can't let this happen!
**Let's stand up to these authoritarians who want to run over our health freedom. Join us by[volunteering](https://www.action4liberty.com/volunteer_state_fair?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=record_crowds_stop_vaccine&n=7) at the State Fair booth or by donating to [help fund our message to 2 million fair-goers](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_donation?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=record_crowds_stop_vaccine&n=8).**
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=record_crowds_stop_vaccine&n=9).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=record_crowds_stop_vaccine&n=10).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=record_crowds_stop_vaccine&n=11), software for leaders.

name: Shahid Buttar
subject: What you might not have heard about Afghanistan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shahid Buttar for Congress Committee, 1390 Market St
body:
After 20 years, $2 trillion, and hundreds of thousands of lost lives, the U.S. withdrawal from Afghanistan finally admits what many of us have been saying for years. | | |
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yRkW_Sw2xr1MvIXEt6jooTbMnsVYqhUO8Xwt4ORz78OfUg7g0bT3KWj5PFlOrwylcmVHgVhvfe2ZPl5W7AdMas1JpgG_86g9Foo3tlS0fxRcAV1cJU-8j9mKuYY2ecZEmeUEozqFP-zkdqlbVme0eEznID0L1YZavvMctCpNo9i3fUP-R2k6tg789p0TpZkpnKmMSFg-AqKudtYZxrgIoOxTXFy1_OVcLD0bzm2W09dI_-Wx6p7nHlehjR_2yKY2wRIrg5xDElos_WOwZoqSmUnVg-dW71_26ysx6AOz8SyNSR-XabTdFW-iWK8K2K2FxicXLSYuWyg1ogQf_LT4yioI64bVcO7L8B3p-lWMV05rSXEalFxyg98NDRez6jUS4/3ek/II633ti7RJCRppvui3vpKQ/h0/Tg7wptsx6RCA8HtsI7GUuX_M1DGg978b_a2H_qonduE)
| | Dear Peter, The stories we’ve all seen from Afghanistan are heart-wrenching. For those of us who have spoken out for decades against the bipartisan war that has cost $2 trillion and hundreds of thousands of lives, it also feels devastating because we knew it didn’t have to happen this way. We have watched our government feed us lies for decades, while publishing warnings that proved all too true. For an issue drawing so much attention, all the discussion about the U.S. withdrawal from Afghanistan continues to overlook several key points that many of us have raised for years. First, we have all been fed a diet of lies for decades. Just last week, the Pentagon revised its previous estimate that the U.S.-backed government could hold on to power for six months after our long overdue withdrawal, admitting that it could fall within just three months. We all know now that it fell in a matter of days, suggesting that the 20 years of lies we’ve been told by the Pentagon are unfortunately continuing. In 2001, George W Bush said, _"__The Taliban's days of harboring terrorists and dealing in heroin and brutalizing women are drawing to a close. And when that regime is gone, the people of Afghanistan will say with the rest of the world, "Good riddance."_ In fact, heroin production increased dramatically after the U.S. invasion. Observing that, as well as the role of corporate agricultural subsidies, weapons contracts, and textile tariffs inadvertently fueling violent extremism, I explained 12 years ago in Huffington Post why a smarter counter-terror strategy would include legalizing the international opium trade to cut off the funding stream on which violent extremists rely. We who got it right were ignored at the time. But we can still help the future. ******[Can you stand with us to finish what we started last year and send a new voice to Washington to stop the next war before it starts?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x4B63xNAwgGph4W5eA_sU5aJUyhfuQ_B3XEgAufY7a-0GaVm3aaXHBAJE-1ISocJ3Ny0IVZ7CBxaQc1rOgyFilYguqpv8AE60aWcUEXzvGVIm8_mokl38tiZ6_PyLc8GhXSoTTsFCkg6gSjWLKxOXyVGrnUfXgI_AD8Jk0cJWsMNbqKiM7xCO81qnFS61cSGoZbsY9NywaWhQgHuUUXynqjWKmNiICLLMOknRlUfI_adoQqZe-zlaczEf5gHuJE_XFPo4feIuODmi9-vtNzUsS1yBX-vK3XfZV5wAMAvlHEDp8KKTmPewnml7SHURMXdtmveKpltR_BvGIf8jIND1OT93GfsExv-B5G8UsLfTpnISHboFZlx2WopZMIXMbEdM/3ek/II633ti7RJCRppvui3vpKQ/h1/YgbaIqCe_NFoT97jGizPpvV7EOC-RempJ5N2BJCIYmM)** Lies about heroin production are not the only ones that we’ve been told. A decade ago, President Obama acknowledged that “we tortured some folks” at sites including Bagram Air Force Base, just an hour outside of Kabul. No one has ever been held accountable for the human rights violations that happened there, including the outright murder of several detainees while in custody. The refusal of the United States to allow accountability for human rights violations played a key role in eroding the legitimacy of the U.S.-backed Afghan government, which fell within a matter of days. Many voices have long noted that any perceived path to military victory was untenable. But too many continue to ignore the role of American exceptionalism, and our own unwillingness to enforce the law against U.S. officials and servicemembers, in presaging the outcome.Outrageously, the current head of the CIA previously destroyed evidence of the Agency’s criminal trail. That had been Gina Haspel’s most prolific “contribution” to the corruption that passes for national security in Washington. **[Can you join us to help champion human rights not only from the grassroots, as I have for 20 years, but also from within the halls of Congress?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x4B63xNAwgGph4W5eA_sU5aJUyhfuQ_B3XEgAufY7a-07bUEMHgky0DklJT4RAuBL2KrQjUHQVsv8Mwjhmxw-spDECZbsZ6zPKvDciPJNpgLG-0DOY8yGEwWC0EKmFkI2yC7BlUh4oNp6x3ShcQWa3qHC36SF-xFeSBMGKp0P0M-aNpAWK5MhynP7qVjJ2EipgvG3x9KsDIcALqjx_CROupaSP-j0J4T_lbQytHGw2ETiAj-9Z3z2Gb33FiXGjAVFoBspW8cUamGvYmSPgwmNRsh8ggwmTJalh9qFitcoTGNzSxecqqskGwG93WREKtvz7ul2xqPNUWSt9slx1HddSLJ5MeYS96tSgAB2wB9oWoO3D8mW7Y9aYeNefZ6o0_1c/3ek/II633ti7RJCRppvui3vpKQ/h2/TFidvBRX_CrzjepZe0Ywke79aGUWneIzTKWzE3PdlTg)** Finally, many voices have noted concerns about the potential dangers facing women and girls under whatever future regime emerges Afghanistan. Given the history of the Taliban‘s rule during the 1990s, those concerns are certainly well grounded. They are, however, at best, under inclusive. The numbers of women and girls who died as “collateral damage” from U.S. drone strikes have not been tallied, as far as we know. We do know, however, that the U.S. military whistleblower who revealed that 90% of the deaths from drone strikes are unintended was recently sentenced to years in federal prison. We share the concerns about opportunities for women and girls in Afghanistan going forward. We note, at the same time, that they have shared the brunt of the arbitrary violence to which the country has been subjected over the two decades of the U.S. war there. **[Want a voice in Congress who stands up for the rights of women even against the Pentagon?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x4B63xNAwgGph4W5eA_sU5aJUyhfuQ_B3XEgAufY7a-wxBXXRpmrdZU6XhfDmDm6rdwHpmwaeT5AqW0kKhtfwm11VVr1UiyEUJvLpHu241YHqP1zWgsp-9hGQZ_A8PwtAuT_aw7Qc1PxcYOte7p-pkxMzrtP-YmH6D2LGW-BhtFghne9ud2BRLJmfEtJnAkja6orjtNRdsaFtR49t8vVnpl8EINLK2aL5vD9e6QOnw_0p7h3M0F9bF2WlB1S2tvT732kx04nI0T96KVWupjKz0zucmU76m2KXMkydB3rAZ3jP7EhS5D51sUOFJM3FpqtzuOIol8EPwZPXw673rJIcyRcInho-d9geHWbw6th7tQ0VtxEHbLWwBSxT41unKbT8/3ek/II633ti7RJCRppvui3vpKQ/h3/13zjNTcnWPC15x0egR9WbxX-AGIMUTSdmlLrrQ_4DgA) ** Too many questions go unasked in Washington. clean_body: After 20 years, $2 trillion, and hundreds of thousands of lost lives, the U.S. withdrawal from Afghanistan finally admits what many of us have been saying for years. | | | | | Dear Peter, The stories we’ve all seen from Afghanistan are heart-wrenching. For those of us who have spoken out for decades against the bipartisan war that has cost $2 trillion and hundreds of thousands of lives, it also feels devastating because we knew it didn’t have to happen this way. We have watched our government feed us lies for decades, while publishing warnings that proved all too true. For an issue drawing so much attention, all the discussion about the U.S. withdrawal from Afghanistan continues to overlook several key points that many of us have raised for years. First, we have all been fed a diet of lies for decades. Just last week, the Pentagon revised its previous estimate that the U.S.-backed government could hold on to power for six months after our long overdue withdrawal, admitting that it could fall within just three months. We all know now that it fell in a matter of days, suggesting that the 20 years of lies we’ve been told by the Pentagon are unfortunately continuing. In 2001, George W Bush said, "The Taliban's days of harboring terrorists and dealing in heroin and brutalizing women are drawing to a close. And when that regime is gone, the people of Afghanistan will say with the rest of the world, "Good riddance." In fact, heroin production increased dramatically after the U.S. invasion. Observing that, as well as the role of corporate agricultural subsidies, weapons contracts, and textile tariffs inadvertently fueling violent extremism, I explained 12 years ago in Huffington Post why a smarter counter-terror strategy would include legalizing the international opium trade to cut off the funding stream on which violent extremists rely. We who got it right were ignored at the time. But we can still help the future. **** Lies about heroin production are not the only ones that we’ve been told. A decade ago, President Obama acknowledged that “we tortured some folks” at sites including Bagram Air Force Base, just an hour outside of Kabul. No one has ever been held accountable for the human rights violations that happened there, including the outright murder of several detainees while in custody. The refusal of the United States to allow accountability for human rights violations played a key role in eroding the legitimacy of the U.S.-backed Afghan government, which fell within a matter of days. Many voices have long noted that any perceived path to military victory was untenable. But too many continue to ignore the role of American exceptionalism, and our own unwillingness to enforce the law against U.S. officials and servicemembers, in presaging the outcome.Outrageously, the current head of the CIA previously destroyed evidence of the Agency’s criminal trail. That had been Gina Haspel’s most prolific “contribution” to the corruption that passes for national security in Washington. Finally, many voices have noted concerns about the potential dangers facing women and girls under whatever future regime emerges Afghanistan. Given the history of the Taliban‘s rule during the 1990s, those concerns are certainly well grounded. They are, however, at best, under inclusive. The numbers of women and girls who died as “collateral damage” from U.S. drone strikes have not been tallied, as far as we know. We do know, however, that the U.S. military whistleblower who revealed that 90% of the deaths from drone strikes are unintended was recently sentenced to years in federal prison. We share the concerns about opportunities for women and girls in Afghanistan going forward. We note, at the same time, that they have shared the brunt of the arbitrary violence to which the country has been subjected over the two decades of the U.S. war there. Too many questions go unasked in Washington. We remain eager to ask the tough questions that others have been unwilling to raise, and appreciate your help forcing these long overdue discussions into the public. Your voice, Shahid | ---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Shahid Buttar for Congress Committee, 1390 Market St., Suite 200, San Francisco, CA 94102 | | Sent via . name: Mo Brooks
subject: Making a List for President Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE MO BROOKS FOR
body:
Peter,
My name is Mo Brooks - I am a proud America
First Conservative. I stood with the President during his
historic term in office, and I stand by him today.
Now, I am running in one of the most crucial
Senate races in the nation.
This race is so important that President
Trump will be hosting a rally in Cullman, Alabama, on August 21st
where he and I will be together backstage before the rally, and I
know he will ask about fundraising.
When he does, I plan to hand him a list of
MAGA Grassroots Donors, and I need to know if he will see your
name when I give him that list.
Will President Trump see your name on that
list of patriots?

As a world-renowned real estate tycoon, you
know President Trump pays attention to the numbers, so it's up to
us to exceed his expectations and show him the America First
movement is ready and willing to take this country BACK!
Will YOUR name be on the list of MAGA MVP
donors I give to President Trump???
We've got an uphill battle ahead of us, and
it's going to take all hands on deck. I know President Trump is
counting on patriots like yourself, and so am I.
President Trump needs to know if you are
standing with him, and he will KNOW when he sees your name on
this list of Patriots.
The rally is only a few days away - if you
don't make your donation before August 20th, I am afraid I cannot
include your name on this list.

ADD MY NAME TO THE
LIST OF PATRIOTS

Don't delay - stand for President Trump as he
and I fight to Make America Great Again.
For America,

Mo Brooks
Conservative Candidate for Senate

name: SSG Brian Mast, U.S. Army (ret.)
subject: I served in Afghanistan. Joe Biden Is Lying.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
---
| | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58150386:6jEB9UlNH:m:1:3253819041:24E70D8ACACC0A83A9BEA29908FA4941:r)
---
| Peter,

I lost two legs and a finger serving our country in Afghanistan. Since then, many have asked me if it was worth it. Here's what I tell them:

Those of us that served, we fought for our country. We fought for those on our left and right, and we'll keep our heads high knowing that.

But Joe Biden has abandoned our allies and betrayed the thousands of men and women like me who sacrificed tremendously in pursuit of peace. And now, he's even blaming Donald Trump for the disaster Joe Biden himself caused.

Joe Biden is a liar, and he deserves 100% of the blame for the oncoming humanitarian crisis.

So, in a minute, I'm going to ask you to [join me in fighting to defeat Joe Biden](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58150386:6jEB9UlNH:m:1:3253819041:24E70D8ACACC0A83A9BEA29908FA4941:r), but first let me tell you how I know he's lying...

On the evening of September 19, 2010, I was moving across the battlefield in Kandahar, Afghanistan narrowing in on a high-value target. As a bomb tech, it was my job to clear the way for the rest of our team by finding and disposing of any improvised bombs. I'd step left...and then right...left...and then right. Then...BANG!

The next thing I knew, I was in Walter Reed National Military Medical Center. I looked down to the end of my bed where my feet should have been sticking up, but they weren't. And every day since then when I wake up, I am reminded of my time in Afghanistan. The remnants of this war are going to last me the rest of my life, but I am one of the lucky ones--I made it home.

One member of our team was an Afghan interpreter. Once, he was on a mission and his tennis shoes got stuck in the mud so he finished the mission barefoot. He had a young son and daughter. He fought alongside us and was a friend to America.

Now, Joe Biden has sentenced thousands of Afghans who were our friends and allies to death. He has not learned the most important commitment of our soldiers: we do not leave men or women behind. Instead, he is more focused on the "optics" of the situation. Trying to blame everyone but himself.

**Another lesson I learned in the Army is that leaders take responsibility for their actions. Joe Biden is refusing to do that, and as a result, Joe Biden does not deserve to have the words "commander" or "chief" anywhere in his title. **

[If you agree, please help me hold him accountable and stop his disastrous America Last agenda](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58150386:6jEB9UlNH:m:1:3253819041:24E70D8ACACC0A83A9BEA29908FA4941:r):

name: Glenn Grothman
subject: The Situation in Afghanistan
body:
[](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cwdhkl-yddjllujiu-r/) While the situation continues to evolve, it's clear that the poorly timed and planned U.S. withdrawal from Afghanistan has caused a humanitarian tragedy and will have negative consequences for years to come.

Throughout my career in Congress, I have followed the situation in Afghanistan closely - including in my current role as Ranking Member of the House Oversight Committee Subcommittee on National Security. Despite hearing from 'experts' who testified otherwise, I am not surprised that the Afghan government hasn't been able to withstand the Taliban.

Moreover, I am deeply disappointed that the Biden Administration has not done more to protect Afghans who risked their lives and the lives of their families to support our mission. I will work to ensure we hold those accountable for failing to protect the safety and security of American citizens and our allies.

The brave Americans and Afghan allies who remain in Afghanistan cannot be left behind as it is our duty to protect them from the onslaught from the Taliban that is sure to come.

As your representative, I will do what I can to ensure that the efforts and sacrifices put forth by Americans and our allies in the Middle East are not in vain. I hope you will join me in prayer and reflection for a peaceful and humane resolution to the tragic fallout the world is witnessing in Afghanistan.-Glenn Grothman [](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cwdhkl-yddjllujiu-j/) | Glenn Grothman for Congress
P.O. Box 1215
Fond du Lac, WI 54936 You are receiving this email because you expressed an interest in Glenn Grothman [Unsubscribe](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-u-cwdhkl-yddjllujiu-t/)
---

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We're suing Twitter and we need your help
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58150494:6HSr_UlcN:m:1:3253819041:4FDC826B4C89FB58F7F3C18B1B02F9F7:r) Dear Peter, I'm not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. My team at the Center for American Liberty has recently uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with Big Tech corporations like Facebook and Twitter to de-platform and silence conservatives like you and me. **In other words, we 've caught big government using tax-payer funding to silence their political opponents.** And if someone does not immediately stand up against this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. That's why we launched a lawsuit against Twitter, U.S. Senator Alex Padilla, and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties - _and we need your help to win._ **[Will you join us in our lawsuit against Twitter and Sen. Padilla and help defend the First Amendment?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58150494:6HSr_UlcN:m:1:3253819041:4FDC826B4C89FB58F7F3C18B1B02F9F7:r)** Let me explain... Like millions of Americans after the 2020 presidential election, conservative activist Rogan O'Handley took to Twitter to express his concerns about the dubious election procedures and skepticism of the results. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58150494:6HSr_UlcN:m:1:3253819041:4FDC826B4C89FB58F7F3C18B1B02F9F7:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58150494:6HSr_UlcN:m:1:3253819041:4FDC826B4C89FB58F7F3C18B1B02F9F7:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58150494:6HSr_UlcN:m:1:3253819041:4FDC826B4C89FB58F7F3C18B1B02F9F7:r) Shortly after the election, many of Rogan's tweets were removed by Twitter and his account was permanently suspended for "violating the government's rules about election integrity." _Hopefully, I don 't need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs or opinions is a gross violation of the First Amendment. _ But it gets much worse... When Rogan tried to figure out why he was censored, he found that bureaucrats working for then-California Secretary of State, Alex Padilla, had explicitly instructed officials at Twitter to silence him. You see, Alex Padilla was being considered to fill Kamala Harris' vacated seat in the U.S. Senate - and he was afraid that Rogan's tweets would hurt his image and chances of being appointed. **So, the office of Alex Padilla immediately instructed his press secretary to contact Twitter and shut Rogan up.** **From:** California Secretary of State Communications Department **To:** Twitter **Date:** Tuesday, November 17th, 2020 at 12:31 PM Hi, We wanted to flag this Twitter post: [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58150494:6HSr_UlcN:m:1:3253819041:4FDC826B4C89FB58F7F3C18B1B02F9F7:r) From user @DC_Draino. In this post user claims California of being a culprit of voter fraud, and ignores the fact that we do audit votes. This is a blatant disregard to how our voting process works and creates disinformation and distrust among the general public. Twitter then flagged the post as misinformation, deleted it, and -- a few weeks later -- permanently banned Rogan from the their site. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58150494:6HSr_UlcN:m:1:3253819041:4FDC826B4C89FB58F7F3C18B1B02F9F7:r) That's why my team and I at the Center for America Liberty are suing Twitter, now-Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other liberals for their involvement in this blatant assault on the First Amendment. But the only way we can take on the deep pockets and deep connections of these tyrants is with the help of patriotic Americans like you. [**Will you help us fund this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of just $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58150494:6HSr_UlcN:m:1:3253819041:4FDC826B4C89FB58F7F3C18B1B02F9F7:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. Two years ago, I founded the Center for American Liberty with the purpose of protecting our First Amendment freedoms and civil liberties from being destroyed by today's left. We've taken on Governor Gavin Newsom in California when he unconstitutionally shut down small businesses, banned people from going to church, and kept millions of children locked up in their homes--out of school--during the pandemic. We've taken on Antifa for viciously assaulting and nearly killing journalist Ando Ngo who exposed Antifa's vile, anarchic plot to destroy the United States and turn it into a socialist utopia. **And now, we 're taking on Twitter, Sen. Alex Padilla, and others for colluding to eliminate Rogan O'Handley's freedom of speech. ** But as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the generous help of like-minded conservative patriots like you. And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000. _After all, we are taking a multi-billion-dollar company, the state of California, and a handful of well-connected politicians._ [**So, can I count on you to help us stand up to Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla by making a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58150494:6HSr_UlcN:m:1:3253819041:4FDC826B4C89FB58F7F3C18B1B02F9F7:r) I'm not exaggerating when I say that this is the legal battle that will define our generation - and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, billion-dollar corporations, and faceless government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still in control of our own lives? [**Please join us in this critical fight to defend the First Amendment by contributing $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58150494:6HSr_UlcN:m:1:3253819041:4FDC826B4C89FB58F7F3C18B1B02F9F7:r) Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures would not let go of the bogus and unproven accusation that President Trump colluded with Russia to "steal" the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech to censor conservatives who wanted to comment on the 2020 election those same leftists are dead-silent. I am absolutely fed up with left's hypocrisy, double-standards, and blatantly unconstitutional behavior. [**That 's why I'm urgently asking you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty to help us fund our lawsuit against Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58150494:6HSr_UlcN:m:1:3253819041:4FDC826B4C89FB58F7F3C18B1B02F9F7:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58150494:6HSr_UlcN:m:1:3253819041:4FDC826B4C89FB58F7F3C18B1B02F9F7:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58150494:6HSr_UlcN:m:1:3253819041:4FDC826B4C89FB58F7F3C18B1B02F9F7:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58150494:6HSr_UlcN:m:1:3253819041:4FDC826B4C89FB58F7F3C18B1B02F9F7:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.

clean_body: Dear Peter, I'm not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. My team at the Center for American Liberty has recently uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with Big Tech corporations like Facebook and Twitter to de-platform and silence conservatives like you and me. In other words, we 've caught big government using tax-payer funding to silence their political opponents. And if someone does not immediately stand up against this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. That's why we launched a lawsuit against Twitter, U.S. Senator Alex Padilla, and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties - and we need your help to win. Let me explain... Like millions of Americans after the 2020 presidential election, conservative activist Rogan O'Handley took to Twitter to express his concerns about the dubious election procedures and skepticism of the results. Shortly after the election, many of Rogan's tweets were removed by Twitter and his account was permanently suspended for "violating the government's rules about election integrity." Hopefully, I don 't need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs or opinions is a gross violation of the First Amendment. But it gets much worse... When Rogan tried to figure out why he was censored, he found that bureaucrats working for then-California Secretary of State, Alex Padilla, had explicitly instructed officials at Twitter to silence him. You see, Alex Padilla was being considered to fill Kamala Harris' vacated seat in the U.S. Senate - and he was afraid that Rogan's tweets would hurt his image and chances of being appointed. So, the office of Alex Padilla immediately instructed his press secretary to contact Twitter and shut Rogan up. From: California Secretary of State Communications Department To: Twitter Date: Tuesday, November 17th, 2020 at 12:31 PM Hi, We wanted to flag this Twitter post: From user @DCDraino. In this post user claims California of being a culprit of voter fraud, and ignores the fact that we do audit votes. This is a blatant disregard to how our voting process works and creates disinformation and distrust among the general public. Twitter then flagged the post as misinformation, deleted it, and -- a few weeks later -- permanently banned Rogan from the their site. That's why my team and I at the Center for America Liberty are suing Twitter, now-Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other liberals for their involvement in this blatant assault on the First Amendment. But the only way we can take on the deep pockets and deep connections of these tyrants is with the help of patriotic Americans like you. My name is Harmeet Dhillon. Two years ago, I founded the Center for American Liberty with the purpose of protecting our First Amendment freedoms and civil liberties from being destroyed by today's left. We've taken on Governor Gavin Newsom in California when he unconstitutionally shut down small businesses, banned people from going to church, and kept millions of children locked up in their homes--out of school--during the pandemic. We've taken on Antifa for viciously assaulting and nearly killing journalist Ando Ngo who exposed Antifa's vile, anarchic plot to destroy the United States and turn it into a socialist utopia. And now, we 're taking on Twitter, Sen. Alex Padilla, and others for colluding to eliminate Rogan O'Handley's freedom of speech. But as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the generous help of like-minded conservative patriots like you. And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000. After all, we are taking a multi-billion-dollar company, the state of California, and a handful of well-connected politicians. I'm not exaggerating when I say that this is the legal battle that will define our generation - and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, billion-dollar corporations, and faceless government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still in control of our own lives? Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures would not let go of the bogus and unproven accusation that President Trump colluded with Russia to "steal" the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech to censor conservatives who wanted to comment on the 2020 election those same leftists are dead-silent. I am absolutely fed up with left's hypocrisy, double-standards, and blatantly unconstitutional behavior. subject: Crisis after crisis

body:
The Biden administration has been in office less than year and they are failing the American people on every front.

The Biden administration has been in office less than year and they are failing the American people on every front.

**America is the LAST thing on Joe Biden's agenda.** The actions of this administration will affect our country for generations to come. We can't continue like this. name: John Castorani
subject: Biden's Benghazi Moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
body:
They both sleep soundly during terrorist attacks. It's time to hold Democrats accountable for their failures. | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58150503:6aD4xUl7N:m:1:3253819041:35D54D4C5CCDFBD6F977F8AE76B79F11:r)
---

Peter,

My heart is heavy this morning as I write this email to you. As a veteran of the Army and the United States intelligence community **who deployed to Afghanistan 3 times** over the course of nine years, I'm watching in horror as desperate families cling to U.S. military aircraft in hopes of finding safe haven from the Taliban.

**I spent 19 months inside Afghanistan, so when I tell you that there was a right way to withdraw from this war, and that there was a wrong way to withdrawal, I mean it**. President Biden clearly misled the American public in July when he said that "_**There 's going to be no circumstance where you see people being lifted off the United States embassy**_."

But what angers me more is that I know men like me, who serve in our special forces, will bear the brunt of Biden's decision to pull out of Afghanistan in such a reckless manner. How do I know? **Because I spent six years tracking down the Islamic terrorists who killed our Ambassador in Benghazi, Libya on September 11th, 2012 while Hillary Clinton slept.**

**This is not a withdrawal; this is an abandonment leading to a humanitarian crisis of the likes we have not seen this century**. My heart is breaking for my brothers that I lost on the battlefield, **and for the members of the special forces who are going to be responsible for cleaning up this mess in the near future**.

This crisis perfectly sums up why I'm running for Congress, and today **[I'm asking you to lend your support to my campaign](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58150503:6aD4xUl7N:m:1:3253819041:35D54D4C5CCDFBD6F977F8AE76B79F11:r)**. I don't have to run for Congress, I've got a great job and a newborn son at home. But this absolute shit storm that Biden created should keep us all up at night.**I 've interrogated Taliban terrorists at Bagram Airfield in Kabul, I can tell you on good authority that Biden was well aware that something like this could happen**.

| [**STOP BIDEN
Send an Afghan Vet to Congress ** **› › **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58150503:6aD4xUl7N:m:1:3253819041:35D54D4C5CCDFBD6F977F8AE76B79F11:r)
---

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58150503:6aD4xUl7N:m:1:3253819041:35D54D4C5CCDFBD6F977F8AE76B79F11:r)
An article in the Wall Street Journal summed up the situation rather succinctly saying, "_**The jihadists the U.S. toppled 20 years ago for sheltering Osama bin Laden will not fly their flag over the U.S. Embassy building on the 20th anniversary of 9/11**_."

**The Taliban 's advances come as no surprise to us veterans of the Afghanistan conflict, I personally have deployed to Afghanistan 3 times during both my time in the Army and within the Intelligence Community**. We all knew that the Afghan National Army and Uniformed Police was an ineffective fighting force propped by U.S. logistics, U.S. air support and U.S. funding. Make no mistakes folks, our feckless "**leader** " President Biden was briefed on all of these facts, he was a U.S. Senator for the first 7 years of Afghanistan, the Vice President for 8 years... yet he still went through with a hasty withdrawal without addressing the possibility of a humanitarian crisis we are currently seeing. **Mr. President, the blood is on your hands**.

Folks, Democrats have complete control over Washington. **This abject failure happened on their watch, and they seem perfectly at peace to sit in their gilded offices as desperate Afghans die attempting to cling to American military planes evacuating our personnel**.

**Democrats have abandoned the Afghan people at their hour of need**. Our credibility as a superpower is shot. And what does Nancy Pelosi do? She tweets that "_The Taliban must know the world is watching its actions_."

[**STOP BIDEN
Send an Afghan Vet to Congress ** **› › **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58150503:6aD4xUl7N:m:1:3253819041:35D54D4C5CCDFBD6F977F8AE76B79F11:r)
---

Republicans are by no means perfect, but had we had a seat at the table when these outlandish decisions were made, perhaps we could have stopped what we're seeing unfold today. **President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have all but ensured that my children and possibly grandchildren will fight the Taliban like I have**.

**[Today I'm asking you to make a donation to my campaign for Congress, because I assure you that if I'm given the opportunity to serve, I'll make sure Biden and Pelosi are held to account for these foolish decisions](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58150503:6aD4xUl7N:m:1:3253819041:35D54D4C5CCDFBD6F977F8AE76B79F11:r)**.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58150503:6aD4xUl7N:m:1:3253819041:35D54D4C5CCDFBD6F977F8AE76B79F11:r)
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58150503:6aD4xUl7N:m:1:3253819041:35D54D4C5CCDFBD6F977F8AE76B79F11:r)

[**HELP ME FIGHT FOR AMERICA'S FUTURE
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58150503:6aD4xUl7N:m:1:3253819041:35D54D4C5CCDFBD6F977F8AE76B79F11:r)
---

**Having been to Afghanistan three times** I can assure you the people of Afghanistan want and deserve an end to the bloodshed, conflict and violence. The people of Afghanistan want and deserve peace and security, access to education, employment and the political process. **We have fought so hard together for the last two decades, our coalition and the Afghan people - we should not allow those hard-fought freedoms to be taken away by the Taliban**.

While we watch in horror from the safety of the United States, the Chinese Communist leadership in Beijing are toasting to our failure.

For America
John Castorani
Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07

| Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
---

name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: A look at where we're at, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | Peter, We just took a look to see if we met our $12,500 mid-month fundraising goal. **The not-so-great news: **We fell short of what we needed to raise to cover our expenses and get ready for the 2022 primaries. **The good news:** We are $4,881 short, which means with just a few hundred grassroots supporters giving $3, $7, or $25, we can close the gap and meet our goal. **We can't trust Indiana Republicans to create a better future for Hoosier families. **That's why we need to do everything we can to elect more hard-working community leaders up and down the ballot. [_**When you chip in $25, you are fueling the movement that helped elect Democrats like Eddie Melton, Mitch Gore, and Chris Campbell. They counted on your support before, and now, they are counting on you to contribute today to elect new Democratic leaders to the Statehouse. **_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34244661/301358758/624230061?refcode=WhatWeAreDoing.FR.08.18.21.&amount=25&WhatAreWeDoing.FR.08.18.21.=WhatAreWeDoing.FR.08.18.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGMyYjk0ZS0xZDAwLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j1RDiRvfcr74LJ8MgEc2IuopBuxRMKNtpeHm2FhRk9k=) Indiana Democrats have been working hard to deliver for Hoosiers. clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | Peter, We just took a look to see if we met our $12,500 mid-month fundraising goal. The not-so-great news: We fell short of what we needed to raise to cover our expenses and get ready for the 2022 primaries. The good news: We are $4,881 short, which means with just a few hundred grassroots supporters giving $3, $7, or $25, we can close the gap and meet our goal. We can't trust Indiana Republicans to create a better future for Hoosier families. That's why we need to do everything we can to elect more hard-working community leaders up and down the ballot. = Indiana Democrats have been working hard to deliver for Hoosiers. From traveling all around the state to tell Hoosiers about the American Rescue Plan and American Jobs Plan to calling out Indiana Republicans for rigging the redistricting process, Indiana Democrats know that our work is not done until we end the INGOP's extreme partisanship and create a better tomorrow for the state we call home. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = = Every single grassroots contribution makes a huge difference because without your support we can't continue to fight for Hoosier families. = In Solidarity, Indiana Democratic Party | ---|--- | | = | Connect With Us | | Indiana Democratic Party 101 W. name: Jim Banks, Chairman
subject: I'm disgusted

body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58151385:6qFRqUlND:m:1:3253819041:8583AA879A47FC915D40BE9B03B1C89F:r) Peter, As an Afghanistan combat veteran and a member of the House Armed Services committee, I am truly disgusted with what Joe Biden has allowed to happen. Thousands of American soldiers like myself, fought in Afghanistan to defend our nation and secure freedom for the men, women and children of that country. Joe Biden has undone **ALL of that**. Instead of listening to the intelligence, the Biden administration ordered a hasty, unplanned evacuation that would only lead to the Taliban taking back over. The terrible images we have seen from Afghanistan are something that will never be forgotten. **_This would not have happened under President Trump 's watch._**
We need answers from the Biden administration **NOW.** [**Will you stand with me and hold the Biden administration accountable, Peter?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58151386:6qFRqUlND:m:1:3253819041:8583AA879A47FC915D40BE9B03B1C89F:r) [**DEMAND ANSWERS**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58151385:6qFRqUlND:m:1:3253819041:8583AA879A47FC915D40BE9B03B1C89F:r) This utter failure in leadership must not go unnoticed. It has become clear that Joe Biden is simply not capable of leading our nation for another 3 years. [**Stand with House Conservatives and myself and demand accountability. >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58151386:6qFRqUlND:m:1:3253819041:8583AA879A47FC915D40BE9B03B1C89F:r) Thank you, Jim Banks Chairman, House Conservatives Fund _JIM BANKS IS A MEMBER OF THE U.S. NAVY RESERVES. USE OF HIS MILITARY RANK, JOB TITLES, AND PHOTOGRAPHS IN UNIFORM DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT BY THE DEPARTMENT OF THE NAVY OR THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE._ _Founded in 1997, the House Conservatives Fund (HCF) has been the political arm of the Republican Study Committee (RSC), the largest caucus of conservatives in Congress. For more than two decades, HCF has been pursuing its mission of electing and retaining members who are committed to our core conservative principles. HCF 's current roster of 140 members understands that our mission has never been more urgent than it is today._ House Conservatives Fund [Privacy Policy](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58151387:6qFRqUlND:m:1:3253819041:8583AA879A47FC915D40BE9B03B1C89F:r).

clean_body: It’s just plain undemocratic. | = = Peter — The GOP has a plan to take back the House. The plan isn’t to win more voters or to support popular policies that help working families. The plan is to double down on extreme partisan gerrymandering in southern states like North Carolina. We CAN’T let that happen. The U.S. Census Bureau just released the data our state needs to redraw our congressional maps. And it’s clear Republicans will use gerrymandering to pick their voters, instead of allowing the voters to pick their representatives. There’s a word for that:undemocratic. This isn’t anything new. In 2011, North Carolina Republicans drew maps that deliberately disenfranchised Black voters with such precision that the Supreme Court eventually ruled them unconstitutional. Today, Roy is leading the fight to out-organize and outvote the North Carolina GOP. But he needs your help to keep Democrats competitive in NC. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = = Thanks for your support, Team Cooper = = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. clean_body: | | This is where Ron Johnson stands: | “Nobody’s senator but theirs: Ron Johnson’s backroom dealing shows who he’s working for. It’s not you.” Here are the facts: Ron Johnson, the eighth richest member of the Senate , had Wisconsin’s wealthiest right-wing billionaires spend $20 million on behalf of his reelection campaign, then fought hard to ensure they received gigantic tax breaks. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = But, Ron Johnson’s blatant corruption gets worse. After receiving a briefing on the dangers of the COVID-19 pandemic early in 2020, Johnson sold his financial holdings in a company in February of that year (weeks before the lockdowns began). He made a whopping $25 million from the sale. After making his dirty money, he consistently voted against any COVID relief for Americans. Wisconsin deserves better than this sorry excuse for a Senator. = Thank you for stepping up, Nelson HQ | | | | = Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. name: PACT - Parents Against Critical Theory
subject: Teachers Union LAWSUIT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Parents Against Critical Theory
body:
They are SUING a parent for requesting to know what her child is learning.

| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58151416:6szsOUlNS:m:1:3253819041:28A3A460F5F0523173427B05D6782598:r)
---
Peter,

**A teacher's union is SUING a parent for daring to ask what her child is learning in school.**

_A Rhode Island chapter of the National Education Association has filed a lawsuit against a parent in order to block the release of records concerning Critical Race Theory and gender "education" in schools._

**In other words, the NEA has filed a lawsuit to keep parents in the dark about the indoctrination being forced upon their children.**

Parents Against Critical Theory (PACT) is fighting for the rights of all parents, but we need your help to come out victorious. **Would you donate today to help us take down the teachers unions and their manipulative games?**

**[DONATE HERE to help us fight back against the Teachers Unions> >](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58151416:6szsOUlNS:m:1:3253819041:28A3A460F5F0523173427B05D6782598:r)**
| | [$25](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58151416:6szsOUlNS:m:1:3253819041:28A3A460F5F0523173427B05D6782598:r "###")
---
| [$35](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58151416:6szsOUlNS:m:1:3253819041:28A3A460F5F0523173427B05D6782598:r "###")
---
| [$50](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58151416:6szsOUlNS:m:1:3253819041:28A3A460F5F0523173427B05D6782598:r "###")
---
| [$100](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58151416:6szsOUlNS:m:1:3253819041:28A3A460F5F0523173427B05D6782598:r "###")

| [$250](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58151416:6szsOUlNS:m:1:3253819041:28A3A460F5F0523173427B05D6782598:r "###")
---
| [Other](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58151416:6szsOUlNS:m:1:3253819041:28A3A460F5F0523173427B05D6782598:r "###")
---

In a complaint filed in the Superior Court, the teacher's union claims that the teaching records are "private," and their release must be balanced against the "rights" of teachers.

**They are completely forgetting about the rights of parents.** We have a right to know exactly what our children are being taught in the schools that WE fund with OUR tax dollars.

_We can no longer look to our elected officials to defend us. We must take matters into our own hands and fight for change._

_Join us and the millions of parents that have had enough as we fight CRT and institutionalized racism._

**[DONATE HERE to help PACT put an end to the lawsuits and bullying. >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58151416:6szsOUlNS:m:1:3253819041:28A3A460F5F0523173427B05D6782598:r)**

If we don't stand up, then no one will.

Sincerely,

Parents Against Critical Theory

[**SUPPORT PACT > >**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58151416:6szsOUlNS:m:1:3253819041:28A3A460F5F0523173427B05D6782598:r)

name: Rep. Vincent Dixie
subject: 13,000 Lives and Counting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Jesse Chism Treasurer
body:
We must protect Tennesseans.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34255661/301399951/-361920907?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODcxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTVmNjQxMS0zNTAwLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aIhw9-OGDrpng7R60TeOLYJW-kpGP7MHbn_e32EKeVE=#)
Dear Peter,
Myself and my colleagues in Tennessee’s House Democratic Caucus have spent the last 18 months pleading with TN GOP members to protect Tennessee families from COVID-19, and every single time the GOP Supermajority has refused to meet this moment.
Now, case loads are as high as they were at the height of the pandemic, hospitals are once again full and stopping elective surgeries, and the death toll is quickly surpassing 13,000 Tennesseans. More than 10,000 school-aged children have contracted COVID19 in the past two weeks and the amount of children on ventilators is at an all time high.
What did my colleagues do in response to the growing crisis? Manipulate their puppet, Governor Bill Lee, into signing an executive order to undermine local school districts from protecting students.
**[Tennessee families deserve House members who will protect them. Will you make a contribution to help defeat the TN GOP House Supermajority and elect those who will protect our families?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34255669/301399956/-361920907?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODcxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTVmNjQxMS0zNTAwLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aIhw9-OGDrpng7R60TeOLYJW-kpGP7MHbn_e32EKeVE=#)**
Fighting for our lives,
Chairman Vincent Dixie
State Representative, District 54
Tennessee House Democratic Caucus Chairman
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34255674/301399964/-361920907?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODcxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTVmNjQxMS0zNTAwLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aIhw9-OGDrpng7R60TeOLYJW-kpGP7MHbn_e32EKeVE=#)

name: Tina Ramirez
subject: I'm here to listen
body:
Tina Ramirez for Congress

Tell me what matters most

Peter,

My opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has teamed up with Nancy Pelosi,
Ilhan Omar, and AOC to spend thousands hiring political polling
firms to tell Spanberger what she should say and think to win the
election.

They know this is a national race and they know this seat is
vulnerable.

But I don't care what the fake polls tell me, I only care about
what you think Peter.

That is why every month I will continue to ask you what issues
matter most and listen to what is bothering you, not some special
interest groups.

When I become a Congresswoman, I am working for YOU - not the
other way around.

So please take a moment and tell me what issues matter most to
you. >>

TAKE THE ISSUES POLL

This prompt 7 question survey will
represent your views of the 7th congressional district and help
shape our campaign. Remember, Peter, your voice counts.

Please take our Issue Poll here:
www.TinaRamirez.com/august-survey

Thank you,

Tina Ramirez
Republican Front-Runner
Virginia's 7th Congressional District

body:
We make history

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34256842/301403199/-793144256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmM1ZDliNy0zNTAwLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oyN9hEXV4o9uRyIyFBEylOKSPQ_wujBinztW6YI3gTg=&emci=bf786e61-6aff-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=cfc5d9b7-3500-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15759664)

| | Derek,

When Democrats win, we make history.

We made history two years ago when we flipped the House of Delegates for the first time in a generation. We made history when we ratified the Equal Rights Amendment, passed commonsense gun reforms, expanded access to healthcare, passed the G3 community college program, legalized marijuana, abolished the death penalty, and passed the Virginia Voting Rights Act.

I know that I am not the first person to tell you this (and probably will not be the last) but this year’s election could undo all of that progress we have made. We made history, but the GOP could wipe it all away.

Electing my friends Terry McAuliffe, Hala Ayala, and Mark Herring is incredibly important to protecting our progress -- but it is also important to maintain our majority in the House of Delegates.

The good thing is we have an amazing slate of candidates running for the House this year. The bad thing is that we have a lot of toss-up races that we could lose, handing the Republicans back the majority.

I know how hard we all worked to take the majority in 2019. **It is with that in mind that I’m asking for your help supporting Virginia Democrats again.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between the DPVA and the Energized for Change PAC:_

clean_body: We make history | | | Derek, When Democrats win, we make history. We made history two years ago when we flipped the House of Delegates for the first time in a generation. We made history when we ratified the Equal Rights Amendment, passed commonsense gun reforms, expanded access to healthcare, passed the G3 community college program, legalized marijuana, abolished the death penalty, and passed the Virginia Voting Rights Act. I know that I am not the first person to tell you this (and probably will not be the last) but this year’s election could undo all of that progress we have made. We made history, but the GOP could wipe it all away. Electing my friends Terry McAuliffe, Hala Ayala, and Mark Herring is incredibly important to protecting our progress -- but it is also important to maintain our majority in the House of Delegates. The good thing is we have an amazing slate of candidates running for the House this year. The bad thing is that we have a lot of toss-up races that we could lose, handing the Republicans back the majority. I know how hard we all worked to take the majority in 2019. It is with that in mind that I’m asking for your help supporting Virginia Democrats again. | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between the DPVA and the Energized for Change PAC: = = = = = Thank you for getting us this far, I hope you will join us again this year. Sincerely yours, Eileen Filler-Corn = = | | Click here to . | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Democratic Party of Virginia PO Box 448 Richmond, VA 23218 United States

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Biden's Enormous Blunder
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TnEytcJmi2XgGRQ2JaIFsbF3KXIVjnVCgVBEHzsvcZrcHE0sY5Arucd_BNQCEfPgCFESiRAeyT0Xm1zYcAyIyG45va5M3bLNQ0ZFM4qV_GkaLu9uszmDbyi54T93ajyRBXRssSz4vMAdDFtg3Gaymn-IC-OMpfa4mA3mZjtzmL37pnrw0CxHoAWeHzhkMvkKb73xs5sn7rUONAxngEeyKsHx0VxttRXSZ5NVTta301ZLYI1PRIJMZ4QAzXi_SgNMORNKE6inC_8=&c=CuKYWIPVzZhY7MGZY1asGMWk4DLKhs9-B0fPKYOXDbWjGI5iE5q96Q==&ch=sWqvTNykze1Dp8fvt3hMXuTO1646hin28G4V7gMWykI26ddU05ZZCQ==)
---
| |
---
| Biden's Enormous Blunder
---
| This oped by Dan Crenshaw was published in the August 18th print edition of [The Wall Street Journal](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TnEytcJmi2XgGRQ2JaIFsbF3KXIVjnVCgVBEHzsvcZrcHE0sY5AruUSEL2G5NYU5CdFk4FtPWPpu88tn8SKCNAQ_kOqbqbvKGDdrUSLTRkUXHmAIroon5SD3Zar2hOaTm_GR556LvLM23CHNkeH6zlKtelHZYO_ezV80VFDfBRqEelX9tlsXiXcdZw2eVHh9Kfj5OUO8EDPX0v-vHbMNRJAfoXKbmP1M-wWo6WtSiSXrnEsp5sq4vsrX7T-gUFLXL8TmqqV_Z3X2aqnbYlc6_A==&c=CuKYWIPVzZhY7MGZY1asGMWk4DLKhs9-B0fPKYOXDbWjGI5iE5q96Q==&ch=sWqvTNykze1Dp8fvt3hMXuTO1646hin28G4V7gMWykI26ddU05ZZCQ==)
---
|
Almost everyone agrees that what's happening in Afghanistan is an unmitigated disaster. There is no way to whitewash it, and few are trying. The scenes from Kabul speak for themselves, casting shame and embarrassment on the world's greatest superpower. There is plenty of blame being passed around, including to the "neocons," the generals and the Afghans themselves. But what got us here was the widespread belief that American foreign policy should be dictated by a simple slogan: "No more endless wars." The current spokesman for that belief is President Biden.
The argument for bringing the troops home is an emotional one, arising from exhaustion with overseas conflict. Most people don't understand the situation in Afghanistan, and that causes distrust and anger. Few deny we needed to take action after 9/11, but few understood what our strategy would be after we got there. Leaders failed to explain that simply leaving would allow the Taliban to re-emerge and again provide safe haven for terrorists. Americans felt stuck and became exhausted over the years with the vast sums of money spent and lives lost, seemingly in a futile attempt to build democracy.
With this growing impatience, the case for cutting our losses grew stronger. But it fails to acknowledge trade-offs--and this simple question: If we evacuate Afghanistan, what will happen? The "no more endless wars" crowd always refused to answer. They prefer to live in a dream world rather than face the reality that our enemies are ideologically opposed to Western civilization and will gladly stage another 9/11 if they have the opportunity and means. They are at war with us whether or not we are at war with them. Leaving Afghanistan would inevitably create a terrorist safe haven.
That simple reality was never properly explained to the public. When Quinnipiac asked in a [May survey](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TnEytcJmi2XgGRQ2JaIFsbF3KXIVjnVCgVBEHzsvcZrcHE0sY5AruUSEL2G5NYU5Eix8yKlRbS72zh3rWVbjEUQQIjZuVIAHtFISmapk3BuqOdXRAyWP4QQD9RV3SeNegCwFH1C9NbJT_QpuAevyQlY18UpVzS3Q7TDKbCTQV95exeXlOX8nwQ==&c=CuKYWIPVzZhY7MGZY1asGMWk4DLKhs9-B0fPKYOXDbWjGI5iE5q96Q==&ch=sWqvTNykze1Dp8fvt3hMXuTO1646hin28G4V7gMWykI26ddU05ZZCQ==), "Should we leave Afghanistan?" 62% of respondents said yes. But what if the question was framed more completely: "Should we leave Afghanistan even if it means an increased threat of terrorism to the homeland?"
The "no more endless wars" position has another blind spot: Its advocates are unable to distinguish between wasteful nation building and a small residual force that conducts occasional counterterror operations. As a result, when many Americans hear that there is a single soldier on the ground in Afghanistan, they interpret it to mean "nation building" and "world police."
That's wrong. There are a lot of foreign policy options between nation building and giving up. We found the proper balance in recent years--maintaining a small force that propped up the Afghan government while also giving us the capability to strike at Taliban and other terrorist networks as needed. When Echelon [asked](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TnEytcJmi2XgGRQ2JaIFsbF3KXIVjnVCgVBEHzsvcZrcHE0sY5AruUSEL2G5NYU5TtLpEvRAojEnp4PsqjzuIDEbC4WT46U5qFfq0f-mhdU_K_aUveMAiLabZlWSUKmBVENcBIwa65-erufdPSCJk4a4M8nawHeij2DhtnG0qoVtOxPUtj84dMqkUX-wrB-jo7zoWpVquSKCZz0MpVB6og==&c=CuKYWIPVzZhY7MGZY1asGMWk4DLKhs9-B0fPKYOXDbWjGI5iE5q96Q==&ch=sWqvTNykze1Dp8fvt3hMXuTO1646hin28G4V7gMWykI26ddU05ZZCQ==) about the troop presence this way in July, more Americans, Republican and Democratic, supported a small military presence in Afghanistan than ending our presence entirely.
The U.S. presence in Afghanistan was meeting the original strategic goal of denying a safe haven for terrorists and preventing another 9/11. The 18 months before withdrawal saw no U.S. combat deaths. Does that really sound like "endless war" in any traditional sense? More important, does it sound better or worse than the current outcome?
Mr. Biden's decision was reckless and unnecessary. Policy aside, there wasn't even political pressure to take such thoughtless action. The facts on the ground didn't warrant a hasty withdrawal, and intelligence predicted the Taliban would eventually take over. Even worse, this decision was made as the spring fighting season began, all but guaranteeing a Taliban offensive emboldened by the knowledge of an imminent U.S. withdrawal and a collapse of morale by our Afghan allies in uniform and in government.
America didn't lose a war, or even end one. We gave up on a strategic national-security interest. We gave up on our Afghan allies, expecting them to stave off a ruthless insurgency without our crucial support, which came at minimal cost to us. This administration's actions are heartless, its justifications nonsensical. The consequences are dire for innocent Afghans and for America's prestige. Twenty years after 9/11, I pray they don't become equally dire for Americans at home.
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | [Donate Now](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TnEytcJmi2XgGRQ2JaIFsbF3KXIVjnVCgVBEHzsvcZrcHE0sY5Arucd_BNQCEfPgCFESiRAeyT0Xm1zYcAyIyG45va5M3bLNQ0ZFM4qV_GkaLu9uszmDbyi54T93ajyRBXRssSz4vMAdDFtg3Gaymn-IC-OMpfa4mA3mZjtzmL37pnrw0CxHoAWeHzhkMvkKb73xs5sn7rUONAxngEeyKsHx0VxttRXSZ5NVTta301ZLYI1PRIJMZ4QAzXi_SgNMORNKE6inC_8=&c=CuKYWIPVzZhY7MGZY1asGMWk4DLKhs9-B0fPKYOXDbWjGI5iE5q96Q==&ch=sWqvTNykze1Dp8fvt3hMXuTO1646hin28G4V7gMWykI26ddU05ZZCQ==)
---

subject: A quick fundraising update

Hi there, We're halfway through our third fundraising quarter, but we're still short of where we need to be. This isn't great, considering how much money Republicans are already raising AND spending against us. Just this month, Donald Trump reported __$102 million in the bank__ , and news outlets predict he will use it to take back the Senate. Missing fundraising goals, even small ones, can put us behind and potentially cost us the election. name: Team Malcolm
subject: a campaign centered on working folks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
As you know, all eyes are on our race
#

Folks,
As you know, all eyes are on our race. That's because Pennsylvania's open Senate seat is going to be one of the most competitive races of 2022 — it's one of only three toss-ups in the entire country.
That means our fight to hold our Democratic Senate majority will come down to Pennsylvania. And the GOP has already signaled that they’re ready to spend millions of dollars on keeping this seat.
So our strategy to win this primary and send Malcolm to the Senate to be a champion for working families is all about bringing a huge, diverse coalition of folks together behind our movement for working people.
And that strategy is funded by thousands of small donations to our campaign (mostly through emails like this one).
**We’re incredibly grateful to the supporters who have already contributed to send Malcolm to Washington, at an average contribution of just $27.**
But it’s going to take a LOT of $27 contributions to compete in this crowded race and share our message with people all across the Commonwealth of Pennsylvania.
[So we’re asking: Can you make your first contribution to keep up our momentum this week? Whether it’s $5, $27, or another amount, it’s donations like these that keep our campaign centered on the things that matter to working folks.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34261300/301413945/-353695395?refcode2=0cf8ac5d-3d00-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210818-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2Y4YWM1ZC0zZDAwLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KeEoH2bF1qtVv9HkTLKenHeaweifQIMqcBh0YMcz55Q=)

clean_body: As you know, all eyes are on our race Folks, As you know, all eyes are on our race. That's because Pennsylvania's open Senate seat is going to be one of the most competitive races of 2022 — it's one of only three toss-ups in the entire country. That means our fight to hold our Democratic Senate majority will come down to Pennsylvania. And the GOP has already signaled that they’re ready to spend millions of dollars on keeping this seat. So our strategy to win this primary and send Malcolm to the Senate to be a champion for working families is all about bringing a huge, diverse coalition of folks together behind our movement for working people. And that strategy is funded by thousands of small donations to our campaign (mostly through emails like this one). We’re incredibly grateful to the supporters who have already contributed to send Malcolm to Washington, at an average contribution of just $27. But it’s going to take a LOT of $27 contributions to compete in this crowded race and share our message with people all across the Commonwealth of Pennsylvania. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thanks in advance for pitching in. We couldn't lead this important fight without you. \- Team Malcolm * Paid for by Malcolm PAC Malcolm PAC PO Box 22395 Philadelphia, PA 19110 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: FWD: Potential criminal charges for Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
Friend: I wanted to make sure you didn't miss my message about the potential for criminal charges against Donald Trump (below).
I intend to use the full force of the Senate Judiciary Committee to get to the bottom of Trump's attempts to overturn the election - and I assure you, we'll take this investigation wherever the facts may lead us. Even if those facts implicate the former president.
But as I write to you, Trump's right-wing allies are working overtime to obstruct our investigation and brush the former president's disgraceful, anti-democratic behavior under the rug. **I 'm determined to hold Trump and his associates accountable, but I need you with me to win this fight. So please, before 11:59 p.m. tonight, click here to let me know where you stand:**
**[Should criminal charges be considered for Donald Trump's attempts to abuse the power of his office and overturn the 2020 election?](http://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-trump-crimes?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1064-su-nd)****
Thanks so much for taking the time.
Dick
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Richard Blumenthal**
Date: Fri, Aug 13, 2021
Subject: Potential criminal charges for Trump
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=KjhsVpF6yiYHT%2B3O8rfNXdaj3UlhFZwi&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
There has been a major new development.
I recently heard closed-door testimony from Jeff Rosen, the acting attorney general during Donald Trump's final weeks in office.
The details that Rosen revealed to the Senate Judiciary Committee about Trump's attempts to use the power of the presidency to overturn the 2020 election were simply chilling.
What's clearer than ever: In his frenzied final weeks in office, Trump brought our country - our system of free and fair elections, the very foundation of our democracy - dangerously close to total catastrophe. Only the character and resilience of a handful of individuals saved us from going over the precipice as a nation.
**Donald Trump mounted a pressure campaign that was absolutely relentless, brutal, and directly aimed at the Department of Justice - seeking to weaponize it for his own political benefit - with intent to overthrow the election.**
**And as a former U.S. Attorney and a state attorney general for 20 years, I know there is a real potential for criminal charges. The facts must be gathered and all options should be seriously considered.**
Our committee intends to hear from more key witnesses in the coming weeks to reveal the full extent of Trump's wrongdoing. **But as right-wing attempts to derail our committee and cover up Trump 's crimes ramp up, I need to know you're with me in our fight to get the facts and hold Trump accountable. Please, click the link to let me know where you stand now:**
**[Should criminal charges be considered for Donald Trump's attempts to abuse the power of his office and overturn the 2020 election?](http://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-trump-crimes?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1064-su-nd)**
These latest revelations demonstrate that we must continue investigating the former president and his acolytes -- holding them accountable for the grave damages he attempted to inflict on our democratic institutions. It's incumbent upon all of us to speak out. I appreciate you raising your voice alongside mine.
Dick

name: Team Rob Ortt
subject: Afghanistan evacuation is personal for Senate Minority Leader Ortt
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ORTT FOR STATE SENATE
body:
Rob Ortt joins Spectrum News to share his thoughts on Afghan evacuation
---
| | | | | | |
---
---
| |
---
Afghanistan evacuation is personal for New York Senate Minority Leader Ortt
---
---
LOCKPORT, N.Y. -- In 2008, as a member of the New York Army National Guard, now state Senate Minority Leader Rob Ortt was part of a police mentor team in Afghanistan that trained the country's National Police in and around Kandahar City and Kandahar Province.
He said the goal of that mission was to make sure the police and the army could take control and defend their country when U.S. troops inevitably left.
"There's a sense of ownership of that mission and there's a sense of, like, we have to succeed, so I can justify the sacrifice, I can justify the loss, and it's hard to do that right now," Ortt said.
This week, Ortt watched the collapse of that Afghan government from home with the Taliban retaking control of the government following the U.S. withdrawal of troops.
"I was angry," he said. "I was in disbelief, frustrated, sad. I was heartbroken for all the Gold Star families who lost soldiers, who lost brothers, sons, daughters, husbands. I was also sad for people like the interpreters who we worked with who you get to know very well and they're with you on every mission."
Ortt, who joined the military in response to Al Qaeda's attacks on September 11, 2001, said he believed in the mission but it's hard now not to feel like much of it was in vain.
"It feels like that," Ortt said. "I can't let that be. I can't just sit there and say it was all for nothing."

He said the goal of that mission was to make sure the police and the army could take control and defend their country when U.S. troops inevitably left. "There's a sense of ownership of that mission and there's a sense of, like, we have to succeed, so I can justify the sacrifice, I can justify the loss, and it's hard to do that right now," Ortt said. This week, Ortt watched the collapse of that Afghan government from home with the Taliban retaking control of the government following the U.S. withdrawal of troops. "I was angry," he said. "I was in disbelief, frustrated, sad. I was heartbroken for all the Gold Star families who lost soldiers, who lost brothers, sons, daughters, husbands. I was also sad for people like the interpreters who we worked with who you get to know very well and they're with you on every mission." Ortt, who joined the military in response to Al Qaeda's attacks on September 11, 2001, said he believed in the mission but it's hard now not to feel like much of it was in vain. "It feels like that," Ortt said. "I can't let that be. I can't just sit there and say it was all for nothing." == == | | | | If you are a veteran or have a loved in need of someone to talk to, please contact the National Veteran Crisis Hotline at 1-800-273-8255 and press 1. | | | | | SENATOR REPUBLICAN LEADER ROB ORTT == | == == | | | | Use of Rob Ortt's military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, the Department of the Army or the New York Army National Guard | PAID FOR BY ORTT FOR STATE SENATE | | Ortt for State Senate | PO Box 1279, North Tonawanda, NY 14120 | | Sent by mailto:info@robortt.com powered by
