name: Joan Greene
subject: [ANNOUNCING] Joan Greene For Phoenix City Council
body:
I am excited to announce my candidacy for Phoenix City Council, District 6 seat. Phoenix is where I was born, educated, started a business, raised my family, volunteer, and will always fight for.

| | | | |
---
| | [](https://joangreeneaz.lt.acemlnc.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZqb2FuZ3JlZW5lYXouY29tJTJG&a=66715302&account=joangreeneaz%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=f4c37e1e8c793c25028af187405f72b3&i=203A211A1A2258)
---
| | **
**Hi!

I am excited to announce my candidacy for Phoenix City Council, District 6 seat.
Phoenix is where I was born, educated, started a business, raised my family, volunteer, and will always fight for.

The overwhelming support I received from District 6, Arizona, and the Country as a Congressional candidate demonstrated I can unite a diverse Community around our kitchen table issues.

I am running for City Council because the health and economic crisis has made it clear to all of us local elections matter.

We are faced with daunting challenges that require a combination of a bold vision and common-sense solutions:

* The homeless crisis
* Affordable and healthy housing
* Workforce development and small business support
* Public safety and accountability
* Environmental protection
* End corruption and government waste

Striving for win-win outcomes will help us grow and prosper together. We achieve this when we elect people whose focus is community interest and not self-interest.

Please join me as we travel down the path for a better tomorrow!

Our community. Our future.

Visit JoanGreeneAZ.com to get to know me and our campaign.

****
---
| | Thank you,
\- Joan Greene

---
| | |
---
| | | | [](https://joangreeneaz.lt.acemlnc.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tJTJGSm9hbkdyZWVuZUFaJTJG&a=66715302&account=joangreeneaz%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=f4c37e1e8c793c25028af187405f72b3&i=203A211A1A2259) | | [](https://joangreeneaz.lt.acemlnc.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0d2l0dGVyLmNvbSUyRmpvYW5ncmVlbmVheg==&a=66715302&account=joangreeneaz%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=f4c37e1e8c793c25028af187405f72b3&i=203A211A1A2260) | | [](https://joangreeneaz.lt.acemlnc.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZqb2FuZ3JlZW5lYXouY29t&a=66715302&account=joangreeneaz%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=f4c37e1e8c793c25028af187405f72b3&i=203A211A1A2261)

Partisan Democrats from all of the nation are targeting Trump-Endorsed Senator Tim Scott with demeaning, racist attacks on his character. They’re calling him a “token” Republican and saying that all his supporters are “white supremecists.” These vicious slurs aren’t just attacks on Senator Scott’s character, Peter. They’re attacks on you, too. And they’re attacks on America. The fact is that the Left can’t imagine a popular, successful, Black Republican. body:
Let's face it: I am not afraid of the liberals in DC, and they **WANT ME GONE**.
| | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/PD7aHp2nR9rXJkc763mmE4pw/6AbleoybrCaxCaY0YrcrqA) | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, Greene for Congress.
**We encourage you to[visit their site today](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/PD7aHp2nR9rXJkc763mmE4pw/6AbleoybrCaxCaY0YrcrqA)**.
---

---
| [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/PD7aHp2nR9rXJkc763mmE4pw/6AbleoybrCaxCaY0YrcrqA "Alert") [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/PD7aHp2nR9rXJkc763mmE4pw/6AbleoybrCaxCaY0YrcrqA "Headline") Fellow Patriot: **Let 's face it:** I am not afraid of the liberals in DC, and they **WANT ME GONE**. In fact, they're throwing everything at me, including the kitchen sink, to get me out of their way. **The latest: Big Tech has suspended my Twitter account AGAIN** - all because I refuse to allow Biden and Pelosi to force vaccines on American citizens. The entire liberal establishment, from the Silicon Valley Cartel to Sleepy Joe to the Mainstream Media, is coming down on any American Patriot who dares to question the liberal vaccine plan. If we are going to reclaim our nation, we need to start fighting, RIGHT NOW. **[Will you help me fight back?](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/PD7aHp2nR9rXJkc763mmE4pw/6AbleoybrCaxCaY0YrcrqA "Will you help me fight back?")** **_Dare to ask any questions_** - your voice will be silenced. **_Refuse to wear a mask_** - you will be forced into lockdown. **_Avoid the jab_** --you will be discriminated against. **Sadly, for the liberal establishment, I was duly elected to Congress as a strong Republican woman who is determined to impeach Joe Biden and put an end to his plan to force vaccines on Americans,_and that 's what I intend to do._** | | [STAND WITH MTG - DONATE TODAY](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/PD7aHp2nR9rXJkc763mmE4pw/6AbleoybrCaxCaY0YrcrqA "STAND WITH MTG - DONATE TODAY")
---
**[If you support my efforts to stop the radical socialist agenda in Washington, then please donate $45 TODAY, so I can continue working for the American people here in Congress.](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/kub5bqRXQWDqx892qzm236Xg/6AbleoybrCaxCaY0YrcrqA "If you support my efforts to stop the radical socialist agenda in Washington, then please donate $45 TODAY, so I can continue working for the American people here in Congress.")**
Twitter suspends me because I question the efficacy of a vaccine that was supposed to save us all but is only forcing us back into lockdown.
**When Kamala Harris said she would never take the "Trump Vaccine," the press applauded her.**
**When Gavin Newsome violated his lockdown orders, the media and Big Tech failed to censor him.**
**Andrew Cuomo** still has a Twitter account after accusations by 11 women of his serial sexual abuse.
[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/PD7aHp2nR9rXJkc763mmE4pw/6AbleoybrCaxCaY0YrcrqA "Headline")And Twitter didn't even shut down the account of John Weaver - the co-founder of the Lincoln Project - when he was accused of using THAT VERY SERVICE to lure young boys for sex.
**_His account should have been the first one they deleted, but it wasn 't--they came after me instead for expressing my thoughts--the same ones that are supposed to be protected by the First Amendment._**
**_WHY ARE THEY SO WORRIED ABOUT ME?_**
_They hate me because they can 't stop me, especially when I have America-loving Patriots like you in my corner and they know that I'm telling you the truth about Washington they don't want you to hear._
**[Will you join me and donate $50, $100, $250 or even $1,000 TODAY? We can't waste a single moment in taking our nation back and stopping Pelosi's radical, socialist agenda.](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/rUHFJw36q4ANBdYSiUKacQ/6AbleoybrCaxCaY0YrcrqA "Will you join me and donate $50, $100, $250 or even $1,000 TODAY? We can’t waste a single moment in taking our nation back and stopping Pelosi’s radical, socialist agenda.")**
They _can change all the rules they want in their efforts to silence me; IT WON 'T WORK._
God Bless America,
[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/PD7aHp2nR9rXJkc763mmE4pw/6AbleoybrCaxCaY0YrcrqA "Marjorie Taylor Greene")

Congresswoman (R-GA)

| | |
---
| | | August 18, 2021
**Sen. Rand Paul Endorses Mike Carey for OH-15**
_Columbus_ \- Senator Rand Paul released the following statement endorsing Mike Carey in the November 2 Special Election: "Today I proudly endorse Mike Carey for Ohio's 15th Congressional District and look forward to working with him as he takes the fight to the radical Democrats this November," Paul said. "Mike Carey will stand strong against the socialist agenda of the left, will stand up for your freedom, and will help lead the charge to take back the House in 2022."
---

To cancel this payment, chip-in to help elect a Republican majority in the House I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=a10e25fd6af949edafa440ba631a219a&_e=oSykp5ohZ9-j4pBu3sBghJC6H-r1igUKxQzvLioaRlRd0aIx2zBaplAdR-bQ1rVtsG5TZnOU7q8K5MSz3HmqRIOXn68FgdokbRslARettbpx22xCSQZW4cPIjaWzBDRhVRR5tMYLErBpncNgEIXoV712iISZrKSetAwwFIK0fd5Vq_4foCKAilUFHjLnCse0CgVwnxGbz-kct86wHxGShItIrWbCJa08GxcQOrUPGU6PadOqFIKnlK8MwkZCb3koPkKyrjmfyIU0bheMXXsnptjN_5sHHMqRB5hZTsPv-F1CWg1ezpV5-dBwVK-oLyGDIMgV_lING60-NOdH0G6FN56v-ghXlFLAeS5F2ET_tHACVwXGJg05CBOX-781DOeSiDln-LuWUryRfPRqB0vStSKHrSzqru_NV4qxlNApV0sVxIsza8gr0j2HlTYilzkW)
---
Peter,

**It appears that the House’s third most senior Democrat has finally lost it.** Now in his 36th year of _“service”_ to the nation, my progressive opponent, Peter DeFazio, chairman of the House Transportation Committee - and the man behind the push to spend upwards of $4 trillion on government handouts - **has let the power go to his head.**

[](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=a10e25fd6af949edafa440ba631a219a&_e=oSykp5ohZ9-j4pBu3sBghJC6H-r1igUKxQzvLioaRlRd0aIx2zBaplAdR-bQ1rVtsG5TZnOU7q8K5MSz3HmqRIOXn68FgdokbRslARettbpx22xCSQZW4cPIjaWzBDRhVRR5tMYLErBpncNgEIXoV712iISZrKSetAwwFIK0fd5Vq_4foCKAilUFHjLnCse0CgVwnxGbz-kct86wHxGShItIrWbCJa08GxcQOrUPGU4d58PBUGAMcGRarKpcw1rx0EzEcc1yCP26zfAZRkGNjHlP3d1Ji7xRtAMi9y2dkbpJslJhYvMfdOqP-Ue2jgksxw7O2u3spnNvSBVA3QWgTU3wBCZZby-mRS0ivKUX1BeC-70YsDBgSxOkAn-TFV7MLBvLrN0zuAKvbtdYyrqvtMAsbMOsiu96BB9RVqOO87_fHNVQg42wAaEU61eWmxvD)
There is no doubt about it: America needs an infrastructure upgrade. Now the question becomes, “what can be classified as infrastructure?” Well, it may come as news to many progressives around the country, but **free community college is by no means _“infrastructure.”_**

**Now, I’m not saying that I’m for or against free community college, but when we’re talking about major legislation that would nationalize higher education, it deserves a stand-alone debate.**

**We really need to think twice before we saddle every man, woman and child with $13,000 in additional debt.**

[**HELP ME STOP THE MAN
BANKRUPTING AMERICA -> **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=a10e25fd6af949edafa440ba631a219a&_e=oSykp5ohZ9-j4pBu3sBghJC6H-r1igUKxQzvLioaRlRd0aIx2zBaplAdR-bQ1rVtsG5TZnOU7q8K5MSz3HmqRIOXn68FgdokbRslARettbpx22xCSQZW4cPIjaWzBDRhVRR5tMYLErBpncNgEIXoV712iISZrKSetAwwFIK0fd5Vq_4foCKAilUFHjLnCse0CgVwnxGbz-kct86wHxGShItIrWbCJa08GxcQOrUPGU5X-tgD8zuK51QSL70nGpW214W3CGUMeZ1lL6tDPAzHZY8E_qiGRpcU9Dw9-YY5GHw_6AEqnIDLcL76VCD3U2WkMlDoebvfijn-fay058L12yxCuKg4nGT4AIJ7KM-SWtNGf614lxYPKs6RJqUh-ZMZ-ATOFWX_6I2eS9eLaX4mlQd8h4-BR8vocTAvFBXB-PX8V0Re4Bb_j8R747YVyO1Q)
But that’s not something my opponent, aka **the Bernie Sanders of the U.S. House** would agree with. He bills himself as a moderate to the voters of our rural Oregon district, but even a national newspaper recently wrote that _**“DeFazio is the rare battleground incumbent who could hardly be confused for a moderate.”**_

[**So, you see first, I’m running against the man who is literally on the verge of bankrupting America, and I’m calling on you for your help today.**](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=a10e25fd6af949edafa440ba631a219a&_e=oSykp5ohZ9-j4pBu3sBghJC6H-r1igUKxQzvLioaRlRd0aIx2zBaplAdR-bQ1rVtsG5TZnOU7q8K5MSz3HmqRIOXn68FgdokbRslARettbpx22xCSQZW4cPIjaWzBDRhVRR5tMYLErBpncNgEIXoV712iISZrKSetAwwFIK0fd5Vq_4foCKAilUFHjLnCse0CgVwnxGbz-kct86wHxGShItIrWbCJa08GxcQOrUPGU4ZL7jgmMud03RFsERZD8zb5u24swXTdCblmOQ0943-yi4t2DH5uBuGqD2iXXwurVc50FBbwZkYwL2dSwUFWCWDKAffXvxrPHUR9PxbOpWbwUzx0BFwypMoZcJOjpLaCytdDL23c3hCqhTvUj4UDjebcNwFVs3LRaW3BbDR4khEpUVcfCY6_8Ppk1LKz6b2Uv2YU0uDuImXv4rMSNgDJoH4) I need to make sure the voters of my district know that while we’re in a pro-Republican congressional district, they’re being represented by one of the most progressive members of the House.

I’d like to start airing digital ads around the district in an effort to make sure that if Democrats in the House decide to spend $3.5 trillion on “infrastructure” without Republican support, they know who is responsible. [**Can I count on you to make a contribution of just $5, $10, or even $15 right now?**](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=a10e25fd6af949edafa440ba631a219a&_e=oSykp5ohZ9-j4pBu3sBghJC6H-r1igUKxQzvLioaRlRd0aIx2zBaplAdR-bQ1rVtsG5TZnOU7q8K5MSz3HmqRIOXn68FgdokbRslARettbpx22xCSQZW4cPIjaWzBDRhVRR5tMYLErBpncNgEIXoV712iISZrKSetAwwFIK0fd5Vq_4foCKAilUFHjLnCse0CgVwnxGbz-kct86wHxGShItIrWbCJa08GxcQOrUPGU7chh9pPjLi87UJJUZM42CvVqAhVoUcXrxi6Vo26tEz3rcp32T0IJ7-O5ob_Gfq3vc07br9XDC1_WdDUfANXhRWyWB3B9sAJo56LAJ8AyEQnNWtUgO3McP_3ugjsyMwe2WMfFaG2GEttWgbVPUpef7FcngbcUNbJz-c-zCWwrO8yGpOUeOL1oRgLn3r5wOYrzoKKuSwx7ZqaonBM4SJ0cEC)

[**HELP ME STOP THE MAN
BANKRUPTING AMERICA -> **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=a10e25fd6af949edafa440ba631a219a&_e=oSykp5ohZ9-j4pBu3sBghJC6H-r1igUKxQzvLioaRlRd0aIx2zBaplAdR-bQ1rVtsG5TZnOU7q8K5MSz3HmqRIOXn68FgdokbRslARettbpx22xCSQZW4cPIjaWzBDRhVRR5tMYLErBpncNgEIXoV712iISZrKSetAwwFIK0fd5Vq_4foCKAilUFHjLnCse0CgVwnxGbz-kct86wHxGShItIrWbCJa08GxcQOrUPGU6M9RIixZviXk779T44b1MJD0PWcDkCOhvXOc6hrbkVIVIWqdeZHmQfZYeyXDPEseLJc9HKi5VsVD7E9sDIRlOlBJ9HtEkHjxYt5YsGajXJBsZmPmG7zpdLhJa1OPcKSGAEl7dcw0RSvkl1vRevcA_7DcTwKpnxHiOMOIMTuWxiHheJVppM-HVF5Myvad6swH93KCJYqan7DEDJd8-RdPaT)
Let me make this crystal clear. My progressive opponent calls the bipartisan infrastructure bill “crap,” simply because Republicans helped negotiate it. So much for even trying to pretend House Dems believe in working across the aisle these days. But we already knew that.

[**We’ve got one more shot to save America from financial ruin and I’m asking for your help today.**](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=a10e25fd6af949edafa440ba631a219a&_e=oSykp5ohZ9-j4pBu3sBghJC6H-r1igUKxQzvLioaRlRd0aIx2zBaplAdR-bQ1rVtsG5TZnOU7q8K5MSz3HmqRIOXn68FgdokbRslARettbpx22xCSQZW4cPIjaWzBDRhVRR5tMYLErBpncNgEIXoV712iISZrKSetAwwFIK0fd5Vq_4foCKAilUFHjLnCse0CgVwnxGbz-kct86wHxGShItIrWbCJa08GxcQOrUPGU540omNLyWmpntCcSvR6hodykj58wSrh9Gq2kyWRezg980UvXuYMkC1Gde6ciyBCtU7tymFC6xPtYt28S_M5p3WfhbPXn_A9ZsvO5606dEtIozUsHp4X5sKCGtaAFPcZcox2ozn4hCZzbIkY0o_hLVBUeKM9J07dVFMAmwiY_ngNxlyeGvdZ09JgPWLZjujFjsbnKEFv62stkm5GghEOEvJ)

Think of it this way - we’ll never be able to put up a Republican candidate who can beat Bernie Sanders in Vermont, **but I’m the guy who can beat the Bernie Sanders counterpart in the House next fall.**

Thank you very much.
Alek Skarlatos
Republican for Congress

[**HELP ME STOP THE MAN
BANKRUPTING AMERICA -> **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=a10e25fd6af949edafa440ba631a219a&_e=oSykp5ohZ9-j4pBu3sBghJC6H-r1igUKxQzvLioaRlRd0aIx2zBaplAdR-bQ1rVtsG5TZnOU7q8K5MSz3HmqRIOXn68FgdokbRslARettbpx22xCSQZW4cPIjaWzBDRhVRR5tMYLErBpncNgEIXoV712iISZrKSetAwwFIK0fd5Vq_4foCKAilUFHjLnCse0CgVwnxGbz-kct86wHxGShItIrWbCJa08GxcQOrUPGU75sZQIjsqyh89QqfpRLuVkbQoFQWmOaCOZ5KO6HDpunMUZlfYPPC4dDMQ8IMOoS5FmQ49U8c7X3HxwCi6_iCc8yUW_f_qgmAzlmpCdxUzsEr5TjEHWEjF82-qsQ1zli9kisCGHNxMZ6jRekIq-zmVzoOK-a1W_R9lLUMsFj1hNj1iKmb0EXyGZBN7ZyKFu58NkfPpUjas1XNFi5VQCFu7X)

_I believe that America is the greatest country in the world. _

As Secretary of State, I've traveled across the globe and heard countless stories of individuals who would give anything to become an American citizen. They seek the freedoms we've been granted and long for the same opportunities in their home countries. Every time my plane landed back home after an international trip, I was reminded that we live in the most exceptional country in the world.

| | Derek,

GOP extremist Glenn Youngkin bought himself the Republican nomination for Governor of Virginia, and mere _hours_ later, Donald Trump gave him a full-throated endorsement. Since then, Donald Trump has endorsed Glenn not once, but twice more!

So how happy was Glenn to have Trump’s support? Youngkin said he was “proud” to have the twice-impeached former President’s endorsement.

That’s why your support (today!) is so important.

As a veteran of the Afghanistan war running for Congress, I'm curious to know what you think of Biden's botched withdrawalToday I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. | [](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=b8736e4a34db4e6fade383c2f833d3ca&_e=s3KN2iF1gPFwCeAQlAwah0nWPJ_7iAQ2z07eLMX9ceFRgE6YUsyCXjap0DiyeIede0Qprj5xvVxJssquJaiw9_bIP1iwNRf9yT2Tlog3iCS69NrXREc4RDAWlWWmn0eenb3KtlaGpE7dFZwzHKc_pRInVwDAomia3-ZsuqHqgMFeSlGktOljAfTTw9t0QV4Q7pqXpZ60vPl43t1pDP9lIVHyG0d240WI3YtoDOCV0a1gjSV7tjluE1hXIpahc556q4qpnR0CXM50mJ91uRryygO1o20MJFabH_RUn_z8Tg8Gpom6ZUbww_rJtJrVIASvdJNJ3NwHIYglM6X8ke6Du420soiQ8ftOpsglL9WupG8oyB6v5XHhnH9nlpkp92X9FIBxBavi-WTQvfcAFh5wkz7GJ2BSBia3Ma1lIw4x9OrDwrOkMrtKnUKVk7U-qpY8SoJYuKBYBxiIfCmIsBDFiFxTm7MBBdGY1PnC_dtU3DtvuLuD0_aHOVXs7eJNB6603ACLi03bpxIJCBBq7J8HVbfeEeTLDS6zO7Y7t2lzpha9OHY1RY0tqd6EORIkd6c0VDkS7BMoagZSHgJUSF9A0vfXjutAKS5HLBlAP0SoDlo%3D)
---

Fellow Conservative,

My heart is heavy this morning as I write this email to you. As a veteran of the Army and the United States intelligence community **who deployed to Afghanistan 3 times** over the course of nine years, I’m watching in horror as desperate families cling to U.S. military aircraft in hopes of finding safe haven from the Taliban.

**I spent 19 months inside Afghanistan, so when I tell you that there was a right way to withdraw from this war, and that there was a wrong way to withdrawal, I mean it**. President Biden clearly misled the American public in July when he said that “ _**There’s going to be no circumstance where you see people being lifted off the United States embassy**_.”

But what angers me more is that I know men like me, who serve in our special forces, will bear the brunt of Biden’s decision to pull out of Afghanistan in such a reckless manner. How do I know? **Because I spent six years tracking down the Islamic terrorists who killed our Ambassador in Benghazi, Libya on September 11th, 2012 while Hillary Clinton slept.**

**This is not a withdrawal; this is an abandonment leading to a humanitarian crisis of the likes we have not seen this century**. My heart is breaking for my brothers that I lost on the battlefield, **and for the members of the special forces who are going to be responsible for cleaning up this mess in the near future**.

This crisis perfectly sums up why I’m running for Congress, and today **[I'm hoping you'll take a few moments out of your day to answer a few questions I've been trying to answer for myself over the past week.](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=b8736e4a34db4e6fade383c2f833d3ca&_e=s3KN2iF1gPFwCeAQlAwah0nWPJ_7iAQ2z07eLMX9ceFRgE6YUsyCXjap0DiyeIede0Qprj5xvVxJssquJaiw9_bIP1iwNRf9yT2Tlog3iCS69NrXREc4RDAWlWWmn0eenb3KtlaGpE7dFZwzHKc_pRInVwDAomia3-ZsuqHqgMFeSlGktOljAfTTw9t0QV4Q7pqXpZ60vPl43t1pDP9lIVHyG0d240WI3YtoDOCV0a1gjSV7tjluE1hXIpahc556q4qpnR0CXM50mJ91uRryygO1o20MJFabH_RUn_z8Tg8Gpom6ZUbww_rJtJrVIASvdJNJ3NwHIYglM6X8ke6Du420soiQ8ftOpsglL9WupG8oyB6v5XHhnH9nlpkp92X91tr-az37bd9YN1Mwv1jJ9MN3GG7Oy1z2MCFs_6R9E5R7T_l_dNw16a4s9zwdP3yuYhq7ev95Y_2YiR3cAwbSrarsZb2VE2fkfCzAr1gFD8tyj6Sq24_XUpfJeuRYDnp6oYWB_qBjEyJIKFzfG9ofpX4A6jUwpwwiScAYo_TDwtj0WE2owyygIaqhM7dg_ppkTmYPsPtCWeDPqmO9PQ2ViWnzZsfV-0CEY-FhkcvODE4%3D)**
| [**BOTCHED WITHDRAWAL OR ABANDONMENT?
LET ME KNOW WHERE DO YOU STAND? ** **››**](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=b8736e4a34db4e6fade383c2f833d3ca&_e=s3KN2iF1gPFwCeAQlAwah0nWPJ_7iAQ2z07eLMX9ceFRgE6YUsyCXjap0DiyeIede0Qprj5xvVxJssquJaiw9_bIP1iwNRf9yT2Tlog3iCS69NrXREc4RDAWlWWmn0eenb3KtlaGpE7dFZwzHKc_pRInVwDAomia3-ZsuqHqgMFeSlGktOljAfTTw9t0QV4Q7pqXpZ60vPl43t1pDP9lIVHyG0d240WI3YtoDOCV0a1gjSV7tjluE1hXIpahc556q4qpnR0CXM50mJ91uRryygO1o20MJFabH_RUn_z8Tg8Gpom6ZUbww_rJtJrVIASvdJNJ3NwHIYglM6X8ke6Du420soiQ8ftOpsglL9WupG8oyB6v5XHhnH9nlpkp92X9frNpH5qFs4OMcxV0ruWI4lFnlfN7AcXP0l3QU9w7ZIhzrNv_87n6bKpYEWK4P92JoMA3sAFNPrvYaWYnEQ47TQTNWSPlYUTG19YaZR7U9ywUR42vfJAy19Xb0Ek8tWK0GnXoOC3HjQSSDnV72-NJPQrMBcOS1EBwL65EyxYs4rnylpn8t2V52AVU7MHEW1EZeoBbJnksf9L-iRR0SpS9tyvgmj2qtX2AaXDjMZ2etDs%3D)
---

I don’t have to run for Congress, I’ve got a great job and a newborn son at home. But this absolute shit storm that Biden created should keep us all up at night.**I’ve interrogated Taliban terrorists at Bagram Airfield, I can tell you on good authority that Biden was well aware that something like this could happen**.
[](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=b8736e4a34db4e6fade383c2f833d3ca&_e=s3KN2iF1gPFwCeAQlAwah0nWPJ_7iAQ2z07eLMX9ceFRgE6YUsyCXjap0DiyeIede0Qprj5xvVxJssquJaiw9_bIP1iwNRf9yT2Tlog3iCS69NrXREc4RDAWlWWmn0eenb3KtlaGpE7dFZwzHKc_pRInVwDAomia3-ZsuqHqgMFeSlGktOljAfTTw9t0QV4Q7pqXpZ60vPl43t1pDP9lIVHyG0d240WI3YtoDOCV0a1gjSV7tjluE1hXIpahc556q4qpnR0CXM50mJ91uRryygO1o20MJFabH_RUn_z8Tg8Gpom6ZUbww_rJtJrVIASvdJNJ3NwHIYglM6X8ke6Du420soiQ8ftOpsglL9WupG8oyB6v5XHhnH9nlpkp92X9sbXY6ZtjZ6n7wo6hASvAap-ckE77VKDElXBfAssX208vvJ8D-MuhBSS1xRnCWP5tNyL3_4bYTxuHbfaSKzaHuf0rZ0xlRLnqJPHdbjhyuRQtiFEG7iBVtRXmK2Ra_WyEIkxjU562LRqr-oQpPTfT3tLt40lMAndDVRu0ZbJV2BMvABpvCy22p5YDxjWwqDmFfUTzqSk43h4_rVta9HIFnESMJdHPaNcTd6QdDu8WUnE%3D)
An article in the Wall Street Journal summed up the situation rather succinctly saying, “ _**The jihadists the U.S. toppled 20 years ago for sheltering Osama bin Laden will not fly their flag over the U.S. Embassy building on the 20th anniversary of 9/11**_.”

**The Taliban’s advances come as no surprise to us veterans of the Afghanistan conflict, I personally have deployed to Afghanistan 3 times during both my time in the Army and within the Intelligence Community**. We all knew that the Afghan National Army and Uniformed Police was an ineffective fighting force propped by U.S. logistics, U.S. air support and U.S. funding. Make no mistakes folks, our feckless "**leader** " President Biden was briefed on all of these facts, he was a U.S. Senator for the first 7 years of Afghanistan, the Vice President for 8 years... yet he still went through with a hasty withdrawal without addressing the possibility of a humanitarian crisis we are currently seeing. **Mr. President, the blood is on your hands**.

Folks, Democrats have complete control over Washington. **This abject failure happened on their watch, and they seem perfectly at peace to sit in their gilded offices as desperate Afghans die attempting to cling to American military planes evacuating our personnel**.
[**BOTCHED WITHDRAWAL OR ABANDONMENT?
LET ME KNOW WHERE DO YOU STAND? ** **››**](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=b8736e4a34db4e6fade383c2f833d3ca&_e=s3KN2iF1gPFwCeAQlAwah0nWPJ_7iAQ2z07eLMX9ceFRgE6YUsyCXjap0DiyeIede0Qprj5xvVxJssquJaiw9_bIP1iwNRf9yT2Tlog3iCS69NrXREc4RDAWlWWmn0eenb3KtlaGpE7dFZwzHKc_pRInVwDAomia3-ZsuqHqgMFeSlGktOljAfTTw9t0QV4Q7pqXpZ60vPl43t1pDP9lIVHyG0d240WI3YtoDOCV0a1gjSV7tjluE1hXIpahc556q4qpnR0CXM50mJ91uRryygO1o20MJFabH_RUn_z8Tg8Gpom6ZUbww_rJtJrVIASvdJNJ3NwHIYglM6X8ke6Du420soiQ8ftOpsglL9WupG8oyB6v5XHhnH9nlpkp92X9b0_yMSTF5S6nnnduJPn253y-LptTxwPZtL7XjYRgQTyBK91Fo_ExcR7i1sJonhOXnBrblyDxubE12YZBaJ4nnovANWXL4rIY00HbNKLUQux9QimhFn8t10BPjyQYntjVmXpyPmghFJdmZlkqaLErsTlD_RzAqdluGgcGMxK_csSNAjiWG7gerRqZzYrymoaE7oOMve44J4Wc_FxEM-TU3614YH-ZfXNS9GpbtZN3hh4%3D)
---

**Democrats have abandoned the Afghan people at their hour of need**. Our credibility as a superpower is shot. And what does Nancy Pelosi do? She tweets that “ _The Taliban must know the world is watching its actions_.”

Republicans are by no means perfect, but had we had a seat at the table when these outlandish decisions were made, perhaps we could have stopped what we’re seeing unfold today. **President Biden and Nancy Pelosi have all but ensured that my children and possibly grandchildren will fight the Taliban like I have**.

**[Today I’m asking you to make a donation to my campaign for Congress, because I assure you that if I’m given the opportunity to serve, I’ll make sure Biden and Pelosi are held to account for these foolish decisions](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=b8736e4a34db4e6fade383c2f833d3ca&_e=s3KN2iF1gPFwCeAQlAwah0nWPJ_7iAQ2z07eLMX9ceFRgE6YUsyCXjap0DiyeIede0Qprj5xvVxJssquJaiw9_bIP1iwNRf9yT2Tlog3iCS69NrXREc4RDAWlWWmn0eenb3KtlaGpE7dFZwzHKc_pRInVwDAomia3-ZsuqHqgMFeSlGktOljAfTTw9t0QV4Q7pqXpZ60vPl43t1pDP9lIVHyG0d240WI3YtoDOCV0a1gjSV7tjluE1hXIpahc556q4qpnR0CXM50mJ91uRryygO1o20MJFabH_RUn_z8Tg8Gpom6ZUbww_rJtJrVIASvdJNJ3NwHIYglM6X8ke6Du420soiQ8ftOpsglL9WupG8oyB6v5XHhnH9nlpkp92X9XV0K1YxiXJYqbr_Ffj-_xO9MZoGcfWMhjHrOdVXp_7dr7eImAQIv1JKormKh3BtCSWpZJ5iybivYC71t5X-GODYYWcr35tiXCuMJ87rL-aa1yKuk5rXPoKEkXVpxYNZ8HGBd6Jx-1udEINMoxNZbJHMYK1JRGsUVCZMrPB0Rz5Ll9e71r_aKy0QGXICZr_qjGt4I93vhiXlPAo5EYXb8VP3wIPPlhosp_POc5mdcfGo%3D)**.
[](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=b8736e4a34db4e6fade383c2f833d3ca&_e=s3KN2iF1gPFwCeAQlAwah0nWPJ_7iAQ2z07eLMX9ceFRgE6YUsyCXjap0DiyeIede0Qprj5xvVxJssquJaiw9_bIP1iwNRf9yT2Tlog3iCS69NrXREc4RDAWlWWmn0eenb3KtlaGpE7dFZwzHKc_pRInVwDAomia3-ZsuqHqgMFeSlGktOljAfTTw9t0QV4Q7pqXpZ60vPl43t1pDP9lIVHyG0d240WI3YtoDOCV0a1gjSV7tjluE1hXIpahc556q4qpnR0CXM50mJ91uRryygO1o20MJFabH_RUn_z8Tg8Gpom6ZUbww_rJtJrVIASvdJNJ3NwHIYglM6X8ke6Du420soiQ8ftOpsglL9WupG8oyB6v5XHhnH9nlpkp92X9jihMeuLOOQdJwsbHRoiEoZUvslmSvtnfA3pzI_RUuhOdynlSJWSANRrldKZMY8m2vZ-mg-aSC1Yl-m3ZL_L0BoljklO8mPZDpTX9ayJEMhbg6wxfQScuP--fXKbK-SOU9CYsB-GhosFGfHTLKnkb0rMAJNPhXvN2ERsgOTJFMkrLzPyxpdWV24tBWvG_gCBGdPqZacN3919kKIphLivwLw32OeixeCWS2UZYYPMr3kY%3D) [](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=b8736e4a34db4e6fade383c2f833d3ca&_e=s3KN2iF1gPFwCeAQlAwah0nWPJ_7iAQ2z07eLMX9ceFRgE6YUsyCXjap0DiyeIede0Qprj5xvVxJssquJaiw9_bIP1iwNRf9yT2Tlog3iCS69NrXREc4RDAWlWWmn0eenb3KtlaGpE7dFZwzHKc_pRInVwDAomia3-ZsuqHqgMFeSlGktOljAfTTw9t0QV4Q7pqXpZ60vPl43t1pDP9lIVHyG0d240WI3YtoDOCV0a1gjSV7tjluE1hXIpahc556q4qpnR0CXM50mJ91uRryygO1o20MJFabH_RUn_z8Tg8Gpom6ZUbww_rJtJrVIASvdJNJ3NwHIYglM6X8ke6Du420soiQ8ftOpsglL9WupG8oyB6v5XHhnH9nlpkp92X9uwA_PfO4qRoyOIEVQclst0Dc3QDHoiCRfzXIFeZeAvt18_1PVaaCIB0fRgojQrzdsWipeyR8paSEBnrNSRUs86PMybg0h-BrAMzYUPsqK9DyVhT-3Q2tnRx5yBDjbcL9kPAdq5cFGp1UKZIvhRHY6n9eJ7ZfE1_6NBVhy9_6LTct3VO2xdXwjdk0cerFKbneO_t_fM2WUxsrpYVnFwy6ixftFc1fqZGkjqeNbgqCwxk%3D) [**BOTCHED WITHDRAWAL OR ABANDONMENT?

**Having been to Afghanistan three times** I can assure you the people of Afghanistan want and deserve an end to the bloodshed, conflict and violence. The people of Afghanistan want and deserve peace and security, access to education, employment and the political process. **We have fought so hard together for the last two decades, our coalition and the Afghan people - we should not allow those hard-fought freedoms to be taken away by the Taliban**.

While we watch in horror from the safety of the United States, the Chinese Communist leadership in Beijing are toasting to our failure.

For America
John Castorani
Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07

name: Rand Paul
subject: When did YouTube start working for the government?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58153240:J4UUsOlxN:m:1:3253819041:CDF8F3EDDD921F3433523DBE016E928F:r) | |
---
Peter, YouTube and Google have become an entity so huge that they think they are the arbiter of truth.

And when I spoke out about the complete absurdity of mask mandates, they responded.

By banning me on YouTube for 7 days. **[FIGHT BACK>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58153240:J4UUsOlxN:m:1:3253819041:CDF8F3EDDD921F3433523DBE016E928F:r)**

As a libertarian-leaning senator, I think private companies have the right to ban me if they want to. But I think it is really anti-free speech, anti-progress of science, and it's really unhelpful to the overall conversation.

Both sides _should_ be able to present facts on either side of a question and complete an adversarial process to reach the truth.

But that's just not what's happening these days in big tech.

I'm not sure when YouTube became an arm of the government... but I am sure that it is an absolute disgrace for our government to proceed with their nonsense, anti-science policies without any repercussions or push back.

_They shouldn 't be protected by big tech giants._

If you agree, please chip in today to fight the censorship and share the truth: **[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-2741522/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58153240:J4UUsOlxN:m:1:3253819041:CDF8F3EDDD921F3433523DBE016E928F:r)**

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

Our most loyal allies have been abandoned on the battlefield and our most dangerous adversaries are exploiting this crisis of leadership while the Afghan people face unimaginable consequences at the hands of the merciless Taliban.

**When the dust settles,**_**somebody needs to resign**_**and Congress needs to investigate how this catastrophe was allowed to happen.**

[**_This affects every one of us and we all deserve answers._**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=bf8cb454e9854038bc94a69af1def924&_e=8BoIhHQ90QkEhZphoLBXH_Y6q7r1i5g42kQAV131YJGO1QpdTFpHqT9XY9fXsCVCz0cU1J8ZQG9ajc9HIh5IzUCggi0qITNaVWpmmO8FTuXN6YkKOAzKlMMd7TP5nONxTpH5fhmeV7Wm3SFT4pHgoK81FUWM-QkSVqWH-H9E_ZFnnWwp0jYVLj5aj7CnRrZcws3mftY0dAGEQ6WsravPpRYWclID3s2aEnrp5mTzN8Syw2wKu__RPwVz7sg-5zJb1LTy-t4KqIIly-zl03gVgZHrZWL8vdXXN26QIYms9z0hSGIt_jo35cLYOW4sfvwsWsvTZ1HrH_YekRrx2kCcrYbuwshVmLvxBZQSuVBxM7hlHQfvMpazoT7ODoA0CXDpfSqkb8KGxlWJCOVMhtVuGLxKCaXOLtTMbSAYlAqFinwXCPigz4PtRkTVynqaMQ1kJ1SzqM6_LJHWPye3Q8YD2NrjM3rAmePb8hKldzviQkU%3D)
[**I AGREE: DEMAND AN INVESTIGATION**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=bf8cb454e9854038bc94a69af1def924&_e=8BoIhHQ90QkEhZphoLBXH_Y6q7r1i5g42kQAV131YJGO1QpdTFpHqT9XY9fXsCVCz0cU1J8ZQG9ajc9HIh5IzUCggi0qITNaVWpmmO8FTuXN6YkKOAzKlMMd7TP5nONxTpH5fhmeV7Wm3SFT4pHgoK81FUWM-QkSVqWH-H9E_ZFnnWwp0jYVLj5aj7CnRrZcws3mftY0dAGEQ6WsravPpRYWclID3s2aEnrp5mTzN8Syw2wKu__RPwVz7sg-5zJb1LTy-t4KqIIly-zl03gVgT2Pjo1NwmbxvXlzFavG9nzwfgNgUKSchmMhc8gYbwwsrd1id60jJOKG-yhFLK2l-eUZftrSOFpFIDNrjLzHrlCfply4LF3AUqWgDX0U2Itfs8wotLnSV0MyGyBoZ1CtVXinn1WFV55m1uRq39tRcWajmve7KQkPc15eAf8uqz7VvU04tQSrnqC0Q_7Q7DdSIAgDnpshxanLfIMaBTsDWak%3D)
In times of crisis, the president must at least show up to lead and face the people.

_But the Biden administration has done the exact opposite._ For three straight days, the president, vice president, and White House press secretary were on vacation.

**It’s inexcusable, it’s a disgrace for America, and it proves that our nation is facing a serious crisis of leadership and accountability in the White House.**

name: Team Mondaire
subject: RE: the latest Census data
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

Just a few days ago, data from the 2020 US Census was released. As you may recall, that data will be used to determine new parameters for Congressional districts.
**Like they have in the past, local Republican officials throughout America will try to use this information to draw districts that give them a competitive advantage in the 2022 elections — mostly at the expense of Black, Latinx, and Native American voters.**
This means more congressional districts that elect QAnon conspiracy theorists like Marjorie Taylor Greene.
Partisan gerrymandering needs to be made illegal — and under the For the People Act, it would be.
Mondaire is a leading voice in favor of the For the People Act and he’ll keep fighting to pass this legislation even in the face of Republican obstruction and filibustering.
[**Can you show your support for Mondaire’s fight for free and fair elections by making a contribution to his re-election campaign today? Any amount you can give will go a long way, even if it’s just $3.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34272165/301452613/-376196102?refcode2=5162c2d9-5700-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210818-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTYyYzJkOS01NzAwLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YSDPUpGwS8MPdO-lcvB6m_kAiKGw91DQPNRSeUyIkSY=)

clean_body: Just a few days ago, data from the 2020 US Census was released. As you may recall, that data will be used to determine new parameters for Congressional districts. Like they have in the past, local Republican officials throughout America will try to use this information to draw districts that give them a competitive advantage in the 2022 elections — mostly at the expense of Black, Latinx, and Native American voters. This means more congressional districts that elect QAnon conspiracy theorists like Marjorie Taylor Greene. Partisan gerrymandering needs to be made illegal — and under the For the People Act, it would be. Mondaire is a leading voice in favor of the For the People Act and he’ll keep fighting to pass this legislation even in the face of Republican obstruction and filibustering. = Thank you for your support. Building and maintaining a democracy that works for everyone is an ongoing effort, and Mondaire is so proud to have you by his side in this fight. All our best, Team Mondaire = * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. name: Blake Masters
subject: The America I grew up in was optimistic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blake Masters for Senate**
body:
I started my campaign with a simple thought. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=25cea69f88684bddbefafb4894284c6d&_e=ECKSgDMY_vcXjB3pwnSr8XGdGiXmnhec0Nt4Kgxs_DbrzCfrxgNYIGEmtCW5DSs2Sd-8Gq5x-_9NqUXm5jQAe2Op-MPNV2Ral6nYn6EEqmSGrsmFszI1y8akmWxaU2b7P4hTSFVjaMXOyFoHUgkclaqYg_WTm08FB5kcm4gQ0qZQh9XZ9Ws3ZdJj5m87nZrHZVY3yOZDXvwaW0PmSvCzH3C_bqgMi3xlJHSXyFuxDmizcckKyi4YKhJriU87hdidBQ6OuM1mqRjHwewPYq9S6qrNfDzUFwSsjWqPAyLCmKzYgBeZ2TfsVqnr2_SyWl1rzVl_nz_NcxQm1E1NWTKo0A-FApkaTCm85A2MvK3E9YZeVtg6ygEz5i1WPErlCvRfUPA7vpOlKUpQ7xQk8mU4p_IqCxrnhdFxWUZvU6F_qUdKZ8LAuOCS-ixNOwiXD2vZ)

---
Fellow Conservative,

**I'm Blake Masters. I’m a political outsider and I have just launched my campaign for U.S. Senate against Democrat Mark Kelly.**

I grew up in Tucson, Arizona, met my wife Catherine in middle school, and now we are raising our three sons in Tucson, not far from where we grew up.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=25cea69f88684bddbefafb4894284c6d&_e=ECKSgDMY_vcXjB3pwnSr8XGdGiXmnhec0Nt4Kgxs_DbrzCfrxgNYIGEmtCW5DSs2Sd-8Gq5x-_9NqUXm5jQAe2Op-MPNV2Ral6nYn6EEqmSGrsmFszI1y8akmWxaU2b7P4hTSFVjaMXOyFoHUgkclaqYg_WTm08FB5kcm4gQ0qZQh9XZ9Ws3ZdJj5m87nZrHZVY3yOZDXvwaW0PmSvCzH3C_bqgMi3xlJHSXyFuxDmgwKiToQMvw0k7fLiRPNpU9-xGnUhEWeGQ5gDgAcH3vGmLxqEuSC7IYtrdK9idxB2-N0wz3_4xJRE27FvWIKnKQZUf4xqojQIh28Vgt_rVuMI0diDo1zNwizhmT88gx3djJF5FRvGHcJqE7hxW0JmIU02LoJPRmGxspp0e0JUG14jOI90Xa-VWfP78K4Y03V7IvnLtfV2-AECLwVMBROxZ4)
I started my campaign with a simple thought; **you should be able to raise a family in America on a single income. The America I grew up in was optimistic, but today, for the first time, this generation expects to be worse off than our parents. **

Fellow Conservative, I want to change this.

I will be a new voice in Washington – a disruptive voice for change, but I need to know you’re with me today. [**Will you join my campaign for Senate?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=25cea69f88684bddbefafb4894284c6d&_e=ECKSgDMY_vcXjB3pwnSr8XGdGiXmnhec0Nt4Kgxs_DbrzCfrxgNYIGEmtCW5DSs2Sd-8Gq5x-_9NqUXm5jQAe2Op-MPNV2Ral6nYn6EEqmSGrsmFszI1y8akmWxaU2b7P4hTSFVjaMXOyFoHUgkclaqYg_WTm08FB5kcm4gQ0qZQh9XZ9Ws3ZdJj5m87nZrHZVY3yOZDXvwaW0PmSvCzH3C_bqgMi3xlJHSXyFuxDmiWtU0NMi3fls1WCkppon4xTD74epEYaVHsdp1uPnG1Vujho5g853lEp3vesi7RTWbR91kmFwccXKPTL3GC-PN7vb3QFrSeYe9_4DCyAkvmoQ17Oux8R3YBpLs3HU2PHuBOkLHMpAQ22PvY9cGzKdOQIHHroicgBNCV4fh6IoVuNkIrr-OQdlB2CBIwX9frhTM4o__Czdhe__xw1zSM6V__)

Our leaders have taken America for granted and put us in a position that makes it hard for us to succeed. It used to be that if you got an education and worked hard, you could buy a house and raise a family.

**Today, our jobs are being shipped off to China, schools are doing more indoctrinating than teaching, and our government allows an influx of illegal workers across the border to undermine the American workforce.**

Mark Kelly went to Washington D.C. with a promise to put Arizona first, he advertised himself as an independent leader. **Mark Kelly repeatedly told voters he would vote to secure our border but has instead taken every opportunity to do just the opposite.**

This is so typical. What’s remarkable is it only took Mark Kelly a few weeks to betray Arizonans and become nothing more than a rubber stamp for Chuck Schumer and his left-wing agenda.

Higher taxes, out-of-control spending and burdensome regulations designed by radical, progressive groups do irreparable harm to working families yearning to build a future.

It's time to put this country first. We need to enforce the law, finish building the wall and close the border, put small businesses before huge multinational corporations, and most importantly, get government out of the way of hard-working people who simply want to build their American dream.

This country used to work, and now it doesn't. Only an outsider can fix it. [**Can you help me make it to the Senate?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=25cea69f88684bddbefafb4894284c6d&_e=ECKSgDMY_vcXjB3pwnSr8XGdGiXmnhec0Nt4Kgxs_DbrzCfrxgNYIGEmtCW5DSs2Sd-8Gq5x-_9NqUXm5jQAe2Op-MPNV2Ral6nYn6EEqmSGrsmFszI1y8akmWxaU2b7P4hTSFVjaMXOyFoHUgkclaqYg_WTm08FB5kcm4gQ0qZQh9XZ9Ws3ZdJj5m87nZrHZVY3yOZDXvwaW0PmSvCzH3C_bqgMi3xlJHSXyFuxDmjrK9sQH_wj8Tt_4G2jEvXNdRdtS2-U-HuDyHLKD7aHmHtzg68DzUtGiSalSG5X1-l2GCzD29pHNQe04wyeD2ut-XZVuWItTtkHsO5X66ckLny6xtcOyUsvnbR3y5g8B8DWa5XJ6OH2AJfWqUZ3RIpEXiOTQknGfOIf-if-l6duzyqlXFk6FGg6YyFArV-KrB4MdcdZ9ilGIMqV4mkSrgix)

Thank you,

Blake Masters
Republican for U.S. Senate, Arizona

**P.S. I am ready to be a disruptive force for change in Washington, but I need your help.** Winning a campaign against an entrenched Democrat with millions in the bank is going to take the support of folks like you. [**If you are ready for a political outsider, will you chip in $10 or more today?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=25cea69f88684bddbefafb4894284c6d&_e=ECKSgDMY_vcXjB3pwnSr8XGdGiXmnhec0Nt4Kgxs_DbrzCfrxgNYIGEmtCW5DSs2Sd-8Gq5x-_9NqUXm5jQAe2Op-MPNV2Ral6nYn6EEqmSGrsmFszI1y8akmWxaU2b7P4hTSFVjaMXOyFoHUgkclaqYg_WTm08FB5kcm4gQ0qZQh9XZ9Ws3ZdJj5m87nZrHZVY3yOZDXvwaW0PmSvCzH3C_bqgMi3xlJHSXyFuxDmjUkuI2pWyWY2eK5tU1jF3gJ-wVWF4_X5Fz1IvVi_oc6b4_VWmqeHhApAovQnah-7AO4k6wMsVxA0ps2nvhbP2HMWJO2N7OBz_D6FQ0bPTRRo2c3nb3AG4xjSIBtPs_y-1wnB0CjZEoTzpEZeKI8ZeG7aBB84xhVzORWdQmLL_l_WHhibVe7qjQbwlMVIXzMyIb7WkkJYj6ggMy9FdMLQhG)

[** ****DONATE TODAY ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=25cea69f88684bddbefafb4894284c6d&_e=ECKSgDMY_vcXjB3pwnSr8XGdGiXmnhec0Nt4Kgxs_DbrzCfrxgNYIGEmtCW5DSs2Sd-8Gq5x-_9NqUXm5jQAe2Op-MPNV2Ral6nYn6EEqmSGrsmFszI1y8akmWxaU2b7P4hTSFVjaMXOyFoHUgkclaqYg_WTm08FB5kcm4gQ0qZQh9XZ9Ws3ZdJj5m87nZrHZVY3yOZDXvwaW0PmSvCzH3C_bqgMi3xlJHSXyFuxDmjVY26Ge2bOUzd5iZMHZn0D0AZdpuTYmVHyEhdbn17covMVWkiBBqoeEC6RQnr7Js_ro1CtuGxF8z9LiZYBucJcSGOHa4Cco-wD5zO742-Mb1SmN5cko7Jc06bUx-5LOXszxD-Iqsglnd5jtwAO6XY9F3oCVLT6kyStuOhOOU5q5aAgUvjk0fFU6H945IjgoI48j_D5p1ozt-zVs7CtVsba)

| | **Paid for by Blake Masters for Senate**
---

_Don't want to receive any more of our emails?
We hate to see you go, but [you can unsubscribe here](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=25cea69f88684bddbefafb4894284c6d&_t=7m4VWyQrH5ZrXjxDa7lMY0tKAnvVM7WUEKtI87dwN9-H6j2yDniulHb9NUWLSJMXvbOufkw85IMJJg1uO8O4xU5Z6FD8EIzcSlfKrB43_0M_9HDnfIzqgl3w0zAp831cVoMpTDyUVybChSB7RcMnSsXtxi_qGTafMPyNi44tP1o%3D)._

Friend,

As Virginia's FIRST Congressional Candidate to sign the ‘1776 Pledge’, I am putting my foot down and drawing the line for our children's education.

The 1776 Pledge was founded in response to Critical Race Theory. As Biden and the Teachers Unions force Critical Race Theory on our children, I wanted to FIGHT BACK against it.

By taking the Pledge, here’s how we fight back:
* Restore honest, patriotic education that cultivates in our children a profound love for our country.
* Promote a curriculum that teaches that all children are created equal, have equal moral value under God, our Constitution, and the law, and are members of a national community united by our founding principles.
* Prohibit any curriculum that pits students against one another on the basis of race or sex.
* Prevent schools from politicizing education by prohibiting any curriculum that requires students to protest and lobby during or after school.

And now I want YOU to take the pledge, Friend.

Please make a contribution of $17.76 by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to show your support of the 1776 Pledge. (https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/support-the-1776-pledge?amount=17.76&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20210805_1776pledge_1776-club)

name: Derek Marshall
subject: Here's what matters to me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,

I know that so many politicians run on empty promises, and it can be hard to trust candidates when they give you their word. Here’s the thing about me, though. If there’s one thing I value, it’s consistency.**You will never hear me compromising on the policies that will transform peoples’ lives here in California’s 8th.**
The people of my district deserve a representative who will not waver when it comes to their basic needs, someone who isn’t beholden to corporations or big donors. That’s why this campaign isn’t just about me. It’s not about one person. **It’s about a movement of people coming together to say enough is enough, that we deserve better. **

**[This people-powered movement is growing stronger by the day thanks to your support. If you can donate today, we’ll be in a better position to take on my Trump-backed opponent.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34272845/301454851/-1739883508?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZGU1NWRiYi01YTAwLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_VWEUO1Ii_BZcvVhpwjQUyGhs9FK5blCUHS-3Mcp5AI=)**

**My work has taken me around the world, but nothing gives me more hope than working with our communities right here at home to make sure our communities are taken care of.** It’s why I volunteer so much of my time working with our unhoused neighbors across the high desert. | | Peter \-- Yesterday, we emailed you about CNN's latest rankings and where Georgia Democrat Raphael Warnock stands. **Warnock's seat was listed as the second-most-likely seat to flip in 2022 \-- and alt-right millionaire Kelly Loeffler is being recruited to run against him.** We set a mid-month goal of $2,500 to save this seat \-- and your support has been overwhelming! _We've raised $1,825 so far._ But Loeffler won't be the only alt-right extremist Warnock is up against in 2022. Just yesterday, Proud Boys supporter and domestic terrorist Edward Florea pleaded guilty to threatening the life of Sen. Warnock on social media. Here are just a few things we know about Florea:
* Florea wrote: **“** **Warnock is going to have a hard time casting votes for communist policies when he's swinging with the ... fish.”**
* He followed it up by writing, **“Dead men can't pass laws.”**
* When federal agents raided Florea's apartment, they found **more than 1,000 rounds of ammunition, plus hatchets, swords and 75 military-style combat knives.**

Florea is just one example of the right-wing extremism coming from the Republican Party today \-- and that proves that we must protect Sen. Warnock and his seat in the Senate at all costs. **[**That's why we're increasing our original goal to raise $5,000 by midnight tonight and doubling down on our efforts. body:
| | | **_NBC BREAKING: Democrats ' House majority is in jeopardy_**
We're on high alert.

NBC news just reported that early election indicators are all pointing to one thing: **[We are dangerously close to losing our historic House Majority to Donald Trump’s Republicans.](https://links.e.dccc.)**

It's not hard to see why:

\-- Republicans are trying to take back power through redistricting alone.
\-- They've broken **FIVE** fundraising records in a row to do it.
\-- And they have **$7 MILLION** more lining their war chest than our House Democrats.

Hear us: **We must turn the tide -- and FAST -- if we want any hope of defending our House Majority and safeguarding our progress from Trump 's Republicans.**

**[That's why we're calling for 2,OOO gifts before midnight to protect our Democratic House Majority and stop this Republican momentum in its tracks. Will you rush $3 straight away to defend our House Democrats?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Eqxzt_)** | [MAJORITY DEFENDER CONTRIBUTION: **PENDING**](https://links.e.dccc.)[](https://links.e.dccc.)

subject: I stand with President Trump

body:
How about you, Peter?

| Authorized by Republican Headquarters Peter, The events of the past few days have been a clear reminder of how lucky we were to have President Trump in the White House. Joe Biden’s weakness has been on full display to the world, and America is worse off as a result. I’m so proud of you, Peter, and of every Grassroots Republican who stood up last year to stand with President Trump and Keep America Great. We delivered the Battleground State of North Carolina, and stepped up in every way imaginable to put America First. _Now, it‘s up to us to help**Save America** from Joe Biden and the socialist Democrats in Washington. clean_body: How about you, Peter? | Authorized by Republican Headquarters Peter, The events of the past few days have been a clear reminder of how lucky we were to have President Trump in the White House. Joe Biden’s weakness has been on full display to the world, and America is worse off as a result. I’m so proud of you, Peter, and of every Grassroots Republican who stood up last year to stand with President Trump and Keep America Great. We delivered the Battleground State of North Carolina, and stepped up in every way imaginable to put America First. Now, it‘s up to us to helpSave America from Joe Biden and the socialist Democrats in Washington. There’s no time to waste. | | | | | | | | | | The Complete and Total Failure of the Democrats in Washington has been on full display for the world to see. The Democrats told the nation that with them in power “the adults would be back in charge.” Nothing could’ve been further from the truth. And I’m determined to do everything I can to restore our Republican Majority in Washington. Are you with me? Thank you. Michael Whatley Chairman, North Carolina Republican Party

name: Kristian
subject: WOW - that was fast!
body:
Just got out of a meeting and wanted to make sure you know...
---
| | | | | | You're receiving this message because you signed up to receive emails from Smiley for Washington. If you no longer wish to receive these emails, you can unsubscribe at the bottom of this email.
---
| |
---
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Friends,
---
| Today I took a day from being on the road with Tiffany to have a meeting with our Smiley for Washington Finance Director. I asked for an update on our monthly finance numbers and she shared because Tiffany's been traveling so much we're not on track to meet our monthly goal.
Our online donors have pulled through each month and have helped us meet (and exceed) our fundraising goals and with less than half the month left in August I'm reaching out to you early to see if you can help us catch up?
We have thousands of Smiley online supporters who follow the campaign and if we could just get each donor to give some sort of monthly contribution, I know we'd knock it out of the park.
[THIS is our chance to stand up to Washington DC and the crazy policies coming out of the Biden Administration. THIS is our chance to turn the page for Washington State, and THIS is our chance to #RetirePattyMurray!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013j8LJz0xDfqB6l6As6LOg3Q622FfgFT674C7c1LIU1L3-f1ef3aXRqasazlPkcDgr8_bPd5KxhpJtOK8j__gjlLOI8iWWdQRzj1ijc2gVpF2xFeYG7Y6xNUNT1q92Xl4qyJVKyOnZyaQkPacKS80vzscIwe0rUKZBYc4lOPcTISJcRy5jZ_schF7DrWbmy51MdNGrthlXrs=&c=6I_lijNGNwNWmXF312hsFtLQrNO2RrQGB4gU-PWCPJNufajIVlQLxA==&ch=SmiXw6i38vwTmdAu11Q7CDgE1bBTzs1KGC7-ZG0RWl9NXbW6czWmWA==)

clean_body: Just got out of a meeting and wanted to make sure you know... | | | | | | You're receiving this message because you signed up to receive emails from Smiley for Washington. If you no longer wish to receive these emails, you can unsubscribe at the bottom of this email. | | | | | Dear Friends, | Today I took a day from being on the road with Tiffany to have a meeting with our Smiley for Washington Finance Director. I asked for an update on our monthly finance numbers and she shared because Tiffany's been traveling so much we're not on track to meet our monthly goal. Our online donors have pulled through each month and have helped us meet (and exceed) our fundraising goals and with less than half the month left in August I'm reaching out to you early to see if you can help us catch up? We have thousands of Smiley online supporters who follow the campaign and if we could just get each donor to give some sort of monthly contribution, I know we'd knock it out of the park. == == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | == | | | == | Tiffany will be back from her travels and I'd love to give her great news. Will you help us make that happen? She's working hard every day, traveling the state and talking to voters - voters of all parties - who agree, Patty Murray has sold out to Washington DC and after 30 years in the senate, it's time for new leadership. I don't email you often but this was important! I appreciate you taking the time to read my note and if you've been looking for the right time to donate, ==! Thank you for your continued support for Tiffany and our whole team. We can't do it without you! Thank you! name: April Becker
subject: Who runs the fight to take back the House? GIRLS.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Becker for Congress
body:
11 Republican women flipped Democrat House seats in 2020. It’s time we do it again. A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, who proved that you can have a family and a successful career, an American patriot that dismantles the Left’s narrative that the GOP is for men and misogynists – I’m hoping that you’ll help me become the woman that takes back the House for Republicans in 2022. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2aae4b65f69c4b84bdc6a5283c503d45&_e=iLDup4E0zx1Nxk2FLaUeVsxL0uwoEGOsGfIBwohWP1jQqhEr6rng3o9jC43gp59zUpn-hNeIkK6Tv0v0vDUu0LMxJUOuAlZRGiPGSX3DjReDLQmMwyTKmqWXQ6DAAS4fjyohDZOoByrEuahlVtjcCep3XULY8CeiyitsELX8f5EQZhSqEPPKT7BXbBBD6ofp5STayrB3ZgXi37w6IpFR2SsOdigdaOKhqZIy9xWL16h-EcOOSBY5ajXhduHFYBDv7uhrOOsrsl_RL1y7tgUm1PUbpqrIH49xNJLSGeta4vRYDDmCTqiko4nBNwfcOMssDoBPM5b69_nTSMfExdcn_vbvyMqe1hhu_RSnKMnZz49zQpJxcx-m8fNJeHf9mb16L6YHdFNkjgxNSMaBa9UAWcjEeGGIJyHqEPS5ZTaRx1K4FwQFqGcD-qUzIRmOIVeyfpN1x6rxjfVP0C8nvukTQQ%3D%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative,

I am sick and tired of Democrats claiming they are the _“party of women.”_ **If that were true, why did they not elect more women to the House in the 2020 election?**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2aae4b65f69c4b84bdc6a5283c503d45&_e=iLDup4E0zx1Nxk2FLaUeVsxL0uwoEGOsGfIBwohWP1jQqhEr6rng3o9jC43gp59zUpn-hNeIkK6Tv0v0vDUu0LMxJUOuAlZRGiPGSX3DjReDLQmMwyTKmqWXQ6DAAS4fjyohDZOoByrEuahlVtjcCep3XULY8CeiyitsELX8f5EQZhSqEPPKT7BXbBBD6ofp5STayrB3ZgXi37w6IpFR2SsOdigdaOKhqZIy9xWL16iWzBl1LhQLVeanCMZyT-7rjNQdJtPi0HEm0vMn0pzOOLvwmL1Z76eu9W329NdbKzYPRkNatmwgMkNs4lZK-HXABGaNPXkZ_9mIbqdSrhdxf9rh2GBU4wgA9kbxoPE7F0a70T89rkdd2cDm1xQ7WUGm8F-g-h3SKKSu0NjardiQoh1oyALmfoP7faMU3SLhVnjWLc9oC1lTVJJjy2BJhXxVynRjnWTkhRct1uIBtc71vg%3D%3D)
The Republican Party made history in 2020 - leading the way to the election of the largest class of Republican women to the U.S. House in American history.

Last cycle, 11 Republican women flipped Democrat seats. A woman won in almost every district the GOP flipped! It’s clear, friend, conservative women are leading the charge to take back the House in 2022.

That’s why I am reaching out to you today, [**Republican women have the momentum heading into the Midterm Election and we must capitalize on it, immediately.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2aae4b65f69c4b84bdc6a5283c503d45&_e=iLDup4E0zx1Nxk2FLaUeVsxL0uwoEGOsGfIBwohWP1jQqhEr6rng3o9jC43gp59zUpn-hNeIkK6Tv0v0vDUu0LMxJUOuAlZRGiPGSX3DjReDLQmMwyTKmqWXQ6DAAS4fjyohDZOoByrEuahlVtjcCep3XULY8CeiyitsELX8f5EQZhSqEPPKT7BXbBBD6ofp5STayrB3ZgXi37w6IpFR2SsOdigdaOKhqZIy9xWL16hDUpgFAzo36la8lFbEMP-XAGIIswIzKK4gkrnU0fYbijrNk2M8PXfOkolVj4nWatHWWTOLrMhwGeZpwzeVTNcJoXaQGMb_Z5DMsoGQ9XW5HB49dfj02lxsHVbhSanet1a0zOQGmY4yBQ_tGhOejwdqkrD0w0yB5pKNDslwLQ7Qm6GqbdkMisVxPXfRCJ_CS79RrePKhZzKp1RDQ7RVYYRjwsuff-RlTQM0BuEL_TNCdA%3D%3D)

For those that do not know me, my name is April Becker. I am a lawyer, mother, wife, unapologetic conservative, and **[the next Republican woman to flip a Democrat House seat.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2aae4b65f69c4b84bdc6a5283c503d45&_e=iLDup4E0zx1Nxk2FLaUeVsxL0uwoEGOsGfIBwohWP1jQqhEr6rng3o9jC43gp59zUpn-hNeIkK6Tv0v0vDUu0LMxJUOuAlZRGiPGSX3DjReDLQmMwyTKmqWXQ6DAAS4fjyohDZOoByrEuahlVtjcCep3XULY8CeiyitsELX8f5EQZhSqEPPKT7BXbBBD6ofp5STayrB3ZgXi37w6IpFR2SsOdigdaOKhqZIy9xWL16iw-R3DlEl1bQFvMy42cqB2sy6qRIy4RlHEJEwIc2w7sh_o9VVd-z2PQ8WG085UIFGBfkSR75_kak10QVUjqrNQvRRniRHxygjvhCH1cgZLn2UmO4KiYG9Fh05LIkSyX9NtJoXSBPjDwHDZBSORxmwCUXfY6mfxLRwXhU50ezAGQTQSmN-U9qJhXpb0pMlD9Mo4Od9CTwRsALRJni_cYmT6EouGnQ0mPvMCwued1g91NA%3D%3D)**

[**SUPPORT APRIL TODAY -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2aae4b65f69c4b84bdc6a5283c503d45&_e=iLDup4E0zx1Nxk2FLaUeVsxL0uwoEGOsGfIBwohWP1jQqhEr6rng3o9jC43gp59zUpn-hNeIkK6Tv0v0vDUu0LMxJUOuAlZRGiPGSX3DjReDLQmMwyTKmqWXQ6DAAS4fjyohDZOoByrEuahlVtjcCep3XULY8CeiyitsELX8f5EQZhSqEPPKT7BXbBBD6ofp5STayrB3ZgXi37w6IpFR2SsOdigdaOKhqZIy9xWL16g2dyX0vTIK_hy35nRhyw_uSy2XMYMjnMKssJUFCukgzCMY3DYazxcQVIzmSdXIqAtdSDSBMDXxcY8Wsr3T3iPqrTVFFkW9V2TFKwPWvsjNcrzczxp9lM0Y8xLOM9AUkTaaYXPA5vLAnusx8bIRp8BdAOr550bFCEnzAUZl1V3oDdGY2vAdHn1sELjih8f7nFOap3lX-qLD1AOjVYFgyQ6ZBTUw5hyMMCo-R-ONHG_cLg%3D%3D)
I am running for Congress in one of the NRCC’s target districts, Nevada-03, where I am taking on a little-known Democrat with no accomplishments to speak of - other than voting with Pelosi 99% of the time. [**Honestly, this could be the sleeper race that finally forces Nancy Pelosi to put her Washington D.C. penthouse on the market, having lost the House majority for the last time in her career.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2aae4b65f69c4b84bdc6a5283c503d45&_e=iLDup4E0zx1Nxk2FLaUeVsxL0uwoEGOsGfIBwohWP1jQqhEr6rng3o9jC43gp59zUpn-hNeIkK6Tv0v0vDUu0LMxJUOuAlZRGiPGSX3DjReDLQmMwyTKmqWXQ6DAAS4fjyohDZOoByrEuahlVtjcCep3XULY8CeiyitsELX8f5EQZhSqEPPKT7BXbBBD6ofp5STayrB3ZgXi37w6IpFR2SsOdigdaOKhqZIy9xWL16gQHb4p-nfUvzAeJgICyMsTh3Lrkm8F9fgUai7kIO8PpdFI2hJCwUAL1-60uIFCPDSZpRDy5cwBf3huuXJgUuy28CqsWHEvLm7GYwtvQfWJxpGFZrdCHoJE3vqm1Og5g0ILcIwP__NF1AnKAqI8FCwdd602nwK5M0ykuPLskKpU5CVR2xOa8-soZ_mYa0nRYV55CpeS-dxOAE80cTE4pkJcm__QVOHhMfx1eHtpUKRJRg%3D%3D)

If I am elected to Congress, you can be sure I won’t be described as a wallflower. **I am 100% dedicated to our conservative cause and will fight every day against the Democrats’ push for socialism in America.**

**The truth is, I am the antithesis of what progressive Democrats want women to be:** a Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, who proved that you can have a family and a successful career, an American patriot that dismantles the Left’s narrative that the GOP is for men and misogynists.

Fellow Conservative, we hold the power to take back the House in 2022, but only if every conservative across the nation helps us get the job done to diversify and grow our Party. [**Will you invest $10, $15, $25 or even $50 right now to help me take down Pelosi and the Democrats’ majority?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2aae4b65f69c4b84bdc6a5283c503d45&_e=iLDup4E0zx1Nxk2FLaUeVsxL0uwoEGOsGfIBwohWP1jQqhEr6rng3o9jC43gp59zUpn-hNeIkK6Tv0v0vDUu0LMxJUOuAlZRGiPGSX3DjReDLQmMwyTKmqWXQ6DAAS4fjyohDZOoByrEuahlVtjcCep3XULY8CeiyitsELX8f5EQZhSqEPPKT7BXbBBD6ofp5STayrB3ZgXi37w6IpFR2SsOdigdaOKhqZIy9xWL16jgBFa6dlZ3HAclUsTzDZVD3x3cDXJoVH8Loi7mmPbY5naXtce9egxs-PxqG7b0Dl8Q-E1MeZPW_CPX2rGMkiorBT6gzdb0vzX8DcseckyJ_MnjSASOkV5BJZKa3PPgRxQCEMJw_IXE7V9xJEj1iaa-eRFGZF8EplIKeRRFkrQI_VdnmO_lMQIcAd28DYrfwUkGpPZ0KNiP_jp5k4-tnrqgT7PQeOt1_mP4PNkuQ7z5PQ%3D%3D)

The Republican Party made history in 2020 - leading the way to the election of the largest class of Republican women to the U.S. House in American history. Last cycle, 11 Republican women flipped Democrat seats. A woman won in almost every district the GOP flipped! It’s clear, friend, conservative women are leading the charge to take back the House in 2022. That’s why I am reaching out to you today, For those that do not know me, my name is April Becker. I am a lawyer, mother, wife, unapologetic conservative, and I am running for Congress in one of the NRCC’s target districts, Nevada-03, where I am taking on a little-known Democrat with no accomplishments to speak of - other than voting with Pelosi 99% of the time. If I am elected to Congress, you can be sure I won’t be described as a wallflower. I am 100% dedicated to our conservative cause and will fight every day against the Democrats’ push for socialism in America. body:
Congressman Ken Calvert (R-Corona) has announced his support for Nathan Hochman in the 2022 race for California Attorney General. | | | [Peter, to v](https://mailchi.mp/b2a2ea36588c/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4416698?e=94837ebab3)[iew this email in ](https://mailchi.mp/b2a2ea36588c/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4416698?e=94837ebab3)[your](https://mailchi.mp/b2a2ea36588c/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4416698?e=94837ebab3)[ browser](https://mailchi.mp/b2a2ea36588c/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4416698?e=94837ebab3)[, click here.](https://mailchi.mp/b2a2ea36588c/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4416698?e=94837ebab3)
---
| |
---
| | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
August 18, 2021
---
Contact:
press@nathanhochman.com
---
| **Congressman Ken Calvert Endorses Nathan Hochman for Attorney General**
---
| **Los Angeles, CA –** Congressman Ken Calvert, who represents parts of Riverside County in Congress, has announced his support for former US Assistant Attorney General and candidate for California Attorney General, Nathan Hochman, as he runs to succeed Newsom appointee Rob Bonta in 2022.

In announcing his endorsement, Congressman Calvert stated: _“I support Nathan Hochman because he is the only candidate for Attorney General with the experience and competence needed to fix our state's public safety issues. I am confident that as Attorney General, Nathan will ensure our communities remain safe and secure."_

In response to the news, Hochman stated _"I am thrilled that Congressman Calvert is joining our team and supporting my campaign. Across California, families are feeling the unfortunate consequences of decades of mismanagement surrounding crime and justice in this state. Californians are ready for change and as a result, our campaign continues to grow every day."_

Nathan Hochman is an experienced prosecutor, lawyer, and civic leader. After graduating from Brown University and earning his law degree from Stanford Law School, Hochman clerked for a US District Court Judge in Los Angeles before becoming an Assistant US Attorney for the Central District of California. As a prosecutor, Hochman brought justice to drug lords, corrupt government officials, tax evaders, and violent gang members. In 2008, Hochman was appointed by President George W. Bush and confirmed by the US Senate as US Assistant Attorney General overseeing the Department of Justice’s Tax Division. Nathan has served his community on numerous charitable boards and as a member and President of the Los Angeles City Ethics Commission.

Hochman launched his campaign for Attorney General at the end of April and has since raised nearly a million dollars—establishing himself as the leading Republican challenger to Gavin Newsom appointed Attorney General Rob Bonta in the 2022 election.

For updates on this campaign, visit [NathanHochman.com](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=87fb740be1&e=94837ebab3) or follow Nathan Hochman for Attorney General on [Facebook](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=4455fd2d34&e=94837ebab3), [Twitter](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=c645777728&e=94837ebab3), [Instagram](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=1a33e60362&e=94837ebab3) and [TikTok](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=7823161f02&e=94837ebab3). ###

clean_body: Congressman Ken Calvert (R-Corona) has announced his support for Nathan Hochman in the 2022 race for California Attorney General. | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE August 18, 2021 Contact: press@nathanhochman.com | Congressman Ken Calvert Endorses Nathan Hochman for Attorney General | Los Angeles, CA – Congressman Ken Calvert, who represents parts of Riverside County in Congress, has announced his support for former US Assistant Attorney General and candidate for California Attorney General, Nathan Hochman, as he runs to succeed Newsom appointee Rob Bonta in 2022. In announcing his endorsement, Congressman Calvert stated: “I support Nathan Hochman because he is the only candidate for Attorney General with the experience and competence needed to fix our state's public safety issues. I am confident that as Attorney General, Nathan will ensure our communities remain safe and secure." In response to the news, Hochman stated "I am thrilled that Congressman Calvert is joining our team and supporting my campaign. Across California, families are feeling the unfortunate consequences of decades of mismanagement surrounding crime and justice in this state. Californians are ready for change and as a result, our campaign continues to grow every day." Nathan Hochman is an experienced prosecutor, lawyer, and civic leader. After graduating from Brown University and earning his law degree from Stanford Law School, Hochman clerked for a US District Court Judge in Los Angeles before becoming an Assistant US Attorney for the Central District of California. As a prosecutor, Hochman brought justice to drug lords, corrupt government officials, tax evaders, and violent gang members. In 2008, Hochman was appointed by President George W. Bush and confirmed by the US Senate as US Assistant Attorney General overseeing the Department of Justice’s Tax Division. Nathan has served his community on numerous charitable boards and as a member and President of the Los Angeles City Ethics Commission. Hochman launched his campaign for Attorney General at the end of April and has since raised nearly a million dollars—establishing himself as the leading Republican challenger to Gavin Newsom appointed Attorney General Rob Bonta in the 2022 election. For updates on this campaign, visit or follow Nathan Hochman for Attorney General on , , and . ### | | Paid for by Nathan Hochman for Attorney General 2022 FPPC ID 1437955 Want to change how you receive these emails? #

Friends - we have three very important pieces of information to share with you.
1\. CNN has again named us one of the Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022.
2\. Donald Trump flew to Arizona to attend a rally where he said, “Taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.”
3\. So now we need your help! Our goal in August is to get 50,000 donations to help fuel this campaign to keep Mark in the Senate.
And it’s going to be crucial we hit this goal, because with the Senate again up for grabs, this is already a multimillion-dollar race.

name: Warnock, Raphael
subject: this race will decide Senate control
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34275233/301465573/683353327?refcode=20210818_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDhjZWZiOC02MTAwLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3eK5CmXdrH_pjV1saDMVW1jF2evR7bpRnOTMcVxxnxk=) Friend, I'm the most vulnerable incumbent Senate Democrat up for reelection next year, and I need your help: While I've spent my time in office providing pandemic relief to struggling families, fighting for voting rights and delivering on our progressive priorities, extremist Republicans are doing everything they can to attack me and smear my record. Here's why: Experts at _POLITICO_ say that Democrats' chances of defending our razor-thin majority hinge on keeping Georgia blue. This race will decide Senate control – but while GOP megadonors and dark money groups have millions to spend to try and buy this seat, we're running a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots support. **And unfortunately, with time running out before our crucial midnight fundraising deadline, we're falling incredibly short of our goal.** **So I'm personally reaching out to ask for your help today. I need to raise another $8,346 to fight back against GOP attacks and protect my seat – and I'm counting on you to help me get there:[ Please, will you give $15 or more right now – to be split between my campaign and Seth Moulton's – so we can win in Georgia and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34275234/301465574/683353327?refcode=20210818_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDhjZWZiOC02MTAwLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3eK5CmXdrH_pjV1saDMVW1jF2evR7bpRnOTMcVxxnxk=) ** As a kid who grew up in public housing, I know what it's like to be counted out before you even get started. But through hard work and the support of my family and community, I was able to graduate from college and went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, I'm proudly serving as the first Black senator in Georgia's history. But here's the deal: **With the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat to retake control – and NBC News confirms that they're coming after me as a top target for defeat.** That's why we have to fight back _now_ – and it's why falling short of important goals like this isn't an option. Because if we fail to keep Georgia blue, Mitch McConnell will be back calling the shots and obstructing our Democratic agenda at every turn. **The battle for Senate control will be won or lost in Georgia, friend. So if you care about defending our Democratic Senate, I'm counting on you to rush your immediate grassroots support before it's too late:** [**Please, split a contribution between my campaign and Seth Moulton's – before our crucial midnight deadline – to help us fight back against GOP attacks, keep Georgia blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority! **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34275235/301465575/683353327?refcode=20210818_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDhjZWZiOC02MTAwLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3eK5CmXdrH_pjV1saDMVW1jF2evR7bpRnOTMcVxxnxk=) I appreciate it – thank you so much. — Raphael Warnock

body:
Right now Florida leads the nation in new COVID cases and deaths. |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34275615/301467103/786059518?refcode=20210818_f_1_fl&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzcwNGExOS02MzAwLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1idz3LvMPnMEpwkreIHUyVgP7BBa9ZHhTsmqsfbP7N8=)
---

Friend,

Right now Florida leads the nation in new COVID cases and deaths. And yet rather than taking the steps needed to keep Floridians safe, Gov. Ron DeSantis is going to war against common sense and threatening to defund schools where they’re asking kids to wear masks.

We need to keep talking to voters about Gov. DeSantis’ failure to lead in the pandemic, so our campaign is launching a new TV ad that will be on the air today. **[Can you make a donation so we can keep talking to persuadable voters and defeat Gov. DeSantis? name: Kathy Barnette
subject: I’ll put America First in the Senate
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016-3SBDw113sWDht4S3MJ6GWm99syfPsSgFGwK5ugQr5kyqx1VgpPBovdP8m8Gh1A39XNn8NwckjImf1PHDu2mBV7z9IEzIxPYYzlAsP_zs2z3moo378mzN-Vdduc_PCI6jJk6AytmUKMs7MHbxQMnStcZrYZHABs2da3SDf5S9MVJG_uTgIFTXYOTwtG4km0alxBPnUH3QI=&c=amd_SEp7r9oRQPM1B8HB7XHiidz8oj7kaL2bVVuPZz7As97PkwwAZQ==&ch=2p5p9l0oAatwPa2ghpo8Y7Ez5azknr-ojytT21VoPf1rvFmBpWKAtQ==)
---
|
---
| Peter,
---
| Our country is in trouble. It's being unraveled at every seam because its elected officials - the ones tasked with safeguarding it and looking after its people - have refused to accept the simple idea that America should be put FIRST!
---
| | | [PITCH IN FOR AMERICA FIRST LEADERSHIP](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016-3SBDw113sWDht4S3MJ6GWm99syfPsSgFGwK5ugQr5kyqx1VgpPBovdP8m8Gh1A39XNn8NwckjImf1PHDu2mBV7z9IEzIxPYYzlAsP_zs2z3moo378mzN-Vdduc_PCI6jJk6AytmUKMs7MHbxQMnStcZrYZHABs2da3SDf5S9MVJG_uTgIFTXYOTwtG4km0alxBPnUH3QI=&c=amd_SEp7r9oRQPM1B8HB7XHiidz8oj7kaL2bVVuPZz7As97PkwwAZQ==&ch=2p5p9l0oAatwPa2ghpo8Y7Ez5azknr-ojytT21VoPf1rvFmBpWKAtQ==)
---
| But if our historic campaign is successful next fall, and I'm given the honor of serving you in the United States Senate, I won't let this trend continue.
I'll work to secure our Southern Border with a wall. I'll make sure America's elections aren't rampant with fraud and abuse. I'll push to make sure our babies aren't taught to hate their country under a curriculum that makes America racist again.
And I will make sure America First leadership is restored in our nation's capital! Peter,

I can’t stay silent about it.

**Saying that this administration screwed up is a MAJOR understatement. **

Because of Biden’s thoughtless actions, the Taliban has reclaimed control of Afghanistan. Countless Americans are still stranded and can’t get out. People are chanting “Death to America” in the streets. Terrified Afghans fell to their death after clinging to the landing gear of American planes leaving the country.

Their blood is on Joe Biden’s hands.

**We must hold Joe Biden accountable for making our country look weak, erasing decades of progress in Afghanistan, and ending innocent lives.**

I’m leading the charge. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Sinema is doubling down on reconciliation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, Democrats are aiming to pass President Biden's signature American Jobs Plan and American Families Plan. **But Kyrsten Sinema has other plans.** According to The Arizona Republic, Sinema submitted a statement saying that she will not vote for this groundbreaking legislation. Right now, the 2022 midterm elections look uncertain for Democrats. And if this legislation does not pass, Americans will blame the Democrats and we will lose our majority in 2022. We need every single Democrat in the Senate to vote yes \-- and Sinema has signalled she might be willing to negotiate. That's why we're ramping up the efforts of this pressure campaign and pushing Sinema to vote yes on this legislation. We refuse to let this bill die in the Senate, so we need to turn up the pressure on Sinema to vote with her Democratic colleagues. **[We're asking you to step up today and make a donation now to show Kyrsten Sinema that the American people support Biden's American Jobs Plan and American Families Plan. body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mihG2-M7AB3dkcwwbh_95NDChCmfzA53xkNbfwuFN23RPT8aLgT21MP89Rzv8nSq9rJ0ojtUGZzEJQx6lrEesZoyryqZDKPPH39MuhOhwfrXaz3tmjSHVhXwbPWyT3v6n8HNK_XilguShM-TxNuUcgn8z3YxJoHHzklpynJ-i7g4dp_3HTn6pauL_cYWPYgvPZd6j91syHUuqC-UfGNT_LQarwv7RPpj9Y8EtdLzbtfU9tHMF6CyoKWAWk_GU_sNfkD53aQfWExIdbUZSCP8c_sidy0r46JKsoSPYXafrcEfPJnkTnQ8Jve3zqVa-kG4Y3puJxYvT8gOwKUIZt9gcqQTzTzX68qrWTegNhYAE8Fxcjipp0p8N_UtyLGLSIt6beGyzfFaPIbXRWSQKyjEu3MQ/3ek/_wx_q59uRi2kKs5BaeiN5w/h0/fBPliEMEc8RmlU2rJUb7Q0kUWCw0BtejxFUfXDSgk6A)
My name is Marcus Flowers and I am an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common sense to our political discourse.

As someone who spent a decade of my life serving in war zones, I’m sick of seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene and the other leaders of the alt-right hijack the phrase "patriotism" to serve their own vile beliefs. I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it.

**Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? clean_body: | | | My name is Marcus Flowers and I am an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common sense to our political discourse. As someone who spent a decade of my life serving in war zones, I’m sick of seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene and the other leaders of the alt-right hijack the phrase "patriotism" to serve their own vile beliefs. I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it. Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? I knew I had to get in the race. Now, let’s not kid ourselves: the battle to unseat Greene and other Trump-Republicans like Glenn Youngkin will be difficult. She is the new darling of the Radical Right media machine -- and she’s backed by millions in special-interest money. But one thing I’ve learned throughout my career in service is that when the mission is this important, you have to stay focused. Together we can accomplish great things, Marcus Flowers | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Terry McAuliffe, please .

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: this moment
disclaimer_text: paid for by Forward Florida,1931 Cordova Road, Suite 2016, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33316, independently of any candidate
body:
I hope this finds you in good health. Like many of you, I am shocked and alarmed at the recent rise of COVID-19 cases in Florida and the refusal of Governor Ron DeSantis to lead at this moment.
Friend,

I hope this finds you in good health.

Like many of you, I am shocked and alarmed at the recent rise of COVID-19 cases in Florida and the refusal of Governor Ron DeSantis to lead at this moment. While classrooms open around the Sunshine State for the start of a new school year, the Governor prefers to score political points on Fox News by threatening the salaries of our educators rather than keeping our children safe.

Last week we also saw a major United Nations scientific report that concluded global warming is intensifying and there is only a short window to prevent the most harrowing future for our planet. We find ourselves in a dangerous time where scientific facts are labeled by some as opinion, and common sense solutions are derided as radical.

All the while, Republicans across the country are laying siege to voting rights. So far this year, Republican lawmakers in 48 states have introduced at least 389 restrictive voting bills. Their strategy is clear: if they do not like the values and ideals of the majority, they will attempt to silence it. Now more than ever, the federal government must act to pass nationwide voting protections.

In the words of Frederick Douglas, “Power concedes nothing without a demand.” It is time to demand that our leaders take this pandemic seriously. That they believe in climate change and trust science. And that they do everything within their power to protect the hallmark of American democracy — the right to vote.

I will be doing everything in my power to cause “good trouble” and keep the pressure on those who represent us to step up at this moment. I hope I can count on you all to do the same.

In Solidarity,

Andrew

Paid political advertisement paid for by Forward Florida,1931 Cordova Road, Suite 2016, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33316, independently of any candidate. This advertisement was not approved by any candidate.
---
Forward Florida
1931 Cordova Road, Suite 2016
Fort Lauderdale, FL 33316
United States

clean_body: What is something that has inspired you to take action? = Friend, Tom ran for Congress because he knows that public service can positively impact all of us. He’s working to ensure that Arizonans have a seat at the table, and he’s proud of being a public servant. Now, we want to know: What was something that inspired you to take action? What issues moved you to help out a neighbor, cast your ballot, or give a few bucks to a candidate you believed in? | ********** Staying in touch with what moves people helps us run a campaign focused on what matters most. Your answers will remind us why this work is so critical and help us motivate others to support this campaign. We look forward to reading your responses. Team O’Halleran Tom O'Halleran has a proven track record of working across the aisle to get things done. He believes Congress has a responsibility to put aside partisan politics and work together to solve the problems affecting America and Arizona. With your help, we can find solutions to the problems that Arizonans and Americans face today. = | ****=****** | | Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress Tom O'Halleran, PO Box 63992, Phoenix, AZ 85082
