Fellow Conservative,

**It appears that the House’s third most senior Democrat has finally lost it.** Now in his 36th year of _“service”_ to the nation, my progressive opponent, Peter DeFazio, chairman of the House Transportation Committee - and the man behind the push to spend upwards of $4 trillion on government handouts - **has let the power go to his head.**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=66178fab16f34c08b1664482d93c374b&_e=Eqk_XZ9uUs3ZtMhHDRTOf4AmnNiTlnDKLNHe4bUhuw6y8NGXG2re0LZNbHhBZNuLTIcMgBfp1zkOu_XktyS4vpnk4LQxDoeTekbiS8QS9SQkdD4A_QszrFIjngcK3LdTqDnt1bmOYRn3WcIHdpnM8eYzxtBeLtCXKNbqrbtJnSkk3B5eB8F79hPxpBC9kWzRvJbGkdNQB2vZFCgcMKybfl2XrgNsMx7rrxq5w-HINKDQqPvE9-Y8QJBZx5F7g5DlsC-Ntemv9Qc7IUqkelPO6j1ytbEZKwcYmulNHG292ZOv-cgS4lkmQhvV-mN9Sc_Sk9wd7kYvAu55dBvIwJpmeEBchztCsxGqm8iugxuvSX0Kaq_H1WGju6y68SsA0iyTM3zCVr5EFGs3qwQIpAvcRsswxRa5iJib_jyndEvjZIq5tKc8nSTUwqECtIxJgAJ_ReE9SpWAS2rrH6iD84raJQ%3D%3D)
There is no doubt about it: America needs an infrastructure upgrade. Now the question becomes, “what can be classified as infrastructure?” Well, it may come as news to many progressives around the country, but **free community college is by no means _“infrastructure.”_**

**Now, I’m not saying that I’m for or against free community college, but when we’re talking about major legislation that would nationalize higher education, it deserves a stand-alone debate.**

**We really need to think twice before we saddle every man, woman and child with $13,000 in additional debt.**

[**HELP ME STOP THE MAN
BANKRUPTING AMERICA -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=66178fab16f34c08b1664482d93c374b&_e=Eqk_XZ9uUs3ZtMhHDRTOf4AmnNiTlnDKLNHe4bUhuw6y8NGXG2re0LZNbHhBZNuLTIcMgBfp1zkOu_XktyS4vpnk4LQxDoeTekbiS8QS9SQkdD4A_QszrFIjngcK3LdTqDnt1bmOYRn3WcIHdpnM8eYzxtBeLtCXKNbqrbtJnSkk3B5eB8F79hPxpBC9kWzRvJbGkdNQB2vZFCgcMKybfl2XrgNsMx7rrxq5w-HINKDQqPvE9-Y8QJBZx5F7g5DlTWJ08XF7dbxjp5NSh-wIwPa7XG2SZoND4xzf4wkzoW3DoFsNr2BolEvWda8M3O8g9pMUvNoylYZSia82uNDKCl4p1daP24Q-9AWCjwmHKfja5wzpeZ2j7_SugWOgNCg1CskE0fbQFR2FkBgcFMFs2r2UieT3wFtrBTyxxEzJykp_tzlDVOHnuhTc-p_X9cA2D1Sk7vU410T4LAsVIzHzEA%3D%3D)
But that’s not something my opponent, aka **the Bernie Sanders of the U.S. House** would agree with. He bills himself as a moderate to the voters of our rural Oregon district, but even a national newspaper recently wrote that _**“DeFazio is the rare battleground incumbent who could hardly be confused for a moderate.”**_

[**So, you see first, I’m running against the man who is literally on the verge of bankrupting America, and I’m calling on you for your help today.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=66178fab16f34c08b1664482d93c374b&_e=Eqk_XZ9uUs3ZtMhHDRTOf4AmnNiTlnDKLNHe4bUhuw6y8NGXG2re0LZNbHhBZNuLTIcMgBfp1zkOu_XktyS4vpnk4LQxDoeTekbiS8QS9SQkdD4A_QszrFIjngcK3LdTqDnt1bmOYRn3WcIHdpnM8eYzxtBeLtCXKNbqrbtJnSkk3B5eB8F79hPxpBC9kWzRvJbGkdNQB2vZFCgcMKybfl2XrgNsMx7rrxq5w-HINKDQqPvE9-Y8QJBZx5F7g5DlLUJqQwEesy0aUQtAPqPYjtFA1gYLC7twO09RUC7iD8inDCWhzw6lCYqBw_AFDBSFutHn1SakjmahqRIz0m0OiuQc5y6KgEaf1361vqd_Oou8b7e72rTRbF5fkZuqLMI8z_iU7Rz6kNhwQEda3PgRrEbrHLshHK8b__NfSHeKjZYxiHjP8OX-pHN2IDona5SdI-R97HOJXSqFlq0YAzBCOA%3D%3D) I need to make sure the voters of my district know that while we’re in a pro-Republican congressional district, they’re being represented by one of the most progressive members of the House.

I’d like to start airing digital ads around the district in an effort to make sure that if Democrats in the House decide to spend $3.5 trillion on “infrastructure” without Republican support, they know who is responsible. [**Can I count on you to make a contribution of just $5, $10, or even $15 right now?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=66178fab16f34c08b1664482d93c374b&_e=Eqk_XZ9uUs3ZtMhHDRTOf4AmnNiTlnDKLNHe4bUhuw6y8NGXG2re0LZNbHhBZNuLTIcMgBfp1zkOu_XktyS4vpnk4LQxDoeTekbiS8QS9SQkdD4A_QszrFIjngcK3LdTqDnt1bmOYRn3WcIHdpnM8eYzxtBeLtCXKNbqrbtJnSkk3B5eB8F79hPxpBC9kWzRvJbGkdNQB2vZFCgcMKybfl2XrgNsMx7rrxq5w-HINKDQqPvE9-Y8QJBZx5F7g5DlEBUG-XUgrO0tEcYNwkbfUwt5jzTouj8pYK5ZkY-M6jGBcZCpICsE5AwAJpfPBYoYLMnd63cTs7EbUGcSexeT9cO3M531JNgjLQozM1CyIPU_oMl0xnFdgPYXvPgxJ7WSsmRBgnBFq7AzhFpHZ2Hdlpdx1B2DCU1uW7zUGnkwn5jktxdrG1LQiUSiqAD-JOt2s-jkoiuEOeY8C9Eq45bhfQ%3D%3D)

[**HELP ME STOP THE MAN
BANKRUPTING AMERICA -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=66178fab16f34c08b1664482d93c374b&_e=Eqk_XZ9uUs3ZtMhHDRTOf4AmnNiTlnDKLNHe4bUhuw6y8NGXG2re0LZNbHhBZNuLTIcMgBfp1zkOu_XktyS4vpnk4LQxDoeTekbiS8QS9SQkdD4A_QszrFIjngcK3LdTqDnt1bmOYRn3WcIHdpnM8eYzxtBeLtCXKNbqrbtJnSkk3B5eB8F79hPxpBC9kWzRvJbGkdNQB2vZFCgcMKybfl2XrgNsMx7rrxq5w-HINKDQqPvE9-Y8QJBZx5F7g5Dlx9E4u6zdwPfINXSDmtbqcF933-_FRoYJpx7C-lxVt3gUCc7VhXWJ8a_HTGPTuE9HXzQS6yDhZrGnRlmJ9aY0sKoXDj3RWKsDJP3xZzxILTE4wqA9oUFTteVdEOZ_6gMdJmsYjXyTtfhYAg2LSRwDLUD7B6lUsyAj32ZCTrT2Bcd10vr0JYzIP4wsdzOUoU2kSuW5iQ0R4FUdn_gU33mupA%3D%3D)
Let me make this crystal clear. My progressive opponent calls the bipartisan infrastructure bill “crap,” simply because Republicans helped negotiate it. So much for even trying to pretend House Dems believe in working across the aisle these days. But we already knew that.

[**We’ve got one more shot to save America from financial ruin and I’m asking for your help today.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=66178fab16f34c08b1664482d93c374b&_e=Eqk_XZ9uUs3ZtMhHDRTOf4AmnNiTlnDKLNHe4bUhuw6y8NGXG2re0LZNbHhBZNuLTIcMgBfp1zkOu_XktyS4vpnk4LQxDoeTekbiS8QS9SQkdD4A_QszrFIjngcK3LdTqDnt1bmOYRn3WcIHdpnM8eYzxtBeLtCXKNbqrbtJnSkk3B5eB8F79hPxpBC9kWzRvJbGkdNQB2vZFCgcMKybfl2XrgNsMx7rrxq5w-HINKDQqPvE9-Y8QJBZx5F7g5Dly6eQZAigvVhGVz1UPjI9aGc48N9N1hbZva2x7RhR3xu-w6U6IhzJVkjNIUt5EbgDgtyLCY8QD7u0PfZ4Mfx-10qi3eeLb6uWY-YYD0yef1tmH2avkAL1Rjk8pwi-vkNPsZg2xgovd5J8bqqGIO4l9uwM1tNY8jnhW2CnnfflWtiy5cl-6Hd0kbPOR9i7LElLvgpasjdkEHsN9QcrUbzj4A%3D%3D)

Think of it this way - we’ll never be able to put up a Republican candidate who can beat Bernie Sanders in Vermont, **but I’m the guy who can beat the Bernie Sanders counterpart in the House next fall.**

Thank you very much.
Alek Skarlatos
Republican for Congress

We really need to think twice before we saddle every man, woman and child with $13,000 in additional debt. But that’s not something my opponent, aka the Bernie Sanders of the U.S. House would agree with. He bills himself as a moderate to the voters of our rural Oregon district, but even a national newspaper recently wrote that “DeFazio is the rare battleground incumbent who could hardly be confused for a moderate.” I need to make sure the voters of my district know that while we’re in a pro-Republican congressional district, they’re being represented by one of the most progressive members of the House. I’d like to start airing digital ads around the district in an effort to make sure that if Democrats in the House decide to spend $3.5 trillion on “infrastructure” without Republican support, they know who is responsible. Let me make this crystal clear. My progressive opponent calls the bipartisan infrastructure bill “crap,” simply because Republicans helped negotiate it. So much for even trying to pretend House Dems believe in working across the aisle these days. But we already knew that. Think of it this way - we’ll never be able to put up a Republican candidate who can beat Bernie Sanders in Vermont, but I’m the guy who can beat the Bernie Sanders counterpart in the House next fall. Thank you very much. Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Homeland Security or the Department of Defense. | Paid For By Alek For Oregon Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

name: Mike Gibbons
subject: Biden should resign.
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ST_hXb1EwF8U9DTXP2wdXH9KX7HVEDB6W-mrlTVEIYPPseHCc1vDpnMwSJToOE3-Awnk3mBp5_w_OtnnPirS96d23tNDmzRMVDWv0Lq663N06ZiDo620o3kBhJAuE4yoB8Tfdw1pA-4kxwT75fQWSsePx-xvEng7IDcK_F4fFTXnHLmILsOjsA==&c=DVNSOS3JTJLq-Moy01DJStos50l26BT1fKCD_fwSUcfmpjom_x2QRw==&ch=ECvIsG83i04PJzdv3m_sBVzlR-c4dkvZTa1S6URTs-kHXPjNKhg21g==)
---
| Peter,
President Trump is right-- Joe Biden needs to resign. His mishandling of the withdrawal in Afghanistan, and his subsequent vacation during the crisis, is embarrassing for America.
This isn't about the withdrawal itself- we needed to leave Afghanistan, but it should have been in a strategic and orderly way. We needed a withdrawal that got all Americans out and prevented our Afghan allies from being slaughtered by the Taliban.

[The Ohio Star](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ST_hXb1EwF8U9DTXP2wdXH9KX7HVEDB6W-mrlTVEIYPPseHCc1vDphjWdQ-L8kzFmFFAXfR3PKCirO6p1QBYfan9B0hoHBVHQTFLLTwgX1PLSgV5HewHP8UEDCvapCvp0npb4SEku7aj1cZM4f6e4M6lMA4_P5uFBU_esMkCp0FMrR4rCJ3L_vvcL-X0YtIkqUVq_ZLpBCtPWHy8wGpxV8FzznR2FDOsEPUrNWHsYCP7pUd1POJhkEiOLX_tGIvzLDABwgV8rr4mfc2yTEGzyMeU9Ur6xleONVvGz2EGEYFSPcDSS-jvDw==&c=DVNSOS3JTJLq-Moy01DJStos50l26BT1fKCD_fwSUcfmpjom_x2QRw==&ch=ECvIsG83i04PJzdv3m_sBVzlR-c4dkvZTa1S6URTs-kHXPjNKhg21g==)
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ST_hXb1EwF8U9DTXP2wdXH9KX7HVEDB6W-mrlTVEIYPPseHCc1vDphjWdQ-L8kzFmFFAXfR3PKCirO6p1QBYfan9B0hoHBVHQTFLLTwgX1PLSgV5HewHP8UEDCvapCvp0npb4SEku7aj1cZM4f6e4M6lMA4_P5uFBU_esMkCp0FMrR4rCJ3L_vvcL-X0YtIkqUVq_ZLpBCtPWHy8wGpxV8FzznR2FDOsEPUrNWHsYCP7pUd1POJhkEiOLX_tGIvzLDABwgV8rr4mfc2yTEGzyMeU9Ur6xleONVvGz2EGEYFSPcDSS-jvDw==&c=DVNSOS3JTJLq-Moy01DJStos50l26BT1fKCD_fwSUcfmpjom_x2QRw==&ch=ECvIsG83i04PJzdv3m_sBVzlR-c4dkvZTa1S6URTs-kHXPjNKhg21g==)
---
| To make it worse, his address to the nation was a shameful, "blame everyone else" speech. Make no mistake: This is Joe Biden's failure. He failed to plan for our withdrawal. He failed to ensure the safety of American diplomats and civilians. He failed to secure the American Embassy. What we're seeing in Afghanistan right now is chaotic, heartbreaking, and enraging, and Joe Biden alone is to blame.
I recently joined the Bob Frantz show in Cleveland to talk about this very issue. Listen to my full interview [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ST_hXb1EwF8U9DTXP2wdXH9KX7HVEDB6W-mrlTVEIYPPseHCc1vDphjWdQ-L8kzFEoPQ382RDNCPfJ2syzwi0G_mFW9VoG3gtA__ORcQiYOlcjXkT5OQ7ooSAKb1Z2p5anpYEJGNBbdLgaPGYJ9KoQ==&c=DVNSOS3JTJLq-Moy01DJStos50l26BT1fKCD_fwSUcfmpjom_x2QRw==&ch=ECvIsG83i04PJzdv3m_sBVzlR-c4dkvZTa1S6URTs-kHXPjNKhg21g==).
Despite the chaos abroad, we are continuing on the campaign trail. Week 2 of our 88 County Tour was a huge success! #TeamGibbons went to 8 new counties, bringing our current total to 24 counties visited. We have met so many wonderful Ohioans, and we still have plenty of places yet to visit.
---
|
---
| Highlights include stopping in Delaware County at the Ohioans for Concealed Carry's annual party where I ran into Boy Scout Troop 95 from Bremen.
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| Then it was off to Adena to support State Sen. Frank Hoagland and over to Steubenville to chat with the Jefferson County GOP!
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| I was also able to stop by the Ashtabula County fair and chat with great patriots who love America.
---
|
---
|
---
| Stay tuned for our updates from the road! Follow our tour around the state on [Facebook](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ST_hXb1EwF8U9DTXP2wdXH9KX7HVEDB6W-mrlTVEIYPPseHCc1vDpj5wP1HH_yF35W5-lb8OHl1r4yw5ztK4qjoaaVEP631fIO3kShnByIzeQrdAZFJNvi13lCuXkjtvO-5bctE9i6RdPpRvjyLI24kOIiEZQRTi&c=DVNSOS3JTJLq-Moy01DJStos50l26BT1fKCD_fwSUcfmpjom_x2QRw==&ch=ECvIsG83i04PJzdv3m_sBVzlR-c4dkvZTa1S6URTs-kHXPjNKhg21g==), [Twitter](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ST_hXb1EwF8U9DTXP2wdXH9KX7HVEDB6W-mrlTVEIYPPseHCc1vDpn--zWiO6PB2IwW5kaOM8mRJkXYTgS_5BWNE76JbriLMjKl4SJ2iXgL5UB-6uV1fffCWNHupuwuZ74bcsEQp8mim74IWBP364jVEtBX2Bybt&c=DVNSOS3JTJLq-Moy01DJStos50l26BT1fKCD_fwSUcfmpjom_x2QRw==&ch=ECvIsG83i04PJzdv3m_sBVzlR-c4dkvZTa1S6URTs-kHXPjNKhg21g==), [GETTR](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ST_hXb1EwF8U9DTXP2wdXH9KX7HVEDB6W-mrlTVEIYPPseHCc1vDpn--zWiO6PB2IWnRO4dWCzUnq9KRTPg6t8DF_bnZ8f-mZnhd_aoqs1JwPc9X5G7Anz6lmRzKdZLEdC5gspEvGFXL_HKDNHkIzs_FdNpJ8QkT&c=DVNSOS3JTJLq-Moy01DJStos50l26BT1fKCD_fwSUcfmpjom_x2QRw==&ch=ECvIsG83i04PJzdv3m_sBVzlR-c4dkvZTa1S6URTs-kHXPjNKhg21g==), and [Instagram](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ST_hXb1EwF8U9DTXP2wdXH9KX7HVEDB6W-mrlTVEIYPPseHCc1vDpn--zWiO6PB2CZdAa993-hcmgIBW_Le3hpixCUr40gX1cjhcPbExryRy26o0cV6DlrI7agDbgCQ2ux8_G6iyI4qQGjON0wFFVm6WAfC99M0dmdV35lB2bWw=&c=DVNSOS3JTJLq-Moy01DJStos50l26BT1fKCD_fwSUcfmpjom_x2QRw==&ch=ECvIsG83i04PJzdv3m_sBVzlR-c4dkvZTa1S6URTs-kHXPjNKhg21g==).
Thanks,

| Mike Gibbons Candidate for U.S. Senate

We needed a withdrawal that got all Americans out and prevented our Afghan allies from being slaughtered by the Taliban. == | == | To make it worse, his address to the nation was a shameful, "blame everyone else" speech. Make no mistake: This is Joe Biden's failure. He failed to plan for our withdrawal. He failed to ensure the safety of American diplomats and civilians. He failed to secure the American Embassy. What we're seeing in Afghanistan right now is chaotic, heartbreaking, and enraging, and Joe Biden alone is to blame. I recently joined the Bob Frantz show in Cleveland to talk about this very issue. Listen to my full interview ==. Despite the chaos abroad, we are continuing on the campaign trail. Week 2 of our 88 County Tour was a huge success! #TeamGibbons went to 8 new counties, bringing our current total to 24 counties visited. We have met so many wonderful Ohioans, and we still have plenty of places yet to visit. | | Highlights include stopping in Delaware County at the Ohioans for Concealed Carry's annual party where I ran into Boy Scout Troop 95 from Bremen. | | | | | | | Then it was off to Adena to support State Sen. Frank Hoagland and over to Steubenville to chat with the Jefferson County GOP! | | | | | | | I was also able to stop by the Ashtabula County fair and chat with great patriots who love America. | | | Stay tuned for our updates from the road! Follow our tour around the state on ==, ==, ==, and ==. Thanks, | Mike Gibbons Candidate for U.S. Senate | | | | | == | www.GibbonsforOhio.com | | Gibbons for Ohio | 1650 E 55th St, #603679, Cleveland, OH 44103 | | Sent by mailto:info@gibbonsforohio.com powered by

We know this election is going to be close. That’s why Republicans like Ken Cuccinelli are coming out of the woodwork, because they think this is their chance to flip Virginia red!

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: [Your thoughts needed] COVID-19 Vaccination Survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34278323/301475893/-272948131?refcode=MTH_em_20210818_X_SURV_VC_X_ACT_US_all_all_VC_MTH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTVjNWRhNi02YzAwLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZT7QNlQxcUqohpZyugEr3ycYguFr0bB-Ez0OsT53bo0=&emci=18cafb7f-6900-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=a55c5da6-6c00-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045)
---
Here’s the deal, folks: Vaccines are the best and most important tool we have to slow the spread of COVID-19 in our communities. Period. Here’s the problem: Almost half of the U.S. population is _not_ fully vaccinated. And lately, the frequency of new cases is closely linked to the amount of folks who aren’t vaccinated in any given place. So many of you have **[started conversations with your loved ones about the importance of getting vaccinated](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34278324/301475897/-404536227?refcode=MTH_em_20210818_X_SURV_VC_X_ACT_US_all_all_VC_MTH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTVjNWRhNi02YzAwLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZT7QNlQxcUqohpZyugEr3ycYguFr0bB-Ez0OsT53bo0=&emci=18cafb7f-6900-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=a55c5da6-6c00-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045)** for themselves and their community — and that’s super important. And many of our universities and employers have stepped up, too, implementing vaccine requirements that will be critical in helping us get to the other side of this pandemic. We must stay focused on ensuring the health and safety of our communities. It’s going to take all of us to keep fighting this pandemic. Each and every one of us has got to do our part to keep our communities safe and healthy. [**But I’ve done enough talking. I want to hear from you. Will you take a few moments to fill out our COVID-19 Vaccination Survey here? I want to hear your take on how we can increase vaccination rates.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34278325/301475898/1708798150?refcode=MTH_em_20210818_X_SURV_VC_X_ACT_US_all_all_VC_MTH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTVjNWRhNi02YzAwLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZT7QNlQxcUqohpZyugEr3ycYguFr0bB-Ez0OsT53bo0=&emci=18cafb7f-6900-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=a55c5da6-6c00-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045) | [TAKE THE SURVEY →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34278327/301475899/1708798150?refcode=MTH_em_20210818_X_SURV_VC_X_ACT_US_all_all_VC_MTH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTVjNWRhNi02YzAwLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZT7QNlQxcUqohpZyugEr3ycYguFr0bB-Ez0OsT53bo0=&emci=18cafb7f-6900-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=a55c5da6-6c00-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045)

name: John Fetterman
subject: I'm humbly asking for your support, Peter:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Allow me to speak my truth.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210818-2315-header&t=1&akid=2315%2E434096%2Es7xuwn)
I'm coming to you today to personally ask if you'll [**chip in your first $5 to our campaign.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27839?refcode=em20210818-2315&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2315%2E434096%2Es7xuwn) Before I get to that, I'd like to share something with you that I'll admit is a bit unconventional:
**I'm about to tell you why NOT to vote for me.**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27839?refcode=em20210818-2315&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2315%2E434096%2Es7xuwn)
I know this isn't exactly your typical politician's stump speech, but please allow me to speak my truth:
No disrespect – although it may be perceived that way – but if Senators Manchin or Sinema are your ideal Senators, then I am *not* your candidate.
If you are looking for a candidate that had to "evolve" on core issues like the $15 minimum wage, then don't vote for me.
If you want a candidate that has outdated views on marijuana, then you and I might have to agree to disagree.
If what you think our democracy needs in this pivotal moment is a candidate who's going to get compliments from Mitch McConnell and his sedition-curious GOP, then I am quite simply not your guy.
Here's the thing, Peter: Right now, some Democrats in the Senate are choosing to stand in the way of bold, transformative, and once-in-a-lifetime legislation. Policies that have the power to lift millions of working people out of poverty, and that actually deliver on President Biden's agenda for American families.
It is my solemn pledge to you that I will not be one of those kinds of Senators. I will *always* act with conviction and vote in favor of progress for the working families of this country.
**Peter, if you want a Democrat that you can depend on, that you know is always going to stand up and fight for you, and is actually going to vote like a Democrat, then I am humbly asking for your support in my campaign.**
[**So, if you're still in my corner after reading this note, then I must ask: Will you chip in anything you can today to support our grassroots campaign? I can't get to the Senate on my own — I'm relying on all of yinz to have my back as we fight together to flip this seat blue.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/27839?refcode=em20210818-2315&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=2315%2E434096%2Es7xuwn)

If you give me your vote now, then you’ll always have mine in the Senate. You will always be able to depend on me to have your back and fight for you when I am in Washington.
Thank you for everything, Peter.
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. I know my campaign and I come to you often to ask for your support, and here's the honest reason why: **With more candidates jumping into this race each day, we're gearing up for one of the most competitive — and most expensive — races in Pennsylvania's history.** I've refused to accept a cent of corporate PAC money, so I'm relying on folks like you. clean_body: Allow me to speak my truth. I'm coming to you today to personally ask if you'll Before I get to that, I'd like to share something with you that I'll admit is a bit unconventional: I'm about to tell you why NOT to vote for me. I know this isn't exactly your typical politician's stump speech, but please allow me to speak my truth: No disrespect – although it may be perceived that way – but if Senators Manchin or Sinema are your ideal Senators, then I am not your candidate. If you are looking for a candidate that had to "evolve" on core issues like the $15 minimum wage, then don't vote for me. If you want a candidate that has outdated views on marijuana, then you and I might have to agree to disagree. If what you think our democracy needs in this pivotal moment is a candidate who's going to get compliments from Mitch McConnell and his sedition-curious GOP, then I am quite simply not your guy. Here's the thing, Peter: Right now, some Democrats in the Senate are choosing to stand in the way of bold, transformative, and once-in-a-lifetime legislation. Policies that have the power to lift millions of working people out of poverty, and that actually deliver on President Biden's agenda for American families. It is my solemn pledge to you that I will not be one of those kinds of Senators. I will always act with conviction and vote in favor of progress for the working families of this country. Peter, if you want a Democrat that you can depend on, that you know is always going to stand up and fight for you, and is actually going to vote like a Democrat, then I am humbly asking for your support in my campaign. If you give me your vote now, then you’ll always have mine in the Senate. You will always be able to depend on me to have your back and fight for you when I am in Washington. name: Kevin Hern
subject: President Biden's Afghan Disaster
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
%%FirstName%%, the American people deserve answers. Read more >>>
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/28d078b12900f228/ef191d32665b2a90c3d6b838967d376c/34143) Peter, The foreign policy disaster unfolding in Afghanistan right now seems to have come as a surprise to President Biden, despite numerous warnings from many military experts. His team has been caught flat-footed and has no answers to the questions so many Americans are asking today. My colleagues and I have attempted to get answers from Secretary of State Anthony Blinken, Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin, and General Mark Milley, Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff. These individuals have refused to answer the most important questions, including:
* What is the Biden Administration’s plan for protecting Americans abroad including many who are still in Afghanistan?
* With reports and videos of thousands of terrorists being freed from jails in Afghanistan, what is President Biden doing to keep our citizens safe and close the gaping hole in our southern border?
* What is the status of the taxpayer-funded, high-tech equipment left behind for the Afghan Security Forces?

While Afghanistan collapsed to violent terrorists, the President was on vacation. He came back to the White House to give a short statement pointing the blame at everyone but himself, then immediately returned to his vacation. This isn't leadership. It's time for President Biden to face the realities of his destructive foreign policy decisions. Putting America first doesn’t mean putting America’s security last. The President’s botched withdrawal has put American lives and those of our allies in jeopardy. I will continue to demand answers from President Biden on behalf of my fellow Oklahomans and all Americans. Sincerely,
Kevin Hern
Congressman
Oklahoma’s First District [**DONATE**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/28d078b12900f228/8bca300afd994d8dc3d6b838967d376c/34143) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/28d078b12900f228/0dbdb1defb9add80c3d6b838967d376c/34143) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/28d078b12900f228/f3d3330ccc04bbe5c3d6b838967d376c/34143)

| 101 years ago today, the United States ratified the 19th Amendment, giving women the right to vote. While there is, even today, a long way to go to ensure voting rights for all Americans, this historic legislation was and is hugely significant. And just eight years before the passage of the 19th Amendment, my home state of Arizona became the 48th state in our nation.

**It is amazing to think that just over a century ago, women were, for the first time, allowed to vote in the brand-new state of Arizona — and today, my mom, Delina DiSanto, is running to represent Arizona in Congress._[Can you support her campaign by chipping in $5 or more today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34278912/301477598/-1204788432?refcode=BLU-DDC-20210818-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzc4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODAyYTFmZS02ZTAwLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jpUDCqSwBXUkrLkGjnQ8bT7fyR3rS49WHkiJgLMgDY8=)_**

clean_body: It is amazing to think that just over a century ago, women were, for the first time, allowed to vote in the brand-new state of Arizona. | = | 101 years ago today, the United States ratified the 19th Amendment, giving women the right to vote. While there is, even today, a long way to go to ensure voting rights for all Americans, this historic legislation was and is hugely significant. And just eight years before the passage of the 19th Amendment, my home state of Arizona became the 48th state in our nation. It is amazing to think that just over a century ago, women were, for the first time, allowed to vote in the brand-new state of Arizona — and today, my mom, Delina DiSanto, is running to represent Arizona in Congress.= | = My mom is the strongest woman I know. My whole life, she has taught me that women can do anything we set our minds to, from fighting for the right to vote to running for Congress. Unlike Paul Gosar's family, my family and I are all in to get my mom elected= | | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for supporting my mom, Dakota Jeane DiSanto = * | | = Paid for by Delina DiSanto for Congress Delina DiSanto for Congress PO Box 4809 Cave Creek, AZ 85327 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

body:
Sign your name onto the Official Impeach Joe Biden petition below.

| August 17th
---
| | |
---
| A Message from Laurel Imer on Afghanistan.
---
| |
---
| Patriot,
The utter and complete failure of the United States "war" in Afghanistan is simply a snapshot into the realization of the failure of globalism to the citizens of the United States and the world.
I, in full transparency, supported the Bush decision to go to war following the attacks of 9-11, when I believed the intent was to win. It is now clear, that the Bureaucrats in Washington DC effectively tied the laces of our boots on the ground and caused irreparable damage to countless American families.
I have since learned and pay better attention to the outcome of the consequences of the actions our government takes when they try to be the keeper of the world.
Following WWII, the choice of war has never been about winning, rather, about the need to participate in some type of Preschool Globalist Group Time- playing a circle jerk of political correctness. The rules of engagement we put on our troops are disgraceful at best. We send our men and women into harm's way - without the tools to win the fight and then cry about the consequences of war.
Somewhere along the way, we failed to understand the meaning of the word. Are we there for an Absolute war - Instrumental war - or Agonistic fighting? This is the problem - no one ever asked what type of engagement we were beginning.
I do not agree with war - however, if we are going there, then go to win - Period. There is no other alternative in my interpretation. This is the failure we are seeing firsthand today in Afghanistan.
The failure to understand the purpose of the fight, with no end in sight. We instead put American soldier's lives on the line- for the longest war in American history - for what? NOTHING!!! Nothing but a global game of tag.
Now - we leave millions of dollars of American-made equipment - tanks, weapons, drones - in the hands of the enemy. The enemy, who has declared JIHAD on citizens around the world, including Americans for decades.
How utterly ridiculous and a complete insult to the families of those who lost everything. I am grieving today with over 2,000 GOLD STAR families, the mothers, fathers, brothers, sisters, and more whose loved ones gave the last measure of devotion for a fight we never intended to actually win.
What about the physical sacrifices of over 20,000 of our wounded brothers and sisters since 2001?
History repeats itself for those who fail to learn the lessons provided. I supported troop withdrawal in the region for many reasons - but it had to be done in an intelligent manner with proper planning and knowledge of the possible repercussion of those actions, i.e., the effect our leaving would have on the Afghan people, and our citizens in Afghanistan as well.
But - no, the Biden administration gave no regard for anyone's security or safety, our Americans stationed there, or the safety of any others in the region. So now here we are, 20 years later for what?
Once again never considering the outcome, what happens now? Terrorism of the rise? Oil and gas prices? The safety of the Middle East, Israel, the United States, The World?
Tell me today, how are those globalists, save the world policies working out?
As Americans, we should demand that our leaders only and always do what is best for the lives of American citizens. Fight if we must - to defend the United States and our Allies - to the death and complete destruction - if that is what is necessary. If we cannot commit to winning the war then do not go to war!
Remember WWII. Had we not made the ultimate decision to fight - and to win - where would we be today? We must learn from our mistakes and not let history repeat itself for future generations. Always putting America First instead of others is the decision I stand behind today and always.
I, Laurel Imer, am calling for the Impeachment of the Biden Administration for their blatant Dereliction of Duty in the midst of the Afghanistan Crisis, and I hope you will join me in the fight to Save America and Put America First once again.
---

Sincerely, Laurel Imer Republican Candidate, CO-07 | == | | | | | == | == == == | == | | | == | This email was Paid for By Laurel Imer for Congress | | Laurel Imer for Congress | PO Box 17747, Golden, CO 80402 | | Sent by mailto:contact@laurelimerforcongress.com powered by

name: Matt Jacobs, Candidate for Congress (CA-26)
subject: Chaos in Afghanistan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Jacobs for Congress
body:
Taliban Capitalize on Disastrous Withdrawal Strategy and Execution - Just weeks ago, President Biden promised an orderly withdrawal from Afghanistan: “The likelihood there’s going to be the Taliban overrunning everything and owning the whole country is highly unlikely,” he said. “There’s going to be no circumstance where you see people being lifted off the roof of [the U.S.] Embassy.” **President Biden was wrong. ** Not only did we see helicopter evacuations from the roof of the U.S. Embassy – we also saw horrific images of Afghans clinging to a U.S. military plane and falling from the sky to their deaths. Our core mission in Afghanistan after 9/11 was to prevent the country from continuing to serve as a terrorist safe haven. **Now, because of the way this withdrawal was planned and executed, the terrorists are free to return, and America is less safe as a result.** Meanwhile, an unknown number of Americans and thousands of Afghan allies remain trapped in Afghanistan – effectively hostages of the Taliban. * * * **As a federal prosecutor, I spent years investigating and prosecuting al-Qaeda terrorists who murdered Americans. ** During that time, I got to know many brave American servicemen and servicewomen who sacrificed so much in Afghanistan to keep us safe here at home. **My thoughts are with them right now, and I remain deeply grateful for their service.** My thoughts are also with the Afghan people – especially the women and girls who will once again be subjected to medieval Sharia law under Taliban rule. * * * We’ll be dealing with the consequences of this foreign policy failure for a long time to come. Our country deserves better. Sincerely yours, Matt Matt Jacobs Candidate for U.S. Congress (CA-26) | | [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=08e7f9568ebd4050ab331e50e7106f1a&_e=r5Rt3r6cwd8T5qRAFMXnKMRnoimQk0g5pWn_aASH5kXAnKn3JdiejMej6r-uNqnjVc5g_rLynR5NEhJ3ms4bshFHrqPTZ_tXEHz6HlNUxLkw25nzPmeyH4lJUIobEACrAE0ckEoHGfckMMq06tF-Yw33yMu9jB118IHghKjvan8PNwBDdEV_GdCyDlnVQ8vq2CtH2wZFBeVuUgaBf8OyL0CyVyFdChiIUPKK6MzdIdJuHB_FUtVI2NvtvLOq93gq5IzkcPHYIVyO0JRneGzjJA%3D%3D) | [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=08e7f9568ebd4050ab331e50e7106f1a&_e=r5Rt3r6cwd8T5qRAFMXnKFdWki6e849wnxzqeMZmNnDrA8L66IR9D9qWx6L1gy9kWLwlOhXg42C-IrifDBNowPao1A4hwVWvoNZVCZ5MwEEo16Bha15kzw47Grag_CqZORqPaTrjMl6A5CUBKgfepUbFFs_AqGTVl2VkPvLUQzPo2bHhdPYD-1IsX_a62otxLp-1MQtT7Unw-vKMS05nK3hzakDoSUU6htV0p9jMokCVBKgJ_wIPdDguXkf65YPnCqLhYrnqbs03gmjdlaNB-w%3D%3D) | [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=08e7f9568ebd4050ab331e50e7106f1a&_e=r5Rt3r6cwd8T5qRAFMXnKGZ5Q6JxfjBvk4ndNW4FggUNIJw5339XfFyYwSI5xrAu-x05JwO7POO9-wOfX3_stEQqKxRh-tWrUWehgmOglR_wS2wqH6vhlAN1V5Lx3QyNHypLneOxbl_u5KljPXKtyIveLE03QfYYnE14yeKlL_Q_Vc2abXrjzoTtdJ4WZqJNdsp_6PIdvrdmzX45lEQqY09shplpAa1wRqx7xavrfFJzWRThcXjr-jWDdkAeVbOKQXmU4i_V-aTul8y1NJTR7PeffUjDOJX0MicTmAftouw%3D) | [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=08e7f9568ebd4050ab331e50e7106f1a&_e=r5Rt3r6cwd8T5qRAFMXnKHqUxG8ptW60CAXGxqo9UHhjPk44o6-WJiAjvCoc9NcPLwlmoeKi93INqL3XCzrglmCqhjhr41v0h_fqr87xM1pJTYVBCH_FIzMOHJEgnEbYjC9fid42Yf1WsMQaj_ZJnLhGOANq0EsZhz5ml7x-cfYAuYuoMe4OIBmIw9DIxiu2duCp5aeVsK5rBKe0PmWZdgmpLDfUhE_wpARL-_93u4j6eVv_JIJ1c95bRrxCu3Gfe9knHieSI4w55UyfejYItZFNe8K8FJJhevYxSkZbBc0%3D)

name: CheriBeasley.com
subject: “The average Black female candidate raised 46 percent less than the average white male candidate.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
One of the biggest obstacles that African American women running for office must confront is fundraising.
#

Right now, there are zero African American women in the Senate, and we need to be honest about some of the reasons for that.
One of the biggest obstacles that African American women running for office must confront is fundraising.
In 2018, the Center for Responsive Politics’ analysis said, **"The average Black female candidate raised 46 percent less than the average white male candidate, but she also raised 55 percent less than the average white female candidate."**
**[If you're ready to help us change this statistic, make a $3 donation to our campaign today. We have an incredible opportunity to bring new leadership by electing Cheri, but it will require all of us to play a part.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34279513/301480209/-928165870?refcode2=7eabed7c-7000-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210818-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWFiZWQ3Yy03MDAwLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6JAp30lOqVRK5wYZYggTaOxXXDYQeDST8zqPbScAcfk=)**
Too often the traditional gatekeepers and political establishment have doubted the ability of African American women to win.
**The fact is we know not only can Cheri win, but she is Democrats’ best chance to flip this seat. She leads in primary polling and is the only Democrat who has won statewide before.**
So we have to make sure our campaign has the resources necessary to compete and challenge any question of if Cheri has what it takes to win.
**[Will you please consider making a $3 donation to help us make history by electing Cheri as North Carolina’s first African American Senator? Cheri is a trailblazer, and with our help, she will win North Carolina and be a voice for all of us in the Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34279514/301480210/-928165870?refcode2=7eabed7c-7000-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210818-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWFiZWQ3Yy03MDAwLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6JAp30lOqVRK5wYZYggTaOxXXDYQeDST8zqPbScAcfk=)**
The obstacles we face in this campaign may be daunting at times, but together, we can overcome them and open the doors of opportunity for every North Carolinian.
\- Team Beasley

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34279966/301481513/-2037180865?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWFkZjQ3Yi03MjAwLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7MErcjuUU1iaZJjwri0DzVZ5e0augp_UXkBGIYLhuuM=&emci=07b1df69-5f00-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=11adf47b-7200-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=12898431)

Friend,
When scientists call the level of global warming a "code red for humanity," it's past time to get serious about climate change.
The Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change (IPCC) is one of the most extensive scientific reviews in global history. Scientists have been sounding the alarm for decades, and it is time for decision makers to listen. [**Will you add your name to our petition calling for bold action on climate change?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34279967/301481514/-441019762?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWFkZjQ3Yi03MjAwLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7MErcjuUU1iaZJjwri0DzVZ5e0augp_UXkBGIYLhuuM=&emci=07b1df69-5f00-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=11adf47b-7200-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=12898431)

Our communities are already hurting from the effects of climate change, but there are steps we can take to limit the damage and stop it from getting worse. From ramping up electric vehicles to plugging leaky natural gas lines and improving our energy efficiency -- there's so much we can do.
Not only will this help to address climate change, it will improve lives right now and create good-paying sustainable jobs in clean energy.
[**So join me in this fight, add your name to demand Congress take bold climate action now!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34279969/301481516/-441019762?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWFkZjQ3Yi03MjAwLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7MErcjuUU1iaZJjwri0DzVZ5e0augp_UXkBGIYLhuuM=&emci=07b1df69-5f00-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=11adf47b-7200-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=12898431)

name: John Cranley
subject: Thank you, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Cranley Committee
body:
Your support is what will make this campaign a success. | Hi friend, **I have to take a moment to say thank you.** Over our campaign’s hectic, exciting first week, I couldn’t have asked for a better network of supporters. You’ve stepped up to make our campaign successful because _you know_ what’s at stake — and you’re ready to help write Ohio’s comeback story. **With your help, we were able to kick off our campaign with _incredible_ grassroots support and beat our very first fundraising goal.** Whether you chipped in $5 or $50, know that your support truly matters to our campaign. It’s what will allow us to flip Ohio blue and bring the changes we need to see to our state’s government. In the weeks and months ahead, I hope to get to know many of you personally — and I was excited to see so many supporters in person over this first week. **_[If you’re all in to help grow our grassroots movement from the ground up, you can let us know that you’d like to volunteer by clicking here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34280378/301482942/567025672?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWQxYmNlMi03MzAwLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bdczZtM_VtbQnHhstA0s8w5VWLJchel6Sbb-1OldOvQ=&emci=4aae3a78-5200-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=cad1bce2-7300-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=22604289)_** And once again, thank you. Let’s do this, John
---
John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

clean_body: Your support is what will make this campaign a success. | Hi friend, I have to take a moment to say thank you. Over our campaign’s hectic, exciting first week, I couldn’t have asked for a better network of supporters. You’ve stepped up to make our campaign successful because you know what’s at stake — and you’re ready to help write Ohio’s comeback story. With your help, we were able to kick off our campaign with incredible grassroots support and beat our very first fundraising goal. Whether you chipped in $5 or $50, know that your support truly matters to our campaign. It’s what will allow us to flip Ohio blue and bring the changes we need to see to our state’s government. In the weeks and months ahead, I hope to get to know many of you personally — and I was excited to see so many supporters in person over this first week. And once again, thank you. Let’s do this, John John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too. = Paid for by the John Cranley Committee JOHN CRANLEY COMMITTEE 30 GARFIELD PLACE SUITE 900 CINCINNATI, OH 45202 United States Click here to

name: Larry Elder | Recall Newsom
subject: Voting has begun!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LARRY ELDER BALLOT MEASURE COMMITTEE RECALL NEWSOM
body:
Voting has begun and we need to ensure we have done everything we possibly can to make Gavin Newsom the second Governor in California history to be recalled. | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58155250:6hdQmOlNk:m:1:3253819041:45016101E9DE75481A9296A6C7CC8477:r)

---
**URGENT: Voting by mail is underway and the deadline to return your ballots is less than 30 DAYS away.**

[**Peter, we need your help reaching as many voters as possible before they mail in their ballot, so we can be sure they vote YES on the recall question. Can we count on you to send in $10, $20, $30 so we can fund our get-out-the-vote efforts in this final stretch?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58155250:6hdQmOlNk:m:1:3253819041:45016101E9DE75481A9296A6C7CC8477:r)

[**JOIN LARRY ELDER'S COMMITTEE
TO RECALL GAVIN NEWSOM -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58155250:6hdQmOlNk:m:1:3253819041:45016101E9DE75481A9296A6C7CC8477:r)
The latest polls are showing that this recall is neck and neck, and we need you to help us reach and sway voters before they turn-in their ballots. It's imperative to the future of California that we make sure to get as many recall ballots returned as possible, but we can't do it without you.

Simply put, this is crunch time and everybody in the state should have received their ballots in the mail. Voting has begun and we need to ensure we have done everything we possibly can to make Gavin Newsom the second Governor in California history to be recalled.

[**Help us show Gavin that this recall isn 't a partisan effort, this is from Californians of all backgrounds . . . we're tired of his failed attempt at leadership, are you?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58155250:6hdQmOlNk:m:1:3253819041:45016101E9DE75481A9296A6C7CC8477:r)

Thank you,

Lou Barnett
Campaign Manager
Larry Elder Recall Newsom Ballot Committee

[**JOIN LARRY ELDER'S COMMITTEE
TO RECALL GAVIN NEWSOM -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58155250:6hdQmOlNk:m:1:3253819041:45016101E9DE75481A9296A6C7CC8477:r)

---

| PAID FOR BY LARRY ELDER BALLOT MEASURE COMMITTEE RECALL NEWSOM
Committee major funding by Geoff Palmer

body:
Team —

DeSantis polling under 50% in the just released BUSR/Susquehanna Poll, with Nikki closing in on him fast.

We’re gaining on him every day, and we can’t let up now. If we’re going to close the gap and overtake DeSantis, we need your help to meet our August goal and build on our momentum. Click here to chip in now and help us win this race. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-busr-poll]

Every day, there’s a new reason DeSantis should be a one-term governor. He’s ignored environmental crises, gone to war with the Biden administration, and abandoned our state in the middle of the COVID crisis.

The latest polls prove that our message is resonating — that Florida is ready to throw out DeSantis’ authoritarian playbook and try something new.

We can’t stop now, team. We have momentum on our side, and with your help, we know that Nikki can win this race and break our state’s rigged system. Click here to make a contribution today and help us bring something new to Florida. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-busr-poll]

Thank you for your support.

— Stefanie

**Peter, QAnon is a dangerous movement spreading hateful rhetoric and violent conspiracies across our country.** These folks supported the breach of our nation's Capitol and believe that the push for COVID-19 vaccinations -- essential to getting our country out of the pandemic -- are comparable to the terrible tragedy of the Holocaust.
These ideas have no place in the halls of Congress. And I know that if more QAnon supporters are elected, we will be plunging into an extremely dark time for our nation.
That's why I'm reaching out to you today to ask for your continued support to help me fend off another extremist right-wing opponent in 2022. **[Can I count on you to pitch in whatever you can so we can fight back against QAnon and protect the House majority?](https://act.myngp.com/el/SpxjlDGM34PVOxduC-rMNvLhtyh5KS9f3-HcEMpLI_A=/l7EOzV0osgf-7wPofdOvyT0NrSD_WkLHD2cctRXXL9g=?refcode=E10760-20210816-QAnon2-SL-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15)**

Josh

clean_body: Ron Johnson has to go, and we’re building the team to beat him. But right now, we’re falling dangerously behind. | | = | Peter, Last week, it became as clear as ever that Ron Johnson works for the ultra-rich and corporate special interests: = = In exchange for Ron Johnson’s vote on Trump’s tax scam, the bill had to sweeten the tax break for his ultra-wealthy donors’ corporations. We always knew that Ron Johnson had sold his vote on the Trump tax scam, now we know that he did it specifically so his two biggest campaign funders would save millions in tax breaks. Ron Johnson has to go, and we’re building the team to beat him. But right now, we’re falling dangerously behind. Unless we get an enormous surge of support in the next few hours, we’re going to fall short. If we don’t pick up the pace, Ron Johnson and his ultra-wealthy donors could win another term that would be devastating to the people of Wisconsin. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = We can’t fall short now, this election is too important. Let’s do this, Team Lasry ** | | We need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington. Alex Lasry has a fresh perspective and record of actually getting things done. We can beat Ron Johnson by building a grassroots coalition, but it will take all of us. Will you pitch in any amount to help us keep the Senate Majority and defeat Ron Johnson? = Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin Stay connected with Alex's campaign to defeat Ron Johnson: Lasry for Wisconsin P.O. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGFL7wQvJlY0GjVnSFZeNWnKaKveNCfP0TiDZ6yomX69reyajp005bXHEKH1Wq7vp3DBv7ylYbhNUu_FNz5xHWEQZ3VPbOP0xQBV2OeBx3rtvnTGcc7t0RFlzQaqzU4Ox_2p0wC9aHTXUIaxYK9k8ZMh-L7E44LAumkgV34VLkPZCfIlZLFFr8mTgHxVkYXlnfpfGf8zqxO_OuBqGJNqkh9Hk0YMIEb5E7tnjGH892pPRyDw5-qI2uzPMZlMnuaLLxh9BNV-jUHZ8N6x48aoXp2YZbvWD1HU_Wb_W0KNauLE/3ek/EjMjNDFaTP2ld4EC9Kg0pQ/h0/zKjZlshpqMy5ItTgT9fJllJ1OJUye6BJZC9VY-vwrog)
Derek,

I need your help now that Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump have decided that defeating me in New Hampshire is the fastest way to put Republicans back in charge of the Senate. They're even personally recruiting my 2022 opponent.

Mitch McConnell's cronies are attacking me on TV. One McConnell-linked group has targeted me as part of a multi-million dollar ad campaign. And it’s working -- **a WMUR poll that recently came out has me DOWN by ONE POINT.**

Right now, we’re falling behind on our goal. **[Will you please split $25 or whatever you can between my campaign and Common Good VA to help us make up ground?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGFL7wQvJlY0GjVnSFZeNWnKaKveNCfP0TiDZ6yomX6_xPlZC-TJcvgX235_2eQJ8p2XRtra7A0q_l6W116Gi5BMDZOPk3V4x7QF5v_kjBj8SF4iZt0qnrAzW32brKYnFT43Asrl_cTuBfu6-uDn9vJuwkMWaU-fILymOkxkeKKay3823xWStzOCjiTMcwODWv_kgyAMw5EgztO8IH0dbDJtBeqaIcDVOkOFp6G98sq3r37kpmr-ymqZnR8CSaNdo09OmJ6vIEVbbxXat8OM4VNQ2ZdVWjNEgrhJsFgWjf4ohGDwdkcIqIfg6JyUUJ6Y0/3ek/EjMjNDFaTP2ld4EC9Kg0pQ/h1/84Y90L0Uj2jrZVRarSIbLPH6tR-rV-PSoBHl3jpmmfk)**

McConnell and his buddies have promised that more ads are coming. It’s no surprise _The Boston Globe_ called me the “most vulnerable Senate Democrat up for reelection.”

_This is no time for my grassroots support to dip._

If we stumble now, we’ll hand the Republicans a huge talking point. More outside money will pour into New Hampshire. Our opponents will step up their attacks.

**Republicans only need to flip one seat to regain Senate control, and right now, polls show that they could flip my seat in New Hampshire.**

If they defeat us and take back the Senate, there will be no progress on issues like jobs, voting rights, climate change, and protecting a woman’s right to choose.

Fellow Patriot,

As a Marine Special Forces Veteran, I understand the importance of leadership - and the Biden administrations lack of a plan.

What’s unfolding is what happens when President Biden makes decisions to suddenly withdraw all US Forces out of Afghanistan based on politics and not the facts on the ground – and with no concrete exit strategy.

Please watch my video below for my thoughts on the situation.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e3f05608ef384ccf9c2d039940378db2&_e=RA_eQZE1BC18kM7Wa-YBvJ5q7JP_OrDlHz74cWaBFNbPY9mSqSrAgnU1cP5sfbTbgsbUkJ4s58MC7mW6ZgzlGy1Pyh1N5zx5JdiiLZ0P6VG0itU-SZ5R9yEdhS1VNK4GGj6VnyIL1GDJ9-r2FUsWSwxlDw2x-p0xZhXak1PDoilYDAcwJMczDXwEhRE4OhaXJO7quKjqEXuT0H2f14vYHGVC8GeqK2AnOAAG4HZoRgY0yfIDoVzrbhaAu-0egHAk9F7kTtTTKvJAvUS0ivVUAuPUkLF41evtADEKUweTvfUhDsBhOE2C-0G44Y051jrgn171hsprMTBTzWMBrV9f4dwkRHCnb1fb1qOTiNp6E2WAN5Zkz26TqSyZOiIAzTyHQAMHhoIzJoGp8GmLtYuxocDZMR1OXV7G1OFPNP8DZVhtG-Vk_moXmVQB0y1ClVcTKJXyHRb-wM67DIBdNoMYw1eO8qoJjLSo0rCjrM47OBe1ad5hSd_l7yrzv4XthwbO6nLDL0OJJY22Ok3BOG4mSMEKGIHKPY1JQAtr-iQEqqvBUsvoOhRi0xw0K89Ii2mE)

When I announced this campaign, I made a promise that I would always be fully transparent with voters and supporters.

So here's the truth:

**Central Valley voters _know_ that McCarthy has been horrible, but our biggest obstacle is that many don't know I'm the viable Democrat running against him. **

We're spreading the word about the alternative we're offering -- and we're doing it early. The best way we can keep that up is by making sure we have resources to run a strong voter communication effort -- that's where you come in:

**We are coming up $9,141 short of where we need to be to stay on track for our weekly fundraising goal. If everyone reading this email chipped in just $10 right now, we'd meet our goal TODAY. I know we can do this, but it'll only happen if we all step up and do it as a team:**

**[Can you chip in $3 before 11:59 PM tonight to help us close the gap?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34282112/301487492/-686739743?refcode=em-08182021-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2YzMGUyNi03YjAwLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fhjkud2rbRQLp7cnB0yihnrEgpgw6fZBrzYdAcVplXQ=)**

McCarthy repulses voters here in CA-23: He started the year groveling to Trump and the furthest-right wing of his party. Already this month, he said horrible things about women and disrespected Capitol Police. Enough is enough.

But to win this race, we have to talk about what WE are offering. We have to talk about real issues that matter to the Central Valley and their solutions. That's exactly what we're doing, and it’s why we need your help.

**[Chip in $3 to help us reach more undecided voters>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34282113/301487493/-686739743?refcode=em-08182021-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2YzMGUyNi03YjAwLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fhjkud2rbRQLp7cnB0yihnrEgpgw6fZBrzYdAcVplXQ=)**

Yours,

Marisa
Teacher for Congress

name: Karen Bass Finance Team
subject: Let's turn this around
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
Team --

Last month we learned that the House Republicans outraised Democrats by millions of dollars in the previous fundraising quarter. We sprung into high gear to step up our fundraising operation, and we have bad news. We fell short of our mid-month goal.

This is a small setback, but Karen has never let a stumble slow her down. That's why we've extended our mid-month deadline to tonight with a goal of raising an extra to $2,000 before then.

**Karen is counting on our grassroots team, and we 're fired up to close this gap. Will you chip in what you can before the extended deadline to help Karen show the strength of our movement? **

**[Yes, I'll chip in $25 before the deadline »](https://act.myngp.com/el/S8qzzeUeAjz86saZOBm-vmx9lDavmuCNAITqsY4TpHs=/m0iC9jOqgjt7NZ8Zxiq6jqofZFu37Jv-jThRbQqsT80=?gpsid=39_132_20142&refcode=em21_210818_extdln_fnd_gq_act__kbft_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210818_extdln_fnd_gq_act__kbft_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&amount=25)

[Yes, I'll chip in $10 before the deadline »](https://act.myngp.com/el/S8qzzeUeAjz86saZOBm-vmx9lDavmuCNAITqsY4TpHs=/m0iC9jOqgjt7NZ8Zxiq6jqofZFu37Jv-jThRbQqsT80=?gpsid=39_132_20142&refcode=em21_210818_extdln_fnd_gq_act__kbft_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210818_extdln_fnd_gq_act__kbft_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&amount=10)

[Yes, I'll chip in what I can before the deadline »](https://act.myngp.com/el/S8qzzeUeAjz86saZOBm-vmx9lDavmuCNAITqsY4TpHs=/m0iC9jOqgjt7NZ8Zxiq6jqofZFu37Jv-jThRbQqsT80=?gpsid=39_132_20142&refcode=em21_210818_extdln_fnd_gq_act__kbft_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210818_extdln_fnd_gq_act__kbft_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)**
House Republicans have made it clear they are willing to spend whatever it takes to win back the House. In fact, they are already launching attacks against Karen's colleagues in key battleground districts across the country. Karen is on standby to help, but it's going to take resources to bolster key progressives across the country.

The only way we can go toe-to-toe with the GOP and their deep-pocketed donors is by mobilizing grassroots activists now -- that means you! If you're able, donate before tonight's extended deadline to help Karen keep fighting for progress in the House » **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bass-2021-3](https://act.myngp.com/el/S8qzzeUeAjz86saZOBm-vmx9lDavmuCNAITqsY4TpHs=/m0iC9jOqgjt7NZ8Zxiq6jqofZFu37Jv-jThRbQqsT80=?gpsid=39_132_20142&refcode=em21_210818_extdln_fnd_gq_act__kbft_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210818_extdln_fnd_gq_act__kbft_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)**

In solidarity,

Karen Bass Finance Team

Karen Bass started as a community organizer, so she knows just how much a $5 or $10 donation can do. Help fuel her movement to make social and economic justice for all a reality by chipping in today.
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/S8qzzeUeAjz86saZOBm-vmx9lDavmuCNAITqsY4TpHs=/m0iC9jOqgjt7NZ8Zxiq6jqofZFu37Jv-jThRbQqsT80=?gpsid=39_132_20142&refcode=em21_210818_extdln_fnd_gq_act__kbft_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210818_extdln_fnd_gq_act__kbft_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)

name: Team Faulconer
subject: We’re hitting the road
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2021
body:
Help us get our commonsense message directly to voters. Read more >>
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/30ced6d3fde6963c/d8d06ac641c4c3cbc3d6b838967d376c/34943) Peter, We’re thrilled to announce that Kevin is taking off today on a statewide bus tour. **He’s traveling to every corner of our state to share his California Comeback Plan to cut taxes, get our kids back in school, fund our police, and clean up our streets. ** [**DONATE NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/30ced6d3fde6963c/f6091ea2002b19f2c3d6b838967d376c/34943) Peter, there’s no way we can win this election without meeting voters face-to-face where they live and work. And we hope to see you soon and thank you in person for your vital support. _But this is a big undertaking. We’ll be on the road for over a week, and we’ll be forced to take a BIG financial hit. _ After all, nothing is cheap in Gavin Newsom’s California. And unlike Newsom, Kevin doesn’t rely on the big pockets of Hollywood celebrities and Silicon Valley billionaires to fund his campaign. **[That’s why we hope you’ll make a generous donation of $5 or more to help Kevin get his commonsense message out to every corner of California and FIRE Gavin Newsom on Election Day](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/30ced6d3fde6963c/cd4c93ef346f1d5dc3d6b838967d376c/34943)**. We can get the job done, but only with your crucial support right now. Will you step up and chip in? Thanks in advance for your help,
Team Faulconer [**DONATE $5 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/30ced6d3fde6963c/664b844bf03f1af6c3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**DONATE $15 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/30ced6d3fde6963c/de26140fb303c8b7c3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**DONATE $35 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/30ced6d3fde6963c/14f64f7b3b74f8cec3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**DONATE $50 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/30ced6d3fde6963c/988b78ea1f10aa7cc3d6b838967d376c/34943) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/30ced6d3fde6963c/c44bdadfc1cb18ccc3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/30ced6d3fde6963c/d9bb9dc57e826622c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/30ced6d3fde6963c/66e816fd2363f385c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/30ced6d3fde6963c/2ea44ecf38eb6c05c3d6b838967d376c/34943)

Peter, there’s no way we can win this election without meeting voters face-to-face where they live and work. And we hope to see you soon and thank you in person for your vital support. But this is a big undertaking. We’ll be on the road for over a week, and we’ll be forced to take a BIG financial hit. After all, nothing is cheap in Gavin Newsom’s California. And unlike Newsom, Kevin doesn’t rely on the big pockets of Hollywood celebrities and Silicon Valley billionaires to fund his campaign. . We can get the job done, but only with your crucial support right now. Will you step up and chip in? Thanks in advance for your help, Team Faulconer | | | | | ---|---|---|--- id:2021-08-16-15:58:40:553t Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2021

subject: National Nightmare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Joe Biden and the Democrats have given us seven months of failure. | | | | |
---
Can't read this? [Click here.](https://mailchi.mp/housefreedomfund/national-nightmare?e=b2c16e6198)
---
| | | |
---
| | | | Peter:

Terrorists are celebrating Joe Biden’s catastrophe in Afghanistan. Afghan friends are being murdered. Afghan women and girls are facing a lifetime of oppression and abuse. Even Biden’s fan club in the media can’t defend his debacle.

But many reporters are saying this failure may hurt President Biden’s otherwise positive legacy. Seriously? He’s been president for seven months, and it’s been nothing but failures!

▶︎ The border crisis is worse than ever.
▶︎ Inflation is ravaging our economy.
▶︎ Gas prices are soaring.
▶︎ Violent crime has followed his party’s “defund the police” insanity.
▶︎ And now he’s handed terrorists their greatest victory since 9/11. [**Help fight back against Joe Biden’s bumbling!**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=0dd3658ef5&e=b2c16e6198)

Under President Trump's leadership, none of these problems existed. They are all the result of Joe Biden and congressional Democrats’ radicalism and incompetence.

Biden says Afghanistan isn’t another Vietnam. But the truth is, the Democrats’ control of Washington is becoming another _**national nightmare**_.

The only question is whether it will be long or short.

And that’s up to us.

[**Join me in supporting the House Freedom Fund to take Nancy Pelosi’s gavel away from her once and for all.**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=9ffe6ff35a&e=b2c16e6198)

With Biden, Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer in charge, things are only getting worse. Democrats’ failure in Afghanistan will trigger a global refugee crisis. Their budget is going to add another trillion dollars to our out-of-control national debt. Their phony “infrastructure” bill is a back-door Green New Deal. Their education policies promote Critical Race Theory and anti-American propaganda.

**We’re fighting back, but we need your help.**

House Freedom Fund needs to post a HUGE fundraising number this quarter to send a signal Washington can’t ignore.

[**Click here to contribute to HFF today!**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=785d2c232f&e=b2c16e6198)

_**We have to win back the House in 2022**_ – from the Democrats and the RINOs who help them. When campaign finance reports are released, both parties will look to see where the momentum is.

If conservatives step up now, Democrats will cut and run from the president’s failed agenda. We can start making an impact before the campaign heats up!

[**But we can’t do it without you. Please give as generously as you can, right now!**](https://HouseFreedomFund.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aefad1d6b0163789c70b59bf1&id=8b71924d8b&e=b2c16e6198)

Thank you for considering this urgent request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future.

Sincerely,
---
|
---
| JIM JORDAN
U.S. Congressman, R-Ohio

body:
Vote-by-mail ballots for California's recall election against failed leftist Governor Gavin Newsom are being mailed to every registered voter. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c381%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=YF99WmxZEHjrg1gSTJBneQ&sysid=1)

Friend,

Vote-by-mail ballots for California's recall election against failed leftist Governor Gavin Newsom are being mailed to **every registered voter.**

_**Some counties - including Los Angeles and Fresno - have already mailed out ballots, and votes are being cast right now!**_

[**JOIN LARRY ELDER'S COMMITTEE
TO RECALL GAVIN NEWSOM → **](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65076%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MpJhTcbnlfNhoUHfPoBifQ&sysid=1)
Even though election day isn't officially until September 14th, once voters have their mail ballots **they will cast their votes.**

We need your help to get the word out and help voters understand that before they can elect a new governor of California, **they must first VOTE YES TO RECALL GAVIN NEWSOM.**

* * *
**QUESTION #1: RECALL GAVIN NEWSOM?
☑ YES**
* * *

Even **Sean Hannity** agrees, Gavin Newsom must be recalled - _"By the way, I support the recall . . . Let me be very clear."_

[**Voting in the recall is officially underway now - please chip in $25, $50, $100 or even more to fund the Larry Elder Recall Newsom Ballot Committee's voter outreach and make sure Californians recall Newsom.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65077%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=m1eiSqdp0sUJw9dQK%2bXpBw&sysid=1)

Thank you,

Lou Barnett
Campaign Manager
Larry Elder Recall Newsom Ballot Committee

Peter,

In less than a couple of weeks, Maxine Waters and her campaign will finally face a judge for their illegal behavior in 2020.

Our strategy is to present the mountain of evidence proving a systemic effort by Maxine and her campaign to break the law and deceive voters. We even have Maxine on record bragging, "I don't care what the law says."

This should be an open and shut case, but Maxine will spend millions to bury our suit and avoid justice. They’ve already ignored several court filings.

Our team of lawyers is committed to taking down one of the most corrupt members of Congress but court costs and filing fees are adding up. Peter, In less than a couple of weeks, Maxine Waters and her campaign will finally face a judge for their illegal behavior in 2020. We even have Maxine on record bragging, "I don't care what the law says." This should be an open and shut case, but Maxine will spend millions to bury our suit and avoid justice. They’ve already ignored several court filings. Our team of lawyers is committed to taking down one of the most corrupt members of Congress but court costs and filing fees are adding up. After decades in Congress Maxine has amassed a network of megadonors and lawyers designed to shield her from legal accountability. Why am I running for U.S. Senate? The radical left, rich elites, woke corporations, academia, Hollywood, and the media - they're all taking over America. They tell lie after lie, making excuses for chaos and violence, ruthlessly enforcing conformity, canceling any who stand in their way. We need to fight for what's right. That's what Americans do. That's a legacy we have a duty to protect.

After 9/11, I volunteered to serve in the Navy, and I served in Iraq during the surge, together with other men and women of all races and backgrounds. We were all Americans, doing our part. Defending this great nation from those determined to destroy it.

As Attorney General of Nevada, I fought for our Constitution and the American way of life, stood up for rape and human trafficking victims who couldn't stand for themselves, and went after guardianship abuse and the opioid crisis.

But the battle to keep our country free doesn't end. If anything, the stakes are higher now than they've ever been in our lifetime.

This campaign will only be possible with the generous support of grassroots conservatives like YOU. [**I hope you 'll join us by making a contribution right now. **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c8f104416b514fac8571037694f942e4&_e=oMCUJ_dcFqswLh3siOadGE5Ks359aU-OmJOo20Jx-BBHxOC5P8xtZKOQxPjPwAgx8huGrxDRBCJnlpBssGGj3AY2efU4X02o19Kxe67do6cfeMBmDGfzdptAvP2nGW8UlZ0B6xqmNq5xhqzRq5YUJO5TQ9-_PRFvFItaSZProAzrSZ7UClBasxlOMsVj5j_1KsFxuuDLRLMFddas1msP79skiHcQIBUUkeNA_Lch0y3DT5L13LrGb93_AGOpic3cewLHtHlok_1fahVhjbgdlS7-s4GiiZ8VjGLM1IkwNWiJVZ5mFePZV07siCqRC8jGE5uv6mHZX3dixZonM3lpn4EHWPRwR_9f39g7E2JlqOh7-uCSaH0TaORGXJ6JWpLKryp7CMv7PHOzlOZD--wH7DKRmhrl2NIRsBU0HdGFK16r4CahWkHU2KML6tMDxeKjhCbG-uCJP-4rqhUtV8tR6xu39wJrKLp5pksF9E4mV8096_2TDJhPeqQiy6LTdgwxskRnM_HEPZm8z0sn4Ar2JnEqHHmkpgdQzYONU8sJFUI%3D)

Thank you for your time.

Adam Laxalt
Candidate for U.S. Senate

name: Erica Smith
subject: We must take urgent action to help the Afghan citizens who are fleeing for their lives and welcome more refugees. Add your name if you agree.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Anything less is a moral failure.
#
Ending the war in Afghanistan was and is the right decision.
We as a nation can breathe a sigh of relief that no more sons, daughters, mothers, fathers, brothers, and sisters are being sent to fight a forever war.
But, like so many of us, my heart breaks as we watch an escalating humanitarian crisis unfold in Afghanistan — one that the United States had an undeniable role in creating.
**We must take urgent action to help the Afghan citizens who are fleeing for their lives and open our doors to refugees._Anything less is a moral failure._**
[**_I’ve joined Rana Abdelhamid, Odessa Kelly, Kina Collins, and others to demand that the United States immediately welcome more Afghan refugees. Will you sign on to join me?_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/10742?t=1&akid=359%2E3698%2Ey0czQ2)
**[Sign Now »](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/10742?t=2&akid=359%2E3698%2Ey0czQ2)**
Make no mistake: The United States brought a war to Afghanistan that left countless Afghan people living in fear for the last 20 years.
Now the Taliban, an evil force of violence, has increased its human rights abuses and destruction of Afghan civil society.
We must hold ourselves accountable for the promises we made, especially to the most vulnerable Afghans who risked their lives for us.
In the year following the Vietnam War, we welcomed 120,000 Vietnamese refugees to America. [**_We must meet this moment just the same and welcome more Afghan refugees into the United States — sign now if you agree._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/10742?t=3&akid=359%2E3698%2Ey0czQ2)
In solidarity,
Erica Smith

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210818-359-footer&t=4&refcode2=359_3698_y0czQ2&akid=359%2E3698%2Ey0czQ2)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=5&akid=359%2E3698%2Ey0czQ2)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=359%2E3698%2Ey0czQ2)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Sign on to support Afghan refugees
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Our focus must be on the people who are on the receiving end of this decision to go to war and stay in Afghanistan for 20 years.
#
Peter,
I fully support President Biden’s decision to withdraw troops from Afghanistan. It was clear for quite some time that even after 2,300 American lives lost, $1 trillion, 20 years of war, and many more Afghan civilian casualties, the United States could not have averted this outcome without an endless military presence.
I am encouraged by the efforts of the Biden administration to ensure the safety and security of those currently in Afghanistan, but **our government needs to go farther — and work faster.** The United States must do everything we can to ensure refugees can travel to America without bureaucratic delay, recognizing the difficulty people have in leaving Afghanistan right now.
[**If you agree, please sign on in support of our push to ensure speedy and safe travel for Afghan refugees who want to settle in the United States. This is our obligation after 20 years of war.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/welcome_afghan_refugees/?source=em20210818-552&t=1&akid=552%2E420207%2E7_Xysp)
**[Sign On](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/welcome_afghan_refugees/?source=em20210818-552&t=2&akid=552%2E420207%2E7_Xysp)**
In the coming weeks and months, we all must participate in the needed examination of why 20 years of war have failed. But our focus right now must be on the human beings who are on the receiving end of this decision to go to war and stay in Afghanistan for two decades.
We must also increase humanitarian aid to support civilians who fled to Kabul and provincial capitals and are without shelter, food, medical assistance, or vaccines. The heartbreaking situation confronting ordinary Afghans after 20 years of American war requires us to act as quickly as we can.
[**So, please join me by adding your name to my call to immediately welcome Afghan refugees to America. This needs to happen right now in order to save lives.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/welcome_afghan_refugees/?source=em20210818-552&t=3&akid=552%2E420207%2E7_Xysp)
**[Sign On](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/welcome_afghan_refugees/?source=em20210818-552&t=4&akid=552%2E420207%2E7_Xysp)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210818-552-footer&t=5&refcode2=552_420207_7_Xysp&akid=552%2E420207%2E7_Xysp)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

In fact, if the election were held right now, 13% of Democrats say that they would vote for President Trump. | HELP SAVE AMERICA EMAIL: SUPPORTER ID: #05966106 DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT SUGGESTED GIFT: $35 or more | | | | | | | The Battleground State of North Carolina never wavered in its support for President Trump and the Republican Majority. But in too many states, the Fake News Media’s tricks worked -- and the Democrats prevailed. Now, voters have buyer’s remorse.
