name: Allen West
subject: Texans must come first
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ALLEN WEST CAMPAIGN
body:
If I'm elected governor, I will not tolerate the rights and health of Texans to be sacrificed at the altar of a leftist open borders agenda. |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a01fc72c6e8d443abbb58d97ec896679&_e=F-pxaU5uwm5j9mDKhHnkRhEBZ6ZIJfnEuChyAcfAs9rtQcYyCoRVh9lzeUPPPOqWRYknx__43J8N4PqBDpEj5fvNH9bg992eTpjAI4ud_LzFevT6Xlp3j6R98YKwM4EcC4lw8p_2n9bTl3A16GzLm-kj1Z4zW_rP7AKLM5lpaKenRJc78hj83B_pkCxcz-g6H6XGjXKz8Rcfw9tsgMGdOghc_f40DvOVu4fwJD8NT41F50fcVX51h8aWA1rS8VEhGI9dNzw6cuD1rDoFOBQEf4T0jxxodbw6lEcVUEiBTrVm54Vxv-Ds9-EAmmctb5fwwNCTZSFeG-f_5Vt-bSnPOruFlxAawThiPbDJMwjxq3q40Q2c290MXoUjS19-Ldg0Jnp_1aGQEkC7kzcPGRvuQg%3D%3D)
---
Peter,

In this Biden-initiated border crisis, illegals are flooding over our southern border in historic numbers, with lawlessness, crime, and now a public health crisis gripping the entire state of Texas.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a01fc72c6e8d443abbb58d97ec896679&_e=F-pxaU5uwm5j9mDKhHnkRhEBZ6ZIJfnEuChyAcfAs9rtQcYyCoRVh9lzeUPPPOqWRYknx__43J8N4PqBDpEj5fvNH9bg992eTpjAI4ud_LzFevT6Xlp3j6R98YKwM4EcC4lw8p_2n9bTl3A16GzLm-kj1Z4zW_rP7AKLM5lpaKcJHiuRdznEF1_Ucj-Mygb51nQPNptJ--PaSrpQ31Lw7PdwkwNdEOYYpuwIzlavqqlXvTKfD5Nrh6CeDdkIr7nnXYqjq9upa57o87TYxRmkV84LDM45NEv4T2laqFPbvbvRQxOnrjUgL2lTPYUYRdVnSOM_OiWtsZTUXzNjsH9jmyxVOU51fnbzkzEiNOLjoAcgHB-rhGJPzoD05JEt5GOudZVurcWA1_vDa3iIdhc1Uw%3D%3D)
The Rio Grande Valley is being hit especially hard, with most new COVID cases coming from illegals or Texans who have encountered these invaders. As the Biden administration, with Gov. Abbott's tacit approval, ships these illegals across the state, other urban health centers such as Houston, Austin, Dallas, and others are also suffering.

Peter, the recent revelation that we have hospitals in our border communities such as McAllen that have reached full capacity treating illegals with COVID is very disturbing. Texas hospitals should be treating Texans, but instead, we have a public health crisis because of an unsecured southern border.

Now, due to the overflow of ill illegals, Gov. Abbott has issued an order stating Texans should not have elective medical procedures!

We should not be sacrificing the healthcare of Texans for people who are violating the rule of law, Peter - it's just common sense.

_In fact_ , we should not be mandating COVID testing, mask wearing, and vaccinations on Texans while simultaneously not requiring the same for the illegals invading our state.

Peter, the lack of leadership in Texas for finally securing our border has resulted in a drug crisis, a rising crime wave, increased sex-trafficking, and a public health crisis across the Lone Star State. We should be putting Texans first, not those who disrespect our sovereignty.

[** PUT TEXANS FIRST ➞ **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a01fc72c6e8d443abbb58d97ec896679&_e=F-pxaU5uwm5j9mDKhHnkRhEBZ6ZIJfnEuChyAcfAs9rtQcYyCoRVh9lzeUPPPOqWRYknx__43J8N4PqBDpEj5fvNH9bg992eTpjAI4ud_LzFevT6Xlp3j6R98YKwM4EcC4lw8p_2n9bTl3A16GzLm-kj1Z4zW_rP7AKLM5lpaKeQYEK_rDCfq4JPZ278ZYAOK7s0uqv_iuu_Howm9uGF7ViYe-ODCxR30dr3yeLnYUDW6Krol2VbOeGjk1ofY7J71h_EkcCEi0sYKESZl2gDqcNNdwdKpwlUKbth-NoMDxCFhYxX7OHzZfg_VaG_j4JnkL4vlwh5XB7e8e4K5eGrc0GLf6bnhuX3ua-KnsCialxP5Q2EAaBG68fv51Pg6_t7FIZMMl3ijfnBMhq6VEXnmg%3D%3D)
Prioritizing illegals above Texans has pushed hospitals across our state to the breaking point and is forcing Texans to forego elective surgery and other crucial medical procedures.

If I'm elected governor, I will not tolerate the rights and health of Texans to be sacrificed at the altar of a leftist open borders agenda. Texans must come first.

[**Will you join me in this fight, Peter?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a01fc72c6e8d443abbb58d97ec896679&_e=F-pxaU5uwm5j9mDKhHnkRhEBZ6ZIJfnEuChyAcfAs9rtQcYyCoRVh9lzeUPPPOqWRYknx__43J8N4PqBDpEj5fvNH9bg992eTpjAI4ud_LzFevT6Xlp3j6R98YKwM4EcC4lw8p_2n9bTl3A16GzLm-kj1Z4zW_rP7AKLM5lpaKet8rAe7oZEuByQF3Lpc0rLtGYAveDjdasQmesmJznX1tyAs9dCzYPoC1ORas_uy1_7cBDSzr2y5ip4Aj7vmP9Gl99Kx88hISsDg2Fp2ubGg254gLN1BvzeysWg7ANnE-S8kDTF4V_COEftvbVACnEXkut8zzAKpTSQG02Ei9AFZV_ajsZqNI5e_11SLyqzOMD0DGO_2AfmXt94aQ6JOf0z6UsXfLLQM6V_O9ruGzGJrQ%3D%3D)

[**Your generous grassroots contribution of $25, $50, $75, $100 or even more to my campaign will help me reach Texas voters with my winning, conservative message and bring the tough, principled leadership we need in Austin to meet this challenge.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a01fc72c6e8d443abbb58d97ec896679&_e=F-pxaU5uwm5j9mDKhHnkRhEBZ6ZIJfnEuChyAcfAs9rtQcYyCoRVh9lzeUPPPOqWRYknx__43J8N4PqBDpEj5fvNH9bg992eTpjAI4ud_LzFevT6Xlp3j6R98YKwM4EcC4lw8p_2n9bTl3A16GzLm-kj1Z4zW_rP7AKLM5lpaKck4A-0XHTFK-hXG8o5jcy77r9YyQB5p0C4DArduT_DBq3NaFibfG4Cno5SnqYzmPINcgnDxDuG8of4XqYdN3db6KxV5IqjuwH3AIRgJVgTIRLOdZry0aimauQwbgpbB1husfN53JLjGMdW0aqXjdJjbrWi4jH1L0SaZ1hKzsOGkn4ri68gPmAn4MivhNg4BwCNZyzhNlA4KagsmGXNqLSgSaEct4Q_JWQgJuO6-juAiQ%3D%3D)

[**Thank you, Peter - I hope to hear from you today!**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a01fc72c6e8d443abbb58d97ec896679&_e=F-pxaU5uwm5j9mDKhHnkRhEBZ6ZIJfnEuChyAcfAs9rtQcYyCoRVh9lzeUPPPOqWRYknx__43J8N4PqBDpEj5fvNH9bg992eTpjAI4ud_LzFevT6Xlp3j6R98YKwM4EcC4lw8p_2n9bTl3A16GzLm-kj1Z4zW_rP7AKLM5lpaKeIt-G69r5uQvw096Qco121TpYmcKR98UJP-pmo80hlmR0H8_x1JGXAsnqB58g7X8RNrn9Tr7lD-OrE2L6e0Vlfb098p6fOAQW62D8EeMRn5NokPy0qy8cJVUZvOuC-9R7Beu_zqAoSQwIuMo7J_ORAX-tG-c_o2aFVynE9zxnk55g4EDzK317Zg2YoD84ogAqOB89MaQreWaarsXqRl5YL_6ZlJ32hp5Jik2iebCzUQw%3D%3D)

For Freedom,

Allen B. West
Lieutenant Colonel (Ret)

Abbott has issued an order stating Texans should not have elective medical procedures! We should not be sacrificing the healthcare of Texans for people who are violating the rule of law, Peter - it's just common sense. In fact , we should not be mandating COVID testing, mask wearing, and vaccinations on Texans while simultaneously not requiring the same for the illegals invading our state. Peter, the lack of leadership in Texas for finally securing our border has resulted in a drug crisis, a rising crime wave, increased sex-trafficking, and a public health crisis across the Lone Star State. We should be putting Texans first, not those who disrespect our sovereignty. Prioritizing illegals above Texans has pushed hospitals across our state to the breaking point and is forcing Texans to forego elective surgery and other crucial medical procedures. If I'm elected governor, I will not tolerate the rights and health of Texans to be sacrificed at the altar of a leftist open borders agenda. Texans must come first. For Freedom, Allen B. West Lieutenant Colonel (Ret) | | POL. ADV. PAID FOR BY ALLEN WEST CAMPAIGN The election laws in Texas allow for unlimited donation amounts as long as the funds are not from an incorporated entity. Make checks payable: Allen West Campaign PO Box 740846 Dallas, TX 75374 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: I need a favor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Hi there, Peter,

I hope this note finds you well and that you are enjoying the final weeks of summer. I had a busy few weeks in DC before the August recess began. Now, I'm traveling across our district to hear from you all directly.

I recently visited the Quinault Indian Nation alongside my friend, Secretary Deb Haaland, to discuss the Biden Administration's investments in tribal communities and the threat climate change poses. Due to rising sea levels and flooding from more severe storms, coastal tribes like the Quinault Indian Nation are in the process of trying to relocate their lower village to higher ground. The federal government has a responsibility to help ensure these relocation efforts are successful.

Before getting home for the August recess, I was honored to join President Biden in the Oval Office as he signed a bill to strengthen VA medical facilities into law. I was a proud co-sponsor of this crucial legislation, and I remain committed to ensuring our nation's veterans get the care they need and so greatly deserve.

It won't be too much longer until I head back to the other Washington. Once I get there, my main priorities will be getting the infrastructure bill over the finish line, helping move the RECOMPETE Act forward, and -- as always - working to make our government work better for the people.

**[But before that, I have a favor to ask: We're facing a critical mid-month deadline at midnight. Will you chip in before then?](https://act.myngp.com/el/JeCL6YQ-rT4BgJb5ME6ft2aoaLGdBjDbvdL7tOPYaUw=/m-Vc2glbhmErbbIkKoHp6tTQEphZIlDVarMVniDQhz4=?gpsid=50_115_20174&refcode=em21_210818_mm2_fnd_gq_act__DK_ettx_v1&utm_campaign=em21_210818_mm2_fnd_gq_act__DK_ettx_v1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rep.=20Chris=20Jacobs?=
subject: Biden's Afghanistan Failure
body:
The devastation is on his hands | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1cedf32b1e0e/i-was-just-at-our-southern-border-4952382?e=13f35c4add)
---
| |
---
| President Biden has failed Americans, our allies, and his oath to protect and defend our nation. The devastation in Afghanistan is on his hands.
The situation has become increasingly dire with Afghans being beaten in the streets by the Taliban, American citizens being trapped and unable to safely travel to the airport, and the abandonment of our allies who served alongside our service members.
The hasty and unorganized withdrawal from Afghanistan can be only described as a complete foreign policy failure with devastating consequences. The recklessness of their decision-making has led to the Taliban seizing an immense amount of American military equipment and technology, it crushed the morale of the Afghan security forces, and has caused yet another national security and humanitarian crisis.
The President assured Americans we wouldn’t see Afghanistan overrun by the Taliban, and he assured us Americans would not need to be evacuated from our embassy. Despite these assurances, we now know intelligence officials warned the administration that this exact scenario was possible if they withdrew without a plan. Put simple, either the President misled the public or ignored the advice of his advisors.
His actions have put Americans directly in harm's way. They have caused our allies in Afghanistan to be left behind to face an almost certain death sentence. His actions have put Afghan women and children at the hands of a murderous regime with an extensive track record of human rights atrocities. And President Biden’s actions have put our nation at risk. Due to the President’s failure in leadership the destabilization of the region and the resurgence of terror groups is all but guaranteed.
Sitting nearly at the 20th anniversary of 9/11, President Biden has presided over one of the single greatest national security and foreign policy failures in our nation’s history. Now, we must put every effort and every resource into evacuating Americans and our allies trapped in Afghanistan and ensuring our homeland is protected and prepared to counteract any threat that may arise from the President’s failure.
The ripple effect of this failure is yet to be fully realized, but we can only expect the fallout will continue to grow. China and Russia are watching this weakness. Terror groups are reorganizing. Our allies are watching in horror as this administration abandoned Afghans. We have an immeasurable amount of work ahead of us to repair the damage done by President Biden. This administration is incompetent, unfit and needs to be held accountable - Congress and the American people deserve answers.
Best,
Chris Jacobs
---
| |
---
| |
---
|

**JACOBS FOR CONGRESS**
P.O. Box 387
CLARENCE, NY 14031

You can [update your preferences](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=b6cb02ac78&e=13f35c4add&c=870ce67494) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=b6cb02ac78&e=13f35c4add&c=870ce67494).

| | Dear ,

My name is Mark Finchem. I am a State Representative in Arizona, and the voice of the Election Integrity movement. I am running for Arizona Secretary of State.

**I paid for the initial election integrity hearings out of pocket when nobody else would listen. I spoke up when everyone else stood silent about the 2020 election.**

_And now, the movement has spread across the country far and wide. We are seeing election audits pop up all around the country, a Newsom recall effort growing stronger every day, and Cuomo resigning._

**_In short, we are seeing the beginning of the new red wave that will wash away the lies and hatred of the Democrats, and we see a brighter future ahead._**

This is why I need your help. This is, at its core, a grassroots movement. And without your help, Big Corporations win, Big Tech wins, the establishment wins, special interest wins, and come November of 2022, the Democrats win.

**But we can stop this – together.**

_[Donate today with a generous contribution to make sure that the Red wave defeats the Radical Left in 2022 and that we never have to worry about our elections being stolen again!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7b6482a4ab&e=44b8c466b0)_

I am writing you today with a big update.

**We are gathering support for our Secretary of State campaign at breakneck speed.**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=742da3d14f&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Senator Borrelli, one of the key Arizona senators leading the fight on election integrity just endorsed my campaign for Secretary of State.

**He is an excellent Senator and a great man, and I am so happy to stand by him in the fight against election fraud.**

Senator Borelli said about me:

_“I endorse Mark Finchem for Secretary of State. He is a staunch defender of our elections and is actively working to secure them for future generations. He is a tough fighter who will take on the Democrats and win. He won’t back down to the power brokers who don’t want our elections to be free or fair. Please join me in supporting Mark Finchem in any way you can.”_

I am honored to have such an endorsement.

**But that’s not all.**

**I could not be more proud to have two great statesmen and great men endorse my campaign for Secretary of State.**

We are seeing election audits pop up all around the country, a Newsom recall effort growing stronger every day, and Cuomo resigning. In short, we are seeing the beginning of the new red wave that will wash away the lies and hatred of the Democrats, and we see a brighter future ahead. This is why I need your help. This is, at its core, a grassroots movement. And without your help, Big Corporations win, Big Tech wins, the establishment wins, special interest wins, and come November of 2022, the Democrats win. name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Update on the census numbers:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
New York kept a House seat and will receive an estimated $53 million in new federal resources.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210818-2352-header&t=1&akid=2352%2E2526796%2EaxzHvj)
You have to see these numbers:
**Large U.S. counties with stronger than expected census counts (vs. estimates).**
1. Queens, NY +8%
2. Brooklyn, NY +8%
3. Honolulu, HI +5%
4. Bronx, NY +5%
5. Manhattan, NY +5%

Source: Dave Wasserman
---
**Last year, Team AOC launched a major, seven-figure effort to encourage constituents from the Bronx and Queens to complete the census.** With so much at stake in the redistricting process, it was important for us that every single person was counted.
Team AOC organizers engaged 3,800 residents from communities at risk of being undercounted at nearly 1,800 events across the district. With more than 200 languages spoken in the district, we directed funding for multilingual mailers and ads to reach and educate New Yorkers on the importance of filling out the census.
The U.S. Census Bureau recently published new counts showing Queens and the Bronx were in the top 5 large counties to outperform their census expectations. So, what does that mean?
1. **More federal funds for underserved communities:** We helped bring an estimated $53 million in new federal resources for our district.
2. **A Congressional seat was saved:** New York only lost one House seat after the city’s Census Bureau warned that two seats would be lost if participation was low.

**This is a big win, and it was made possible by this group of grassroots supporters.** This census organizing effort is exactly the kind of investment our campaign uniquely prioritizes.
The census only happens once every ten years — but our fight to ensure that underrepresented communities get the resources and representation they need _never_ stops. And our grassroots donors play a pivotal role in funding these strategic investments. That’s why we’re asking for your support today to continue this crucial work.
[Can you make a $3 contribution today to help Team AOC keep up the fight for those who often get counted out or go unheard? Your dollars ensure we can keep strategically investing in initiatives that bring power to the people, just like our census efforts did.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210818?refcode=em20210818-2352-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2352_2526796_axzHvj&akid=2352%2E2526796%2EaxzHvj)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210818?refcode=em20210818-2352-P&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2352_2526796_axzHvj&akid=2352%2E2526796%2EaxzHvj)**
Thank you for being a part of our movement,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210818?refcode=em20210818-2352-P&t=22&refcode2=2352_2526796_axzHvj&akid=2352%2E2526796%2EaxzHvj)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20210818-2352-P&t=23&akid=2352%2E2526796%2EaxzHvj)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=2352%2E2526796%2EaxzHvj) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=2352%2E2526796%2EaxzHvj) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=2352%2E2526796%2EaxzHvj)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=2352%2E2526796%2EaxzHvj)

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Newsom Knows He’s Lost
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Governor 2021 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [Newsom Knows He's Lost](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziopz53K08OA7HXJT5HBOo80klgz4ui3HgiyRy2r3WM3_QQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_aug_18&n=1) A federal lawsuit has just been filed to cancel the Recall vote. Gavin Newsom has tried every trick in the book to thwart the will of voters, so of course it has come to this. I’ll be helping make sure this gets laughed out of court. It’s a fringe legal theory brought by two “voters” and an attorney with his own criminal record: 19 felonies and a 3-year prison term. Yet Newsom’s fingerprints are all over it. Newsom’s handpicked Attorney General says he’s "monitoring" the case. It’s being promoted in the New York Times by the same Berkeley professor Newsom used to try to keep Donald Trump off the ballot. That scheme was unanimously rejected by the State Supreme Court. Newsom knows his days are numbered, and our political class is terrified beyond belief. We are getting great feedback on last night's debate. It's airing on NPR affiliates today. And tomorrow’s will be televised statewide on [these stations](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TqzetAz324EZxHWt7roUmRvsvbSaVyJJ5htD3T28tJ6wHH4nmCQIdP9U-NdXwyPI5w&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_aug_18&n=2) at 7 PM. At the debate and for the rest of the campaign, I'll continue to make the case against Gavin Newsom - not against other candidates to replace him. [Help our campaign get across the finish line](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7PyukeanaPVVByy4cGnphLXxOEH1CWIcHtuMj2-9EAmrlzX4&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_aug_18&n=3) [Get a yard sign or bumper sticker](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziopxPoBRQDrGXLWlj-S3ZWCA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_aug_18&n=4) [Share this post on Facebook](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAwU6ZY5ZShZ5-RTxyPpwJ0812MuNbrdrhOXEyTbxApXAw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_aug_18&n=5) Kevin Kiley
[KileyForCalifornia.com](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=yFGvxrZFfEAGNDSajUG67jFpOTi1EXIJZKzd_Af4NVQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_aug_18&n=6)

| Dear Patriot, after America was attacked by al-Qaeda on September 11, 2001, my father, Republican Congressman Ron Paul, voted for a U.S. strike on the Taliban in Afghanistan for harboring the 9/11 terrorists. We were attacked, so we struck back. This is the reason we have and need a strong military: Actual national defense. But our military is not meant for nation building. Not for policing the world. Not for imposing democracy in places that have never known it. Not only are these bad ideas, but they aren’t the point of our military and they do nothing for our national defense. Unfortunately, that was the George W. Bush-Dick Cheney neoconservative vision of perpetual U.S.-led wars around the globe. We know how that worked out in Iraq. Now we are learning how it ends in Afghanistan. But this isn’t hindsight. It was always doomed for failure, and some have said so for a very long time, and proved right time and time again through our recent foreign policy disasters. It was my father, often alone in his party, who said for decades that the neocons’ endless wars would always come back to haunt us. He did it early, and often. Over the weekend, a [video compilation of warnings my Dad issued years ago went viral](https://trk.klclick1.com/ls/click?upn=VnhYjWNTPGmSpggTHKyiHUNOCw-2FOvBkA3jejs-2B2mZuhJXe9AZU1FU2dAPQpSzfXrpps-2FgiWLNJI-2Fq7n04qNGz9NbEbHxe7uwgksDA-2FVFx3LCCvQAp2fVX8Rf5AoFMeMi4zExp3dT7-2BNdAjzg-2BZL-2BXpoz-2B7-2F6ja90OWsea5-2F5IYw-3D_4yy_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjdyn9Meo-2BU4memdpyMXxi7CAtObtWZ-2BwMbZiprdc1AhhBcF5aCkdMDhn0mswbHz2UpvTXahIHRnUndJ5dQbxlIJ89RIbnW2c0xT3lBU-2FKqC4Zaslf1RBo3qiEEhkKmz-2BmNeQ1h56-2FvHkpD1fHGXj4Eu2LwO7YUP5RHo-2Fs0kettapbyM7Ywek8hOopf8mUJB2-2F408Jve9v9lxtA6qQW5zXWLYwlNzKoxEUoPxSqS4VztDAOO8DGMrtXQOEUKRabI3p7sIwYSLp2Cc6O67i9r8ne3Z-2BZfu0iJEpas35BQsbEWDxq-2FJEVTDfkSls5DuEoZCs2eSR11sQ9F8JsqekMGzdkC05dKoQC9n9Skl8A5GVPoQ-3D-3D). Why was a 13-year-old video of a Congressman who retired in 2012 going viral?

| **** Because he was right and more people should have listened to him, to me and to others who have been saying for a decade that this war needed to end. Ron Paul asked questions like, “What if occupying countries like Iraq and Afghanistan and bombing Pakistan is directly related to the hatred directed toward us?” The scenes we see coming out of Afghanistan today are rage-filled. We honor and respect the brave men and women who served there for so long, but to ask them to stay another year there would be unconscionable. They did their duty. “What if all wartime spending is paid for through the deceitful process of inflating and borrowing?” Dad asked. Considering that we were never able to afford the trillions spent in Afghanistan and we are now more concerned about inflation at home, Dad seemed ahead of his time. My father asked, “What if we finally see that wartime conditions always undermine personal liberty?” Thanks to whistleblower Edward Snowden, we have a clearer picture of how our government abuses our constitutional liberties every day, often using post-9/11 jargon to justify it. And again, on Afghanistan, my father had long urged to bring American troops home after the U.S. accomplished its original mission early on. If the neoconservatives and others at the time had listened to Ron Paul back then, the tragedy in Afghanistan would not have been prolonged. Most importantly, it would have saved thousands of
American lives and also money that we don’t actually have. During the Tea Party-era ten years ago, I and other libertarian-leaning Republicans followed in my father’s footsteps and managed to change some formerly hawkish minds about war. When Donald Trump became president by blasting the Bush administration’s interventions in Iraq and Afghanistan and condemning “endless wars,” Dad’s foreign policy message had come full circle within the GOP. Yet, if the Republican Party had been more like Ron Paul than Dick Cheney throughout the aughts, it would have saved our country a lot of heartache. If Barack Obama had actually ended the wars he promised too, like Dad had long urged, we would have been better off. Now the same people who still defend the Iraq War and who also wanted to stay in Afghanistan forever are some of the loudest voices criticizing the Taliban retaking control of that country. If after 20 years of preparing Afghanistan to govern itself, it immediately bends to extremists the moment we leave, what did hawks think we were going to accomplish over another decade—or ever? Was two decades not enough time? The fall of Afghanistan to the Taliban is sad but the blame should attach to the naïve neocons who thought they could create a Jeffersonian democracy in a land clinging to the Stone Age, not to those who warned that it would inevitably end in a mess. What’s clear today is that no one with the last name Cheney should even be speaking publicly right now. This origin of this debacle lies at their feet. What’s even clearer, is that unfortunately the warnings of a Republican congressman from Texas years ago now feel more prescient than ever. In Liberty, Rand Paul

body:
Courageous and faithful, that’s the kind of people we need right now, and I hope that you’re one of them. |
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6f717f0146ed4a868f2373dae50c338a&_e=y09gAjTVyIhkmltLP1R2ToD6f_WPuWsc9C4A8c8TRMovzO9laxsyOnQmpH9WJpFfxLwxqAFHeU2FvSeS38ShlrVx6BzpPpOdop1qAHOdhOv8U04Vdy6r4C8ZN9e1FIh7EcOjbIFxu-jPuqvVKu_JMO0duTag2VIYFn35sOeyRtx4PINGhNiJsleZua1Nj8n4OKjb6nSb_VuR9vPCGsEI79XDC72p54XMwOgIts-_USAjrrozo7uuAw9RJhMCbPFx-OAANfaDwC4tVLDl18RoF4Tz2l03cIrYvqJRKEslAGnxY_uQtCKSdU4Y22WQ8p2DZDzI4YxwmwBSDkK4oL2OLjMl0hsqLgelFqJtZHTUED0W7o28UqUICPkYTt2Dn_Mec748vT60M4ao4ey6amgPXaPydEdJzEn05jO8hB-nAhA%3D)

---
**Courageous and faithful** , that’s the kind of people this nation needs right now, and I hope that you, Fellow American, are one of those people.

**My name is Erik Aadland. I’m a father, a former Army officer, a veteran of Iraq and Afghanistan, and I’m running to be the next United States Senator from Colorado.**

If you’re a conservative like me, I know you’re fed up with the liberals taking over our country, burning our flag, and screaming about how they think this nation oppresses them, when you and I both know that’s a lie.

_**Every day that we stand by and do nothing, is another day that these radicals try to push our country towards failure until our country looks like a shadow of what it used to be.**_

**But I’m telling you right now, I didn’t get shot at by terrorists halfway around the world just to come home to an America that I don’t even recognize.** I’ve seen real suffering, real oppression, and cruelty that these privileged liberals could never imagine, and [**I need your help to make sure their version of America never sees the light of day.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6f717f0146ed4a868f2373dae50c338a&_e=y09gAjTVyIhkmltLP1R2ToD6f_WPuWsc9C4A8c8TRMovzO9laxsyOnQmpH9WJpFfxLwxqAFHeU2FvSeS38ShlrVx6BzpPpOdop1qAHOdhOv8U04Vdy6r4C8ZN9e1FIh7EcOjbIFxu-jPuqvVKu_JMO0duTag2VIYFn35sOeyRtx4PINGhNiJsleZua1Nj8n4OKjb6nSb_VuR9vPCGsEI7wPdBmPrrLP_CuFghiayQ9hKPH4waZSfa5v6ORYET_iRSFnBWTd8SE2A0RO_kyygM8MWGZzTXpz_zApr2iMORKVpL1ZYlmhtlnhyRqicVHbU7QLQBxhBUzjg16G4U3fdMH8VctsAE_4Cvb4H-j83ljq7FS7HEFn5vXBiW3P4WRkUnYaxzcQ7V2ZvQ-fn9_NJz41U8XumxNAwLJlfNcWoS6k%3D)

Right now, our country’s future is imperiled by a corrupt establishment, and _**people like you and I must act.**_ **We need to be courageous and faithful in the face of liberal radicalism.** We must stand united saying with one voice that we won’t be pushed around, we won’t bend a knee, and we won’t sit quietly while our rights are trampled.

[**Stand with Erik Aadland**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6f717f0146ed4a868f2373dae50c338a&_e=y09gAjTVyIhkmltLP1R2ToD6f_WPuWsc9C4A8c8TRMovzO9laxsyOnQmpH9WJpFfxLwxqAFHeU2FvSeS38ShlrVx6BzpPpOdop1qAHOdhOv8U04Vdy6r4C8ZN9e1FIh7EcOjbIFxu-jPuqvVKu_JMO0duTag2VIYFn35sOeyRtx4PINGhNiJsleZua1Nj8n4OKjb6nSb_VuR9vPCGsEI7yL8VEGP3IaJj_Vo7fC6CGYpUzi8UBd1iXn0-3HF13Rr97FL0GZ2oo6o_P-bBwjLgda5HQTW-yeFarf8UXkWjyNB_rEICY4TiwP8IEn6cJciXRFs0fLOM3kImyTyZ9eU9lARgEYgLrH7gEmYSDJQlsMS50TXSewpWwIyvuAy_pW81UnFoROV4_tetp9LW5tfRTJIV5rYtqonOuk35bWjTpI%3D)
People used to elect wise individuals who they knew would strive to do the right thing, yet here we are with Biden, Schumer, and Pelosi corrupting everything they touch. We cannot balk in the face of extraordinary opposition, nor can we sit by and hope someone else will do the hard work for us.

I took an oath to support and defend the Constitution of the United States, and right now I’m answering that call of duty, and [**I’m asking you to do the same.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6f717f0146ed4a868f2373dae50c338a&_e=y09gAjTVyIhkmltLP1R2ToD6f_WPuWsc9C4A8c8TRMovzO9laxsyOnQmpH9WJpFfxLwxqAFHeU2FvSeS38ShlrVx6BzpPpOdop1qAHOdhOv8U04Vdy6r4C8ZN9e1FIh7EcOjbIFxu-jPuqvVKu_JMO0duTag2VIYFn35sOeyRtx4PINGhNiJsleZua1Nj8n4OKjb6nSb_VuR9vPCGsEI7xDkjYCW3q3Uo6b_pD7mNGZrkQpM9kyfUMnO0o7aXacNPa4oea8Sy0DhaLNw7gchVMXGbZOF8MNiYAu9G_1YBH2tvLAGaoZ5KpFE-1SKubW_ymb9bDiC0JOwEnsCIPAa-Blv-4e47Tyq0Tok210wjq8AseTLCsRtlxMoz93WpIoMHhsHu0vmyy3SAidAsuOqewMZkPGPr-xjabQAgFn520k%3D) We’re dealing with liberal Senators who care more about promoting riots and lining their own pockets, instead of bettering this nation.

We need to put America first, and I need your help to do that. [**Will you, Fellow American, answer the call of duty and join me in launching this campaign to win back the Senate, and bring back a government that is governed by the people and for the people?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6f717f0146ed4a868f2373dae50c338a&_e=y09gAjTVyIhkmltLP1R2ToD6f_WPuWsc9C4A8c8TRMovzO9laxsyOnQmpH9WJpFfxLwxqAFHeU2FvSeS38ShlrVx6BzpPpOdop1qAHOdhOv8U04Vdy6r4C8ZN9e1FIh7EcOjbIFxu-jPuqvVKu_JMO0duTag2VIYFn35sOeyRtx4PINGhNiJsleZua1Nj8n4OKjb6nSb_VuR9vPCGsEI773pjybqv2T16DqXd3Q_DybhhKUnmIpBFw3nspFfQaxokW9HBDMFfgZApQ76RS3c8HmHdjjHJco1oXsh7LOiyYdEpBDqrDO5zBK5bZ8b6u6K8_1KpyfuG6Mpn5CUWudh2mtWk_vd3Xjgdzvm16Yo0LDrcstxMkQ_wLOYfyChUne7W5OJsOEfwwvwX1T939OasNUsWJcBiIekhI6yHLQQr-o%3D)

[**Stand with Erik Aadland**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6f717f0146ed4a868f2373dae50c338a&_e=y09gAjTVyIhkmltLP1R2ToD6f_WPuWsc9C4A8c8TRMovzO9laxsyOnQmpH9WJpFfxLwxqAFHeU2FvSeS38ShlrVx6BzpPpOdop1qAHOdhOv8U04Vdy6r4C8ZN9e1FIh7EcOjbIFxu-jPuqvVKu_JMO0duTag2VIYFn35sOeyRtx4PINGhNiJsleZua1Nj8n4OKjb6nSb_VuR9vPCGsEI74sM90We6_ZSP7P_Ae0hJdHWZ6Bt6KXy2X834dpyIhcrsH34nVDyOUh1nL-XQXxoiP69aj_mPUAIAlkRWVhfNTvm2iHgykFZxtNyG9oPTIJqoeT4t8D7x60TpZvSHUZxlcBAHz6E_APkUj6P7PgQAienfTnv0-qo1U0F8fTPrm9uDQDZxGXxkOKpyQQDm0iGU1Y286r6uoVhgXGySm0FoEs%3D)
I’m not a politician, so asking for help isn’t something I take lightly. My years in the Army trained me to be self-sufficient and to ask for help only when it was needed most, [**and right now I need your help.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6f717f0146ed4a868f2373dae50c338a&_e=y09gAjTVyIhkmltLP1R2ToD6f_WPuWsc9C4A8c8TRMovzO9laxsyOnQmpH9WJpFfxLwxqAFHeU2FvSeS38ShlrVx6BzpPpOdop1qAHOdhOv8U04Vdy6r4C8ZN9e1FIh7EcOjbIFxu-jPuqvVKu_JMO0duTag2VIYFn35sOeyRtx4PINGhNiJsleZua1Nj8n4OKjb6nSb_VuR9vPCGsEI78mszNyqEt4MLe-FYfU9hvR4qTQXFTXAtuh5DfS2q2XC3-ctFWVJv7o6h0k1IC1qLGPSWWaDlbXlyTGi71b0-vI1mp2jIoJMKxemhOL6JxuEFRdDlGk3g1udLAJsl7C8Z793zfXWnmrmJ3Rh4oAgswUB8XTj47BIQPYRW0psvpbcSRmfI4Wco15cOpXn-UCo4-fPiN8Fc2_WxSbuqTx0rwc%3D)

I’m not asking for an arm and a leg, but I need your help to launch this campaign. [**No matter how small of an impact you may think it has, I know that $100, $50, $20, even just $5 will make a very real impact and will get us one step closer to winning back our nation.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6f717f0146ed4a868f2373dae50c338a&_e=y09gAjTVyIhkmltLP1R2ToD6f_WPuWsc9C4A8c8TRMovzO9laxsyOnQmpH9WJpFfxLwxqAFHeU2FvSeS38ShlrVx6BzpPpOdop1qAHOdhOv8U04Vdy6r4C8ZN9e1FIh7EcOjbIFxu-jPuqvVKu_JMO0duTag2VIYFn35sOeyRtx4PINGhNiJsleZua1Nj8n4OKjb6nSb_VuR9vPCGsEI7wyRbC8FHToAvn29rua0_5M85N9fQUgpVnbsCq1bdL6NTqj_qMQGo8Wl07LvTeGCrsBp1SYXKoR6dQXXrHAji05X6B-o7G-yGuMuPd_qrBgL7WduLVLX_oIh5tiSLdc_Hd5xRKeUQ_k4F3UQPppwbxua9BmXF7WJfMjnTshIfdltqTFIqDg915_6IRi28b1G1fVhAQomyoiq-KWgxC-rI18%3D)

I truly hope you’ll join me in winning back our nation.

United we stand, divided we fall.

For Freedom,

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6f717f0146ed4a868f2373dae50c338a&_e=y09gAjTVyIhkmltLP1R2ToD6f_WPuWsc9C4A8c8TRMovzO9laxsyOnQmpH9WJpFfxLwxqAFHeU2FvSeS38ShlrVx6BzpPpOdop1qAHOdhOv8U04Vdy6r4C8ZN9e1FIh7EcOjbIFxu-jPuqvVKu_JMO0duTag2VIYFn35sOeyRtx4PINGhNiJsleZua1Nj8n4OKjb6nSb_VuR9vPCGsEI71oAUYoq0tpfnIBVDRf1-ePCv4u3kP8OhyG8QbcIMTPCY6HeoQWvXdaOXYl8cCiVT05bzIUCAYL5mTp7adeAZ14fI1Sy40iBydKWf8v7uw4d2rhznUee4OKDRn5wAeUmkyAeZjC7uBq2zc8HMVH1JEUm0-KYDUW_-8SNboOSYJCs9p_7WnApC8jWKI4kZ9tjp2BaGbys_HZTVNkKbGeFfoc%3D)
**Erik Aadland**

[**Stand with Erik Aadland**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6f717f0146ed4a868f2373dae50c338a&_e=y09gAjTVyIhkmltLP1R2ToD6f_WPuWsc9C4A8c8TRMovzO9laxsyOnQmpH9WJpFfxLwxqAFHeU2FvSeS38ShlrVx6BzpPpOdop1qAHOdhOv8U04Vdy6r4C8ZN9e1FIh7EcOjbIFxu-jPuqvVKu_JMO0duTag2VIYFn35sOeyRtx4PINGhNiJsleZua1Nj8n4OKjb6nSb_VuR9vPCGsEI76TnchhdgY-PjVR8IBVrP8wwChTnN6qEfs9Mm7NmKteydctCPUFA90OTcWlRhP1TsSAbjNdGnDbeanSXrF3_m0P4TV-VHJVlIVqTShuEg8wnAGVPGuHk-mNqjPUAEvAuO_CHAJc7jSXA_8dyxXBinTJqSJSZUJMgtJjmfNcG4_f6Ugr6tDuju2O9nlW1teqFhD-JDB_VLFo_NsH3GSNP6mY%3D)

name: Erik Aadland
subject: Courageous and Faithful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AADLAND for Senate
body:
Courageous and faithful, that’s the kind of people we need right now, and I hope that you’re one of them. |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=55596bce86554e329348fc4ea719518a&_e=EJSFAVQ7GwjADWSph3-vBY14snHS_wRvj4hmvHl0kX943nO4vwR71hFJu3DPrnMe6Ga9lE8l50UdfpBrV_mKByE2RbrahB0ikErFs5ONUzZcOpAh3CQrzHgfaCvJiWxnaTsDLmHhIYUz3VgYldgeKMTD_NYKfcAT8VSKjISKXP0rEL2izBHqxMASHcydPWRlTLjHJIo9AGGxS8EEedzw3SYDR29Ue4Z1nRHcXfRPN5qP0v2zLEz69qH6F4lXCkqlYFNe72S4ARs0WybSklpuq7Sx5V3iBxxSNTkMOjv6lkh3bqFVjGXUpzRqzvxfKktcwREtoYXAMb_ceaIGn9s_yZc-wNaYqRG1WJGvPQI_L_avqW5FnMDWuMzipUq5pJc2irxZ1j8qE-2uU4ZjJXX_ezevui6IH69cWMVZYznKAnk%3D)

---
**Courageous and faithful** , that’s the kind of people this nation needs right now, and I hope that you, Fellow American, are one of those people.

**My name is Erik Aadland. I’m a father, a former Army officer, a veteran of Iraq and Afghanistan, and I’m running to be the next United States Senator from Colorado.**

If you’re a conservative like me, I know you’re fed up with the liberals taking over our country, burning our flag, and screaming about how they think this nation oppresses them, when you and I both know that’s a lie.

_**Every day that we stand by and do nothing, is another day that these radicals try to push our country towards failure until our country looks like a shadow of what it used to be.**_

**But I’m telling you right now, I didn’t get shot at by terrorists halfway around the world just to come home to an America that I don’t even recognize.** I’ve seen real suffering, real oppression, and cruelty that these privileged liberals could never imagine, and [**I need your help to make sure their version of America never sees the light of day.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=55596bce86554e329348fc4ea719518a&_e=EJSFAVQ7GwjADWSph3-vBY14snHS_wRvj4hmvHl0kX943nO4vwR71hFJu3DPrnMe6Ga9lE8l50UdfpBrV_mKByE2RbrahB0ikErFs5ONUzZcOpAh3CQrzHgfaCvJiWxnaTsDLmHhIYUz3VgYldgeKMTD_NYKfcAT8VSKjISKXP0rEL2izBHqxMASHcydPWRlTLjHJIo9AGGxS8EEedzw3ReqkNKOzMjseUEXpa7exkLSs_YHHo7XQfC9cZbs8uYZwnpKcENvyTa4-e6bwzG0wrhdkybRPW1fPGr3reawsq1_gk_D6QkW1mVSYqXY8-JsLmekuPd9vw9Fngt7BzeurR7t3sR1umC51wbT3lm4ukCL4t0N31L8FonMaidSy6mSsRwGDRdReJog7SPXffm5PCTwqGiu5oGjc4Vw3VTcMQA%3D)

Right now, our country’s future is imperiled by a corrupt establishment, and _**people like you and I must act.**_ **We need to be courageous and faithful in the face of liberal radicalism.** We must stand united saying with one voice that we won’t be pushed around, we won’t bend a knee, and we won’t sit quietly while our rights are trampled.

[**Stand with Erik Aadland**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=55596bce86554e329348fc4ea719518a&_e=EJSFAVQ7GwjADWSph3-vBY14snHS_wRvj4hmvHl0kX943nO4vwR71hFJu3DPrnMe6Ga9lE8l50UdfpBrV_mKByE2RbrahB0ikErFs5ONUzZcOpAh3CQrzHgfaCvJiWxnaTsDLmHhIYUz3VgYldgeKMTD_NYKfcAT8VSKjISKXP0rEL2izBHqxMASHcydPWRlTLjHJIo9AGGxS8EEedzw3Zle_Uhe0o7l-pUHGAnwwxVWHANd10EVYrVAwZYGCdKWsxK0gSAFVMTQNjXvVwGbU63buSp_WdFmn2iRYR58xscrJ48B8t3D23PTM-u6PNihP80GpExziZKXJHvAcrG1yZZOEoodagCDOj-vxoE-8XDEAsHr4_xtCqsFr3PEG-a0CKhAO8PZOiW5Nn-R600QG6xBYjgk73Nm1JI8-_HLBsQ%3D)
People used to elect wise individuals who they knew would strive to do the right thing, yet here we are with Biden, Schumer, and Pelosi corrupting everything they touch. We cannot balk in the face of extraordinary opposition, nor can we sit by and hope someone else will do the hard work for us.

I took an oath to support and defend the Constitution of the United States, and right now I’m answering that call of duty, and [**I’m asking you to do the same.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=55596bce86554e329348fc4ea719518a&_e=EJSFAVQ7GwjADWSph3-vBY14snHS_wRvj4hmvHl0kX943nO4vwR71hFJu3DPrnMe6Ga9lE8l50UdfpBrV_mKByE2RbrahB0ikErFs5ONUzZcOpAh3CQrzHgfaCvJiWxnaTsDLmHhIYUz3VgYldgeKMTD_NYKfcAT8VSKjISKXP0rEL2izBHqxMASHcydPWRlTLjHJIo9AGGxS8EEedzw3enc9bd1NEqhHdelOKoSgk963nO2gkxZ0jd0PlaNE6ohjAJ4wr5XpzPBlR1vwiKHXKelAakpW0esLtD3mhlenHxiOw9tOV1GBGCKaO-UeIpzBbNMk4H80LL9xhOmN8xmKPuMtDn0O2wjF8Y54RGxvH9Bld8raqplbZSzbpuD4QxIRcfvFHtNYalRxIfwbtjnj28SSarYet13wWCsctmKVEc%3D) We’re dealing with liberal Senators who care more about promoting riots and lining their own pockets, instead of bettering this nation.

We need to put America first, and I need your help to do that. [**Will you, Fellow American, answer the call of duty and join me in launching this campaign to win back the Senate, and bring back a government that is governed by the people and for the people?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=55596bce86554e329348fc4ea719518a&_e=EJSFAVQ7GwjADWSph3-vBY14snHS_wRvj4hmvHl0kX943nO4vwR71hFJu3DPrnMe6Ga9lE8l50UdfpBrV_mKByE2RbrahB0ikErFs5ONUzZcOpAh3CQrzHgfaCvJiWxnaTsDLmHhIYUz3VgYldgeKMTD_NYKfcAT8VSKjISKXP0rEL2izBHqxMASHcydPWRlTLjHJIo9AGGxS8EEedzw3agAaEZ_PjOlwDZ01oaNiPh8eIwrEwIvRhpNcH_Jam1o0L0hwrpz2NqnsYXUOvo4qb4eP5XemBDUIxfbJBwnw5-klaDLKCYJZbUCWaImzsjSMPw7zbzEgtS5SiQFpkyyD1aK9Nq2YvNUvsa4ut7OwDYdVI4SKulaN7LAqbGgNItAES_olGj7vkuGM9tFgg-StBLMOkBt9I7dDAyte1U3WwE%3D)

[**Stand with Erik Aadland**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=55596bce86554e329348fc4ea719518a&_e=EJSFAVQ7GwjADWSph3-vBY14snHS_wRvj4hmvHl0kX943nO4vwR71hFJu3DPrnMe6Ga9lE8l50UdfpBrV_mKByE2RbrahB0ikErFs5ONUzZcOpAh3CQrzHgfaCvJiWxnaTsDLmHhIYUz3VgYldgeKMTD_NYKfcAT8VSKjISKXP0rEL2izBHqxMASHcydPWRlTLjHJIo9AGGxS8EEedzw3Rp6flfD1y1x8FPLYG4frR5dFNsM8O7uqZq7FwdxiarGvQ2xDLdGKwPq662jvT0pS8U913OMuBzaQnfeoZb2VbIfXUE2Qvj8L600wjv4x7iwu1w4ijUco6K-1S-pWPGANGXR8ZUEl5__FPEFH9MvpbbgpfkD4kjorH7OSe3jJ8rk8_9p5UiLR1K9b-A9F1hH8YRFcuCxqtwFYhHO6uYFONo%3D)
I’m not a politician, so asking for help isn’t something I take lightly. My years in the Army trained me to be self-sufficient and to ask for help only when it was needed most, [**and right now I need your help.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=55596bce86554e329348fc4ea719518a&_e=EJSFAVQ7GwjADWSph3-vBY14snHS_wRvj4hmvHl0kX943nO4vwR71hFJu3DPrnMe6Ga9lE8l50UdfpBrV_mKByE2RbrahB0ikErFs5ONUzZcOpAh3CQrzHgfaCvJiWxnaTsDLmHhIYUz3VgYldgeKMTD_NYKfcAT8VSKjISKXP0rEL2izBHqxMASHcydPWRlTLjHJIo9AGGxS8EEedzw3c-Q8qXfMhA3djZKsPXxTnlZx5m90n5tL7KjwP04t-uxJjwVOBNI4nP5LWmejYFW9t_RYyo039wY8ve0JBDewUfgz5H5wdseybbbbcrOPkTBXA7i5hO4KLhvAfBEOm-pv_SCTXevrr5MGKFRusZYHg84TBEYB1FlAvB3ceRZt-KkQPT8x5-VR4rZ6FgkPC-vsBqzv7syTlk64Ine-j--LWk%3D)

I’m not asking for an arm and a leg, but I need your help to launch this campaign. [**No matter how small of an impact you may think it has, I know that $100, $50, $20, even just $5 will make a very real impact and will get us one step closer to winning back our nation.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=55596bce86554e329348fc4ea719518a&_e=EJSFAVQ7GwjADWSph3-vBY14snHS_wRvj4hmvHl0kX943nO4vwR71hFJu3DPrnMe6Ga9lE8l50UdfpBrV_mKByE2RbrahB0ikErFs5ONUzZcOpAh3CQrzHgfaCvJiWxnaTsDLmHhIYUz3VgYldgeKMTD_NYKfcAT8VSKjISKXP0rEL2izBHqxMASHcydPWRlTLjHJIo9AGGxS8EEedzw3UzxULfa-JDglL18Gq5bNB-TmapVIavtLUwtk6jauOiHzriZmuXUaI9E-jBebMuaup5nBQ8K-Z_HvG0Sz5qJvrhWLVxwpvWOZ9VljJLv4zEhVAFOamuA1hHY3qePuLnty5cBq0mKpmhafWDEO0f1OK9OSkjuZFv26aDqjeNB2qE5AXwDIoKJv6AI1gNKNg_I0kQ3TBHpMa2vTslyENOTzL0%3D)

I truly hope you’ll join me in winning back our nation.

United we stand, divided we fall.

For Freedom,

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=55596bce86554e329348fc4ea719518a&_e=EJSFAVQ7GwjADWSph3-vBY14snHS_wRvj4hmvHl0kX943nO4vwR71hFJu3DPrnMe6Ga9lE8l50UdfpBrV_mKByE2RbrahB0ikErFs5ONUzZcOpAh3CQrzHgfaCvJiWxnaTsDLmHhIYUz3VgYldgeKMTD_NYKfcAT8VSKjISKXP0rEL2izBHqxMASHcydPWRlTLjHJIo9AGGxS8EEedzw3YoDRhLjzz0MgDSUlxMg_Ajtr0DXv8gkl-so9XeKDCNFon1EVyVuq12LhM7hNj7pGacCcsz3pOnggYfV90wjynhJvefIImbFnn_x2YuNhty8ipes9GfJaswIFZwDx6wDtQ0SQbeQV76JMmhYgKfDEXXG9p2Hm1qnD58_eA1nVLg7ISgjO5YPIaSw-RTDPKPewHyYva4bLWQYbyBSdNDVwDg%3D)
**Erik Aadland**

[**Stand with Erik Aadland**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=55596bce86554e329348fc4ea719518a&_e=EJSFAVQ7GwjADWSph3-vBY14snHS_wRvj4hmvHl0kX943nO4vwR71hFJu3DPrnMe6Ga9lE8l50UdfpBrV_mKByE2RbrahB0ikErFs5ONUzZcOpAh3CQrzHgfaCvJiWxnaTsDLmHhIYUz3VgYldgeKMTD_NYKfcAT8VSKjISKXP0rEL2izBHqxMASHcydPWRlTLjHJIo9AGGxS8EEedzw3eL5DyEt895eKTZ_xA6PlyOT7cRLIM5VJr0_SccnluNeqDWMV_NdGbcltm7ONZZLoPKKCxg1L93V1yJsUm7Nd4aZbTuWhrCt8Ive87WN-XUkrJUSxLypDKYkm95qGuMvQlv1vD7r0AL5sfEhdKT9A_P9AwwbPKHWODg9r3RSkXAgCOP6CMP3bfEUCX4-s920j7yNfmgtlRUVe5VH_sdGGVA%3D)

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Join us next Thursday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

The Biden Administration and Speaker Nancy Pelosi are failing our country. Their embrace of higher taxes, open borders and socialism along with their incompetent leadership is putting our children's future in jeopardy. They must be stopped.

That's why next Thursday, August 26th, I'm hosting my very first Meet & Greet of the 2022 campaign cycle at Senate Avenue Brewing Company in Jersey Village.

I hope you're able to drop in for a bite and conversation about preserving our values and way of life for the next generation.

The event will take place between 6:00pm-7:30pm on Thursday, August 26th and all ages are welcome! To RSVP, simply reply to this email or email us at info@wesleyfortexas.com.

Looking forward to seeing you there!

Sincerely,
Wesley

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=52e2de519ab34202b61133fd9956ad52&_e=0jQOCEzNG1KX4stFKcFgOHKlaiBA1HBjhtpjurAmdvZN6WypS2S09wb4-8QGjgnZlN5QqXC1EwHH8iToJE7uqNXico1czgFgdyRLuoTZea4T4R2Bbmxz7rf7HRNG760jhiHuLJn3mVXFF-p-r2TaNxX_QvLH3ZfB5sqL5EwMwlToe-aa27FerrO2aNWHHHHB_zVgvQIXYNsamhUldgXqzFxl9VNy6kPXSISX3zpulxnRv33KRat5gBkbBuHid_LSOdV1RewX5SbihX71P3lyLXzFpfJMTw6dshwE3hbpFZk%3D)****

clean_body: Friend, The Biden Administration and Speaker Nancy Pelosi are failing our country. Their embrace of higher taxes, open borders and socialism along with their incompetent leadership is putting our children's future in jeopardy. They must be stopped. That's why next Thursday, August 26th, I'm hosting my very first Meet & Greet of the 2022 campaign cycle at Senate Avenue Brewing Company in Jersey Village. I hope you're able to drop in for a bite and conversation about preserving our values and way of life for the next generation. The event will take place between 6:00pm-7:30pm on Thursday, August 26th and all ages are welcome! To RSVP, simply reply to this email or email us at info@wesleyfortexas.com. Looking forward to seeing you there! Sincerely, Wesley **** Paid for by Hunt for Congress.
